080101.english: Paul, an apostle of Jesus Christ by the will of God, and Timothy our brother, unto the church of God which is at Corinth, with all the saints which are in all Achaia:
080101.cherokee: ᏉᎳ, ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏓᏅᏖᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎹᏗ ᎢᎩᏅᏟ, ᏫᏨᏲᏪᎳᏏ ᏗᏣᏁᎶᏗ ᎢᏣᏓᏡᎬ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎪᎵᏂᏗᏱ ᏥᏣᏓᏡᎬ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏘ ᏂᎬᎾᏛ ᎠᎦᏯ ᎢᏤᎲᎢ;
080101.phonetic: Quo-la, Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv a-gi-nv-si-dv na-s-gi-ya U-ne-la-nv-hi u-da-nv-te-lv-i, a-le Di-ma-di i-gi-nv-tli, wi-tsv-yo-we-la-si di-tsa-ne-lo-di i-tsa-da-tlu-gv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga Go-li-ni-di-yi tsi-tsa-da-tlu-gv, a-le ni-ga-dv i-tsa-da-nv-ti ni-gv-na-dv A-ga-ya i-tse-hv-i;

080102.english: Grace be to you and peace from God our Father, and from the Lord Jesus Christ.
080102.cherokee: ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎢᏤᎳᏗᏙᎮᏍᏗ ᏅᏓᏳᎾᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᎩᏙᏓ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ.
080102.phonetic: Gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv a-le nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv i-tse-la-di-do-he-s-di nv-da-yu-na-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv-hi U-ne-la-nv-hi I-gi-do-da, a-le U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv.

080103.english: Blessed be God, even the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, the Father of mercies, and the God of all comfort;
080103.cherokee: ᎦᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏙᏓ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏣᏘ ᎠᎦᏴᎵᎨᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎠᏓᎦᎵᏍᏓᏗᏍᎩ;
080103.phonetic: Ga-lv-quo-do-di ge-se-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi, na-s-gi U-do-da U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-ga-tse-li Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv, u-da-do-li-tsa-ti A-ga-yv-li-ge-i, na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi ni-ga-v a-da-ga-li-s-da-di-s-gi;

080104.english: Who comforteth us in all our tribulation, that we may be able to comfort them which are in any trouble, by the comfort wherewith we ourselves are comforted of God.
080104.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᎩᎦᎵᏍᏓᏗᏍᎩ ᏥᎩ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎣᏥᎩᎵᏲᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏐᏗᏱ ᏰᎵ ᏗᎦᏲᏥᎦᎵᏍᏓᏗᏍᏗ ᎠᏂᎩᎵᏲᎩ, ᎦᏲᎬᏙᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏓᎦᎵᏍᏓᏗᏍᎩ ᎣᎬᏒ ᎣᎩᎦᎵᏍᏓᏗᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ.
080104.phonetic: Na-s-gi o-gi-ga-li-s-da-di-s-gi tsi-gi ni-ga-v tsu-da-le-nv-dv o-tsi-gi-li-yo-gv-i, na-s-gi i-yu-wa-ni-so-di-yi ye-li di-ga-yo-tsi-ga-li-s-da-di-s-di a-ni-gi-li-yo-gi, ga-yo-gv-do-di na-s-gi a-da-ga-li-s-da-di-s-gi o-gv-sv o-gi-ga-li-s-da-di-s-di-s-gv U-ne-la-nv-hi.

080105.english: For as the sufferings of Christ abound in us, so our consolation also aboundeth by Christ.
080105.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯᏰᏃ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᎩᎵᏲᏨ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏦᏥᎩᎵᏲᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᏣᏔ ᎣᎩᏁᎭ ᎠᏓᎦᎵᏍᏓᏗᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ.
080105.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya-ye-no Ga-lo-ne-dv u-gi-li-yo-tsv u-tsa-ti tso-tsi-gi-li-yo-ga, na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo u-tsa-ta o-gi-ne-ha a-da-ga-li-s-da-di-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv ge-sv nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi.

080106.english: And whether we be afflicted, it is for your consolation and salvation, which is effectual in the enduring of the same sufferings which we also suffer: or whether we be comforted, it is for your consolation and salvation.
080106.cherokee: ᎢᏳ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏲᏥᎩᎵᏲᎦ, ᎢᏥᎦᎵᏍᏓᏗᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᎤᎬᏩᎳ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏥᏩᏛᎡᎭ ᏗᏨᏂᏗᏳ ᎢᏥᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᏴ ᎣᏥᎩᎵᏲᎬ ᎤᏠᏱ; ᎢᏳ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎦᎵᏍᏗ ᏲᎦᏓᏅᏔ, ᎢᏥᎦᎵᏍᏓᏗᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᎤᎬᏩᎳ.
080106.phonetic: I-yu a-le na-s-quo yo-tsi-gi-li-yo-ga, i-tsi-ga-li-s-da-di-s-di a-le i-tsa-li-s-de-lv-do-di u-gv-wa-la, na-s-gi tsi-tsi-wa-dv-e-ha di-tsv-ni-di-yu i-tsi-gi-li-yo-i-s-di-yi a-yv o-tsi-gi-li-yo-gv u-tlo-yi; i-yu a-le u-ga-li-s-di yo-ga-da-nv-ta, i-tsi-ga-li-s-da-di-s-di a-le i-tsa-li-s-de-lv-do-di u-gv-wa-la.

080107.english: And our hope of you is stedfast, knowing, that as ye are partakers of the sufferings, so shall ye be also of the consolation.
080107.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎢᏨᏴᏒ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᏦᏥᎦᏔᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏣᏠᏯᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎠᎩᎵᏲᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᏣᏠᏯᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᎦᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
080107.phonetic: A-le u-du-gi i-tsv-yv-sv u-li-ni-gi-di-yu, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha tso-tsi-ga-ta-ha, na-s-gi i-tsa-tlo-ya-s-di-s-gv a-gi-li-yo-i-s-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo i-tsa-tlo-ya-s-do-di ge-se-s-di u-ga-li-s-di ge-sv-i.

080108.english: For we would not, brethren, have you ignorant of our trouble which came to us in Asia, that we were pressed out of measure, above strength, insomuch that we despaired even of life:
080108.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏲᎦᏚᎵᎭ, ᎢᏓᎵᏅᎵ, ᏂᏥᎦᏔᎲᎾᏉ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏕᏯᏙᏗ ᎣᎩᎷᏤᎸ ᎡᏏᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎶᏒᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎦᎨᏛ ᎣᎩᎷᏤᎸᎢ, ᎤᎶᏒᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᏂᏙᎦᎵᏂᎬᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬᎩ ᎣᎦᎸᏲᎵᎸᎩ ᏦᎦᏛᏂᏗᏍᏗᏱ;
080108.phonetic: V-tla-ye-no yo-ga-du-li-ha, i-da-li-nv-li, ni-tsi-ga-ta-hv-na-quo i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi na-s-gi u-de-ya-do-di o-gi-lu-tse-lv E-si-yi, na-s-gi u-lo-sv-s-ta-nv-hi ga-ge-dv o-gi-lu-tse-lv-i, u-lo-sv-s-ta-nv-hi ni-do-ga-li-ni-gv-gv-i, na-s-gi-no nv-da-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv-gi o-ga-lv-yo-li-lv-gi tso-ga-dv-ni-di-s-di-yi;

080109.english: But we had the sentence of death in ourselves, that we should not trust in ourselves, but in God which raiseth the dead:
080109.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎣᎩᎲᎩ ᏦᎩᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏚᏚᎪᏔᏅᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᎬᏒᏉ ᎣᎦᏓᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎣᏣᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏧᏂᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᏗᎴᎯᏐᏗᏍᎩ;
080109.phonetic: A-se-no o-gi-hv-gi tso-gi-yo-hu-hi-s-di-yi du-du-go-ta-nv-i, na-s-gi yi-gv-sv-quo o-ga-da-li-s-ga-s-do-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na, U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni o-tsa-li-s-ga-s-do-di-yi, na-s-gi na tsu-ni-yo-hu-sv-hi di-le-hi-so-di-s-gi;

080110.english: Who delivered us from so great a death, and doth deliver: in whom we trust that he will yet deliver us;
080110.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎣᎫᏓᎴᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᎾᏰᎯᏍᏗ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᏏ ᏦᎫᏓᎴᎭ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏚᎩ ᏦᏨᎾᏁᎭ ᎠᏏᏉ ᎣᎫᏓᎴᏍᏗᏱ;
080110.phonetic: Na-s-gi na o-gu-da-le-dv na-s-gi i-yu-na-ye-hi-s-di a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, a-le na-s-gi na a-si tso-gu-da-le-ha; na-s-gi u-du-gi tso-tsv-na-ne-ha a-si-quo o-gu-da-le-s-di-yi;

080111.english: Ye also helping together by prayer for us, that for the gift bestowed upon us by the means of many persons thanks may be given by many on our behalf.
080111.cherokee: ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏍᎩᏍᏕᎵᏍᎬ ᎢᏣᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎣᎩᏍᏕᎸᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᎩᏙᎵᏨ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᎢᏳᏅᏂᏌᏛ ᏅᏓᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᎤᎾᎵᎮᎵᏤᏗᏱ [ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ] ᎠᏴ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ.
080111.phonetic: Ni-hi na-s-quo s-gi-s-de-li-s-gv i-tsa-da-do-li-s-di-s-gv o-gi-s-de-lv-di-yi, na-s-gi o-gi-do-li-tsv u-ni-tsa-ti i-yu-nv-ni-sa-dv nv-da-yu-li-s-do-di-yi u-ni-tsa-ti u-na-li-he-li-tse-di-yi [U-ne-la-nv-hi] a-yv ge-sv i-yu-s-di.

080112.english: For our rejoicing is this, the testimony of our conscience, that in simplicity and godly sincerity, not with fleshly wisdom, but by the grace of God, we have had our conversation in the world, and more abundantly to you-ward.
080112.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᏦᏣᎵᎮᎵᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏦᎦᏓᏅᏙᎩ ᎪᎯᏳᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᏃᏨᏗᏍᎬᎾ ᎤᏇᏓᎵᏉ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎠᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎣᎩᏍᏕᎵᏍᎬᎢ, ᏄᏠᎾᏍᏛᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎣᏨᏗᏍᎬ ᎣᎨᏙᎸ ᎠᏂ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᎴ Ꮀ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎭ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏤᎲᎢ.
080112.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha tso-tsa-li-he-li-ga, na-s-gi tso-ga-da-nv-do-gi go-hi-yu-di-s-gv-i, no-tsv-di-s-gv-na u-que-da-li-quo u-gv-wa-li a-ga-do-v-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv o-gi-s-de-li-s-gv-i, nu-tlo-na-s-dv-na ge-sv o-tsv-di-s-gv o-ge-do-lv a-ni e-lo-hi ge-sv-i; a-le ho u-gv-wi-yu-ha ni-hi i-tse-hv-i.

080113.english: For we write none other things unto you, than what ye read or acknowledge; and I trust ye shall acknowledge even to the end;
080113.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏱᏨᏲᏪᎳᏁᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏥᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏥᏕᏣᏓᏂᎸᏨ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎠᏋᎭ ᎬᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᎩ ᏗᏣᏓᏂᎸᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎨᏒᎢ;
080113.phonetic: V-tla-ye-no nv-wa-da-le go-hu-s-di yi-tsv-yo-we-la-ne-ha, na-s-gi na u-wa-sv tsi-tsi-ga-ta-ha a-le na-s-quo tsi-de-tsa-da-ni-lv-tsv; a-le u-du-gi a-quv-ha gv-li-s-qua-di-s-gi di-tsa-da-ni-lv-i-s-di-yi ge-sv-i;

080114.english: As also ye have acknowledged us in part, that we are your rejoicing, even as ye also are ours in the day of the Lord Jesus.
080114.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏰᎵᎦᎾᎨ ᏗᏍᎩᏯᏓᏂᎸᏨᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏨᏯᎵᎡᎵᏍᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏍᎩᏯᎵᎡᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎢᎦ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
080114.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo ye-li-ga-na-ge di-s-gi-ya-da-ni-lv-tsv-hi tsi-gi, na-s-gi a-yv ge-sv i-tsv-ya-li-e-li-s-di-s-gv-i, na-s-gi-ya s-gi-ya-li-e-li-s-do-di tsi-gi, na-hi-yu U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa u-tse-li i-ga ge-se-s-di.

080115.english: And in this confidence I was minded to come unto you before, that ye might have a second benefit;
080115.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎠᏉᎯᏳᏒ ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏖᎸᎩ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏏ ᎾᏍᏆᎵᏍᎬᎾ ᏫᏨᎷᏤᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏐᏗᏱ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗᏱ;
080115.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no hi-a nu-s-dv a-quo-hi-yu-sv a-qua-da-nv-te-lv-gi go-hi ge-sv a-si na-s-qua-li-s-gv-na wi-tsv-lu-tse-di-yi, na-s-gi i-yu-wa-ni-so-di-yi ta-li-ne o-s-dv i-tsa-da-nv-da-di-s-di-yi;

080116.english: And to pass by you into Macedonia, and to come again out of Macedonia unto you, and of you to be brought on my way toward Judaea.
080116.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏫᏨᎶᎢᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᎹᏏᏙᏂ ᏩᎩᎷᎯᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎹᏏᏙᏂ ᏗᎦᏂᎩᏒ ᏔᎵᏁ ᏅᏓᏨᎷᏤᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᏗᏱ ᏫᏥᎦᏛ ᏍᎩᏯᏘᏅᏍᏗᏱ.
080116.phonetic: A-le wi-tsv-lo-i-s-da-ne-di-yi Ma-si-do-ni wa-gi-lu-hi-s-di-yi, a-le Ma-si-do-ni di-ga-ni-gi-sv ta-li-ne nv-da-tsv-lu-tse-di-yi, a-le Tsu-di-yi wi-tsi-ga-dv s-gi-ya-ti-nv-s-di-yi.

080117.english: When I therefore was thus minded, did I use lightness? or the things that I purpose, do I purpose according to the flesh, that with me there should be yea yea, and nay nay?
080117.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏥᏄᏍᏛ ᏣᏆᏓᏅᏖᎸᎩ, ᏅᎵᏌᎵᏉᏍᎪ ᎠᎩᏰᎸᎯ ᎨᏎᎢ?  ᎠᎴ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎦᏓᏅᏛᎵ, ᏥᎪ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎤᏓᏅᏖᏗ ᎦᏓᏖᏍᎪᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎠᏴ ᏥᏁᎬ ᎯᎠᏉ ᏱᏄᏍᏗ, ᎥᎥ, ᎥᎥ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ, ᎥᏝ?
080117.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no tsi-nu-s-dv tsa-qua-da-nv-te-lv-gi, nv-li-sa-li-quo-s-go a-gi-ye-lv-hi ge-se-i?  a-le go-hu-s-di ga-da-nv-dv-li, tsi-go u-que-da-li u-da-nv-te-di ga-da-te-s-go-i, na-s-gi-no a-yv tsi-ne-gv hi-a-quo yi-nu-s-di, v-v, v-v, a-le v-tla, v-tla?

080118.english: But as God is true, our word toward you was not yea and nay.
080118.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏄᏓᎵᏓᏍᏛᎾ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ [ᏄᏙᎯᏳᎭ] ᎠᏴ ᎢᏨᏁᏤᎲ ᎥᎥ ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
080118.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni nu-da-li-da-s-dv-na tsi-gi, na-s-gi [nu-do-hi-yu-ha] a-yv i-tsv-ne-tse-hv v-v a-le v-tla ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i.

080119.english: For the Son of God, Jesus Christ, who was preached among you by us, even by me and Silvanus and Timotheus, was not yea and nay, but in him was yea.
080119.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᎤᏪᏥ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏤᎲ ᎢᏨᏯᎵᏥᏙᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ, ᎠᎴ ᏏᎵᏪᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎹᏗ ᎢᏨᏯᎵᏥᏙᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎥᎥ ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏛᏗᏱ ᎥᏝ ᏲᎦᏛᏁᎢ, ᎥᎥᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᏛᏗᏱ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏃᎬᏁᎸᎩ.
080119.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no U-we-tsi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv, na-s-gi i-tse-hv i-tsv-ya-li-tsi-do-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi, na-s-gi a-yv, a-le Si-li-we-na, a-le Di-ma-di i-tsv-ya-li-tsi-do-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi, v-v a-le v-tla u-dv-di-yi v-tla yo-ga-dv-ne-i, v-v-s-gi-ni u-wa-sv u-dv-di-yi gv-ni-ge-sv no-gv-ne-lv-gi.

080120.english: For all the promises of God in him are yea, and in him Amen, unto the glory of God by us.
080120.cherokee: ᎾᎦᏛᏰᏃ ᎤᏚᎢᏍᏔᏅᎢ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ, ᎥᎥ ᎬᏛᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎨᏐ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᏥᎸᏉᏙᏗᏱ ᎠᏴ ᎢᏲᎬᏁᏗᏱ.
080120.phonetic: Na-ga-dv-ye-no u-du-i-s-ta-nv-i U-ne-la-nv-hi na-s-gi na i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv, v-v gv-dv-di, a-le u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya ge-so na-s-gi i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv, na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi a-tsi-lv-quo-do-di-yi a-yv i-yo-gv-ne-di-yi.

080121.english: Now he which stablisheth us with you in Christ, and hath anointed us, is God;
080121.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎠᏴ ᎠᎴ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᏗᎦᎵᏂᎪᎯᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎡᏓᏤᎵᎦ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᎩᎶᏁᎥᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ;
080121.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no a-yv a-le ni-hi i-tsu-la-ha di-ga-li-ni-go-hi-s-di-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv e-da-tse-li-ga ge-sv-i, a-le i-gi-lo-ne-v-hi, na-s-gi na U-ne-la-nv-hi;

080122.english: Who hath also sealed us, and given the earnest of the Spirit in our hearts.
080122.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᎩᏰᎸᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᎩᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ ᏗᎩᎾᏫᏱ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎠᎦᏘᏗᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
080122.phonetic: Na-s-gi na na-s-quo i-gi-ye-lv-ta-nv-hi tsi-gi, a-le i-gi-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi di-gi-na-wi-yi A-da-nv-do a-ga-ti-di-s-do-di ge-sv-i.

080123.english: Moreover I call God for a record upon my soul, that to spare you I came not as yet unto Corinth.
080123.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏥᏔᏲᏎᎭ ᎠᎦᏔᎯ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᏬᎯᏳᏓᏁᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏨᎨᏳᎥᏍᎬ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬ ᎠᏏ ᎪᎵᏂᏗᏱ ᏫᏂᏥᎷᎬᎾ ᏥᎩ;
080123.phonetic: A-le U-ne-la-nv-hi tsi-ta-yo-se-ha a-ga-ta-hi i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi a-qua-da-nv-do u-wo-hi-yu-da-ne-di-yi, na-s-gi i-tsv-ge-yu-v-s-gv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv a-si Go-li-ni-di-yi wi-ni-tsi-lu-gv-na tsi-gi;

080124.english: Not for that we have dominion over your faith, but are helpers of your joy: for by faith ye stand.
080124.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎠᏗᎾ ᎢᏨᏯᏓᏅᏖᎮᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏒᎢ, ᎣᏥᏍᏕᎵᏍᎩᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏣᎵᎮᎵᎬᎢ; ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏒᏰᏃ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗ ᎠᏏ ᏥᏕᏥᏙᎦ.
080124.phonetic: V-tla a-di-na i-tsv-ya-da-nv-te-he-hi ge-sv i-tso-hi-yu-sv-i, o-tsi-s-de-li-s-gi-quo-s-gi-ni ge-sv i-tsa-li-he-li-gv-i; i-tso-hi-yu-sv-ye-no ni-ga-li-s-do-di a-si tsi-de-tsi-do-ga.

080201.english: But I determined this with myself, that I would not come again to you in heaviness.
080201.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏄᏍᏛᎩ ᎠᏋᏒ ᎨᏒ ᏓᏊᎪᏔᏅᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏔᎵᏁ ᏫᏨᎷᏤᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎤᏲ ᎬᏆᏓᏅᏘ.
080201.phonetic: A-se-no hi-a nu-s-dv-gi a-quv-sv ge-sv da-quu-go-ta-nv-gi, na-s-gi ta-li-ne wi-tsv-lu-tse-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na u-yo gv-qua-da-nv-ti.

080202.english: For if I make you sorry, who is he then that maketh me glad, but the same which is made sorry by me?
080202.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎤᏲ ᏱᏨᏯᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏔᏅ, ᎦᎪ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏯᏆᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏓ, ᎾᏍᎩᏉ Ꮎ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᏲ ᏥᏯᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏔᏅᎯ?
080202.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no u-yo yi-tsv-ya-da-nv-da-di-s-ta-nv, ga-go o-s-dv ya-qua-da-nv-da-di-s-da, na-s-gi-quo na u-wa-sv u-yo tsi-ya-da-nv-da-di-s-ta-nv-hi?

080203.english: And I wrote this same unto you, lest, when I came, I should have sorrow from them of whom I ought to rejoice; having confidence in you all, that my joy is the joy of you all.
080203.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏄᏍᏛ ᏥᏫᏨᏲᏪᎳᏁᎸᎩ, ᏞᏍᏗᏉ ᎾᎿᎭᏫᏥᎷᏨᎭ, ᎤᏲ ᏱᎬᏆᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏔᏁᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᎵᎮᎵᏍᏗ ᎬᏆᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏙᏗ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᏇᎵᏒᎩ; ᏂᏥᎥᏉ ᎢᏨᏲᎢᏳᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎠᏆᎵᎮᎵᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎯ ᏂᏥᎥ ᎢᏣᎵᎮᎵᏍᏗᏍᎬᎢ.
080203.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi tsi-nu-s-dv tsi-wi-tsv-yo-we-la-ne-lv-gi, tle-s-di-quo na-hna wi-tsi-lu-tsv-ha, u-yo yi-gv-qua-da-nv-da-di-s-ta-ne-s-di na-s-gi na u-li-he-li-s-di gv-qua-da-nv-da-di-s-do-di tsi-gi, a-que-li-sv-gi; ni-tsi-v-quo i-tsv-yo-i-yu-ha na-s-gi nu-s-dv a-qua-li-he-li-s-di-s-gv na-s-quo na-s-gi ni-hi ni-tsi-v i-tsa-li-he-li-s-di-s-gv-i.

080204.english: For out of much affliction and anguish of heart I wrote unto you with many tears; not that ye should be grieved, but that ye might know the love which I have more abundantly unto you.
080204.cherokee: ᎤᏣᏘᏰᏃ ᎠᎩᎵᏯ ᎨᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᎡᎯᏍᏗ ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏔᏩᏕᎬ ᏫᏨᏲᏪᎳᏁᎸᎩ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏗᎦᏥᎦᏌᏬᎢᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎥᏝ ᎠᏗᎾ ᎤᏲ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏯᏇᎵᏎᎢ, ᎢᏥᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗᏱᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏣᏔᏅᎯ ᎢᏨᎨᏳᎢᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ.
080204.phonetic: U-tsa-ti-ye-no a-gi-li-ya ge-sv, a-le e-hi-s-di a-qua-da-nv-ta-wa-de-gv wi-tsv-yo-we-la-ne-lv-gi u-tsa-ti di-ga-tsi-ga-sa-wo-i-hi ge-sv-i; v-tla a-di-na u-yo u-na-da-nv-da-di-s-do-di ge-se-s-di ya-que-li-se-i, i-tsi-ga-do-v-hi-s-di-yi-quo-s-gi-ni na-s-gi u-tsa-ta-nv-hi i-tsv-ge-yu-i-yu ge-sv-i.

080205.english: But if any have caused grief, he hath not grieved me, but in part: that I may not overcharge you all.
080205.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎩᎶ ᎡᎯᏍᏗ ᏧᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᏴᏉ ᎡᎯᏍᏗ ᏯᏆᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏔᏅ; ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏂᏥᎥ ᏰᎵ ᎡᎯᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏔᏅ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᎶᏒᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎳᏫᏎᎲᎢ.
080205.phonetic: I-yu-s-gi-ni-no-nv gi-lo e-hi-s-di tsu-da-nv-da-di-s-ta-nv-hi ge-se-s-di, v-tla a-yv-quo e-hi-s-di ya-qua-da-nv-da-di-s-ta-nv; ni-hi-s-gi-ni ni-tsi-v ye-li e-hi-s-di i-tsa-da-nv-da-di-s-ta-nv; na-s-gi tsi-lo-sv-s-da-ne-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na tsi-la-wi-se-hv-i.

080206.english: Sufficient to such a man is this punishment, which was inflicted of many.
080206.cherokee: ᎠᎵᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ [ᎠᏍᎦᏯ] ᏅᏍᏛᏛᎢ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᏥᎬᏩᏍᏛᏗᏍᏔᏅ.
080206.phonetic: A-li-quo na-s-gi i-yu-s-di [a-s-ga-ya] nv-s-dv-dv-i na-s-gi u-ni-tsa-ti tsi-gv-wa-s-dv-di-s-ta-nv.

080207.english: So that contrariwise ye ought rather to forgive him, and comfort him, lest perhaps such a one should be swallowed up with overmuch sorrow.
080207.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏰᏥᏙᎵᏨᏉ, ᎠᎴ ᏰᏥᎦᎵᏍᏓᏛ, ᏱᏅᏎᎦᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᏲ ᎤᏰᎸᏒ ᏳᏃᏴᏘᏍᏓ.
080207.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no go-hi ge-sv ye-tsi-do-li-tsv-quo, a-le ye-tsi-ga-li-s-da-dv, yi-nv-se-ga-gi na-s-gi u-tsa-ti u-yo u-ye-lv-sv yu-no-yv-ti-s-da.

080208.english: Wherefore I beseech you that ye would confirm your love toward him.
080208.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎢᏨᏔᏲᏎᎭ ᎡᏥᏍᏓᏱᏕᏗᏱ ᎡᏥᎨᏳᎢᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ.
080208.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di i-tsv-ta-yo-se-ha e-tsi-s-da-yi-de-di-yi e-tsi-ge-yu-i-yu ge-sv-i.

080209.english: For to this end also did I write, that I might know the proof of you, whether ye be obedient in all things.
080209.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎯᎠ Ꮀ ᎤᎬᏩᎸᎩ ᏥᏫᏨᏲᏪᎳᏁᎸᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏨᎪᎵᏰᏍᎬᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏂᏨᏪᏎᎲ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎲ ᎠᎴ ᏂᏣᏛᏁᎲᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
080209.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no hi-a ho u-gv-wa-lv-gi tsi-wi-tsv-yo-we-la-ne-lv-gi, na-s-gi i-tsv-go-li-ye-s-gv-gi, na-s-gi ni-ga-v tsu-da-le-nv-dv ni-tsv-we-se-hv ni-tsa-dv-ne-hv a-le ni-tsa-dv-ne-hv-na ge-sv-i.

080210.english: To whom ye forgive any thing, I forgive also: for if I forgave any thing, to whom I forgave it, for your sakes forgave I it in the person of Christ;
080210.cherokee: ᎩᎶ ᏰᏥᎥᎡᎸ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᏍᎦᏅᏨ, ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏥᎥᎡᎭ; ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎠᏴ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎠᏍᎦᏅᏨᎢ ᏱᏥᎥᏍᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᎥᎡᎸᎯ ᏂᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᏳᎵᏍᏙᏔᏅᎩ ᏥᎥᎡᎸᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᎦᏔᎲᎢ;
080210.phonetic: Gi-lo ye-tsi-v-e-lv go-hu-s-di u-s-ga-nv-tsv, a-yv na-s-quo tsi-v-e-ha; i-yu-ye-no a-yv go-hu-s-di a-s-ga-nv-tsv-i yi-tsi-v-s-ga, na-s-gi tsi-v-e-lv-hi ni-hi ge-sv nv-da-yu-li-s-do-ta-nv-gi tsi-v-e-lv-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv a-ga-ta-hv-i;

080211.english: Lest Satan should get an advantage of us: for we are not ignorant of his devices.
080211.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᎩᎾ ᎢᎩᎶᏄᎮᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ; ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏱᎩᎪᏁᎸ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᎵᏙᎲᎢ.
080211.phonetic: Na-s-gi A-s-gi-na i-gi-lo-nu-he-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na; v-tla-ye-no yi-gi-go-ne-lv na-s-gi a-da-nv-te-li-do-hv-i.

080212.english: Furthermore, when I came to Troas to preach Christ's gospel, and a door was opened unto me of the Lord,
080212.cherokee: ᎠᎴᏬ ᏠᎠᏏ ᏗᎩᎷᏨ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎠᏆᎵᏥᏙᏂᎸ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᎩᏍᏚᎩᎡᎸ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ,
080212.phonetic: A-le-wo Tlo-a-si di-gi-lu-tsv o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li a-qua-li-tsi-do-ni-lv, a-le ga-lo-hi-s-di-yi a-gi-s-du-gi-e-lv U-gv-wi-yu-hi,

080213.english: I had no rest in my spirit, because I found not Titus my brother: but taking my leave of them, I went from thence into Macedonia.
080213.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᏙᎯ ᎬᏆᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗ ᏱᎨᏎ ᏗᏆᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬᎩ ᏓᏓᏏ ᎥᎩᏅᏟ ᏂᏥᏩᏛᎲᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎥᎦᏥᏴᏕᏨᎩᏃ ᎾᎿ ᎭᎠᏆᏂᎩᏒᎩ ᎹᏏᏙᏂ ᏩᎩᎷᏨᎩ.
080213.phonetic: V-tla do-hi gv-qua-da-nv-da-di-s-di yi-ge-se di-qua-da-nv-dv-i, nv-da-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv-gi Da-da-si v-gi-nv-tli ni-tsi-wa-dv-hv-na ge-sv-i; v-ga-tsi-yv-de-tsv-gi-no na-hna A-qua-ni-gi-sv-gi Ma-si-do-ni wa-gi-lu-tsv-gi.

080214.english: Now thanks be unto God, which always causeth us to triumph in Christ, and maketh manifest the savour of his knowledge by us in every place.
080214.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎠᎵᎮᎵᏤᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎢᎦᎵᎮᎵᏍᏗᏱ ᏥᏂᎬᏁᎭ ᎢᎦᏓᎵᏁᎯᏛ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎡᏓᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏛᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏥᏂᎬᏁᎭ ᎦᏩᏒᎬ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎠᏥᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏴ ᎢᎬᏗᏍᎬ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏕᎨᏌᏗᏒᎢ.
080214.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no a-li-he-li-tse-di ge-se-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi na-s-gi ni-go-hi-lv i-ga-li-he-li-s-di-yi tsi-ni-gv-ne-ha i-ga-da-li-ne-hi-dv u-gv-wa-li Ga-lo-ne-dv e-da-li-s-ga-s-do-dv-i, a-le gv-ni-ge-sv tsi-ni-gv-ne-ha ga-wa-sv-gv u-wa-sv a-tsi-ga-do-v-hi-s-di ge-sv a-yv i-gv-di-s-gv ni-ga-v de-ge-sa-di-sv-i.

080215.english: For we are unto God a sweet savour of Christ, in them that are saved, and in them that perish:
080215.cherokee: ᎠᏴᏰᏃ ᎤᎦᎾᏍᏛ ᎦᏩᏒᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏪᏩᏒᎢᏍᏗ ᏃᏣᎵᏍᏗᎭ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏥᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏂᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᏥᎩ.
080215.phonetic: A-yv-ye-no u-ga-na-s-dv ga-wa-sv-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi u-we-wa-sv-i-s-di no-tsa-li-s-di-ha Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li-ga, na-s-gi ge-tsi-s-de-lv-di tsi-gi, a-le na-s-gi tsu-ni-yo-hu-hi-s-di tsi-gi.

080216.english: To the one we are the savour of death unto death; and to the other the savour of life unto life. And who is sufficient for these things?
080216.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏑᎾᏓᎴᎩ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏓᎯᎯ ᎦᏩᏒᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᎯᎯ ᏂᏙᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᎭ; ᎠᏂᏐᎢᏃ ᎠᏓᏛᏂᏗᏍᎩ ᎦᏩᏒᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏅᏂᏗᏍᎩ ᏂᏙᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᎭ.  ᎦᎪᏃ ᏰᎵ ᎦᏰᎦᎨᏅᏗᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
080216.phonetic: Na-s-gi su-na-da-le-gi ge-sv a-da-hi-hi ga-wa-sv-gi na-s-gi u-ni-hi-hi ni-do-tsa-li-s-da-ne-ha; a-ni-so-i-no a-da-dv-ni-di-s-gi ga-wa-sv-gi na-s-gi u-nv-ni-di-s-gi ni-do-tsa-li-s-da-ne-ha.  Ga-go-no ye-li ga-ye-ga-ge-nv-di-s-di hi-a na-s-gi di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv-i.

080217.english: For we are not as many, which corrupt the word of God: but as of sincerity, but as of God, in the sight of God speak we in Christ.
080217.cherokee: ᎥᏣᏰᏃ ᏧᏂᏣᏔᏉ ᏥᏄᎾᏍᏗ ᏱᏃᎦᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏂᏲᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ; ᏃᎦᏠᎾᏍᏛᎾᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒ ᏦᏨᏗᏍᎪᎢ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏥᏂᎬᏂᏏᏍᎪ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏔᎲ ᎣᏥᏁᎢᏍᏗ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ.
080217.phonetic: V-tsa-ye-no tsu-ni-tsa-ta-quo tsi-nu-na-s-di yi-no-ga-s-di, na-s-gi a-ni-yo-s-di-s-gi ka-no-he-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga; no-ga-tlo-na-s-dv-na-s-gi-ni ge-sv tso-tsv-di-s-go-i, U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni tsi-ni-gv-ni-si-s-go na-s-gi-ya-i, U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ga-ta-hv o-tsi-ne-i-s-di Ga-lo-ne-dv.

080301.english: Do we begin again to commend ourselves? or need we, as some others, epistles of commendation to you, or letters of commendation from you?
080301.cherokee: ᏥᎪ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎣᏣᎴᏂ ᎣᎬᏒ ᎣᏣᏓᎸᏉᏗᎭ?  ᏥᎪᎨ ᎠᏎ ᏫᏗᏨᏃᎮᏗ ᏃᎦᎵᏍᏓᏁᎭ, ᎪᏪᎵ ᎣᎩᎸᏉᏗᏍᎩ ᎩᎶ ᏥᏄᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᎰᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎯ ᏗᏍᎩᏅᏁᎸᎯ ᏍᎩᎸᏉᏗᏍᎩ?
080301.phonetic: Tsi-go ta-li-ne o-tsa-le-ni o-gv-sv o-tsa-da-lv-quo-di-ha?  tsi-go-ge a-se wi-di-tsv-no-he-di no-ga-li-s-da-ne-ha, go-we-li o-gi-lv-quo-di-s-gi gi-lo tsi-nu-na-li-s-da-ne-ho-i, a-le ni-hi di-s-gi-nv-ne-lv-hi s-gi-lv-quo-di-s-gi?

080302.english: Ye are our epistle written in our hearts, known and read of all men:
080302.cherokee: ᏂᎯ ᎪᏪᎵ ᎣᎦᏤᎵᎦ, ᏥᎪᏪᎳ ᏦᎩᎾᏫᎯ, ᎾᏂᎥ ᏴᏫ ᏣᏂᎦᏔᎭ ᎠᎴ ᏣᏂᎪᎵᏰᎠ.
080302.phonetic: Ni-hi go-we-li o-ga-tse-li-ga, tsi-go-we-la tso-gi-na-wi-hi, na-ni-v yv-wi tsa-ni-ga-ta-ha a-le tsa-ni-go-li-ye-a.

080303.english: Forasmuch as ye are manifestly declared to be the epistle of Christ ministered by us, written not with ink, but with the Spirit of the living God; not in tables of stone, but in fleshy tables of the heart.
080303.cherokee: ᎬᏂᎨᏒᎢᏳ ᎢᏰᏨᏁᎸᎯ ᏂᎯ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎪᏪᎵ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᏴ ᏦᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᎯ, ᎪᏪᎳᏅᎯ ᎪᏪᎶᏗ ᎬᏔᏅᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎠᏓᏅᏙᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎬᏔᏅᎯ; ᎥᏝ ᏅᏲᎯ ᏗᎪᏪᎶᏗᏱ ᏗᎪᏪᎳᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᎤᏇᏓᎵᏍᎩᏂ ᎨᏒ ᏗᎪᏪᎶᏗᏱ ᎣᎾᏫᏱ.
080303.phonetic: Gv-ni-ge-sv-i-yu i-ye-tsv-ne-lv-hi ni-hi Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li go-we-li ge-sv-i, a-yv tso-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-hi, go-we-la-nv-hi go-we-lo-di gv-ta-nv-hi ni-ge-sv-na, A-da-nv-do-s-gi-ni U-ne-la-nv-hi gv-ni-dv u-tse-li gv-ta-nv-hi; v-tla nv-yo-hi di-go-we-lo-di-yi di-go-we-la-nv-hi yi-gi, u-que-da-li-s-gi-ni ge-sv di-go-we-lo-di-yi o-na-wi-yi.

080304.english: And such trust have we through Christ to God-ward:
080304.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏄᏍᏗ ᏱᏣᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ.
080304.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no nu-s-di yi-tsa-li-s-ga-s-do-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi Ga-lo-ne-dv i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv.

080305.english: Not that we are sufficient of ourselves to think any thing as of ourselves; but our sufficiency is of God;
080305.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎣᎬᏒ ᎨᏒ ᏰᎵ ᎦᏲᎦᏓᏅᏖᏗ ᏱᎩ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎣᎬᏒᏉ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏛᏓᎴᎲᏍᎩ, ᏰᎵᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᎦᏲᎦᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏱ ᏗᏓᎴᎲᏍᎦ.
080305.phonetic: V-tla-s-gi-ni-no-nv o-gv-sv ge-sv ye-li ga-yo-ga-da-nv-te-di yi-gi go-hu-s-di o-gv-sv-quo ge-sv nv-dv-da-le-hv-s-gi, ye-li-quo-s-gi-ni i-ga-yo-ga-dv-ne-di ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi-yi di-da-le-hv-s-ga.

080306.english: Who also hath made us able ministers of the new testament; not of the letter, but of the spirit: for the letter killeth, but the spirit giveth life.
080306.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏰᎵ ᎢᎦᏲᎦᏛᏁᏗ ᏥᏃᎬᏁᎸ ᏦᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᎾᎿᎭᎢᏤ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏓᏠᎯᏍᏛᎢ; ᎥᏝ ᎠᏗᎾ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎪᏪᎸᎢ, ᎠᏓᏅᏙᏍᎩᏂ ᏓᏕᏲᎲᏍᎬᎢ; ᏄᏍᏛᏰᏃ ᎪᏪᎸ ᎠᏓᎯᎰᏉ, ᎠᏓᏅᏙᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏓᏛᏂᏗᏍᎪᎢ.
080306.phonetic: Na-s-gi na-s-quo ye-li i-ga-yo-ga-dv-ne-di tsi-no-gv-ne-lv tso-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di-yi na-hna i-tse ka-no-he-dv da-tlo-hi-s-dv-i; v-tla a-di-na nu-s-dv go-we-lv-i, a-da-nv-do-s-gi-ni da-de-yo-hv-s-gv-i; nu-s-dv-ye-no go-we-lv a-da-hi-ho-quo, a-da-nv-do-s-gi-ni a-da-dv-ni-di-s-go-i.

080307.english: But if the ministration of death, written and engraven in stones, was glorious, so that the children of Israel could not stedfastly behold the face of Moses for the glory of his countenance; which glory was to be done away:
080307.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎠᏓᎯᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᏥᎪᏪᎴ ᏣᏰᎶᎴ ᏅᏲᎯ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏏᎵ ᏧᏪᏥ ᎪᎯᏛ ᏗᎬᏩᎾᎧᏃᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎨᏎ ᎼᏏ ᎤᎧᏛᎢ, ᏥᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨ ᏗᎬᏩᎸᏌᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎧᏛᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᎲᏍᏗᏉ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ;
080307.phonetic: I-yu-no di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di a-da-hi-hi ge-sv u-gv-wa-li tsi-go-we-le tsa-ye-lo-le nv-yo-hi ga-lv-quo-di-yu tsi-ge-se-i, na-s-gi I-si-li tsu-we-tsi go-hi-dv di-gv-wa-na-ka-no-di ni-ge-sv-na tsi-ge-se Mo-si u-ka-dv-i, tsi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge di-gv-wa-lv-sa-dv ge-sv u-ka-dv-i; na-s-gi a-hv-s-di-quo tsi-ge-se-i;

080308.english: How shall not the ministration of the spirit be rather glorious?
080308.cherokee: ᏝᏍᎪ Ꮀ ᏳᎬᏫᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎨᏒ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ?
080308.phonetic: Tla-s-go ho yu-gv-wi-yu-se-s-di ga-lv-quo-di-yu yi-ge-se-s-di A-da-nv-do u-gv-wa-li ge-sv di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di?

080309.english: For if the ministration of condemnation be glory, much more doth the ministration of righteousness exceed in glory.
080309.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏗᏓᏚᎪᏓᏁᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎦᎾᏄᏫᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏱᎩ, Ꮀ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎭ ᎤᏓᎪᎾᏛᏗ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏚᏓᎴᏍᎩ ᎨᏒ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ.
080309.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di di-da-du-go-da-ne-hi ge-sv ga-na-nu-wi-s-gi ga-lv-quo-di-yu yi-gi, ho u-gv-wi-yu-ha u-da-go-na-dv-di ga-lv-quo-di-yu a-da-du-da-le-s-gi ge-sv di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di.

080310.english: For even that which was made glorious had no glory in this respect, by reason of the glory that excelleth.
080310.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎢᎬᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎨᏎ ᎥᏝ ᎰᏩ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨ ᎬᏩᏓᎪᎾᏛᏛ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᏐᎢ.
080310.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no na-s-quo ga-lv-quo-di-yu i-gv-ne-lv-hi tsi-ge-se v-tla ho-wa ga-lv-quo-di-yu yi-ge-se-i, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge gv-wa-da-go-na-dv-dv ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv so-i.

080311.english: For if that which is done away was glorious, much more that which remaineth is glorious.
080311.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᎲᏛ ᏥᎩ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ, ᎤᏟᎯᏳ ᏭᏓᎪᎾᏛᏗ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏥᏅᏩᏍᏗᏉ.
080311.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no na-s-gi na a-hv-dv tsi-gi ga-lv-quo-di-yu yi-ge-se-i, u-tli-hi-yu wu-da-go-na-dv-di ga-lv-quo-di-yu na-s-gi na tsi-nv-wa-s-di-quo.

080312.english: Seeing then that we have such hope, we use great plainness of speech:
080312.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ Ꮎ ᏥᏄᏍᏗ ᎤᏚᎩ ᏦᎬᎭ, ᎤᏣᏘ ᎠᎯᏗᏳ ᎦᎪᎵᏍᏗ ᎣᏥᏬᏂᎭ;
080312.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no na tsi-nu-s-di u-du-gi tso-gv-ha, u-tsa-ti a-hi-di-yu ga-go-li-s-di o-tsi-wo-ni-ha;

080313.english: And not as Moses, which put a vail over his face, that the children of Israel could not stedfastly look to the end of that which is abolished:
080313.cherokee: ᎢᏝᏃ ᎼᏏ ᏥᏄᏛᏁᎴ [ᏱᏃᏣᏛᏁᎭ] ᏧᎵᎬᏚᎳᏁ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏏᎵ ᏧᏪᏥ ᏫᏗᎬᏩᎾᎧᏃᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏩᏍᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᎲᏛ ᏥᎩ.
080313.phonetic: I-tla-no Mo-si tsi-nu-dv-ne-le [yi-no-tsa-dv-ne-ha] tsu-li-gv-du-la-ne na-s-gi I-si-li tsu-we-tsi wi-di-gv-wa-na-ka-no-di ni-ge-sv-na i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi wa-s-dv na-s-gi na a-hv-dv tsi-gi.

080314.english: But their minds were blinded: for until this day remaineth the same vail untaken away in the reading of the old testament; which vail is done away in Christ.
080314.cherokee: ᏚᎾᏓᏅᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᏧᏍᎦᏃᎵᏳ ᎨᏎᎢ; ᎪᎯᏰᏃ ᎢᏯᏍᏗ ᏅᏩᏍᏗᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᎵᎬᏚᎶ ᎠᎲᏛ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᏳᏃ ᏓᏂᎪᎵᏯ ᎤᏪᏘ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏓᏠᎯᏍᏛ ᎪᏪᎸᎢ; ᎦᎶᏁᏛᏰᏃ ᏂᎬᏂᏏᏍᎪ ᎠᎲᏛ ᏂᎨᏐᎢ.
080314.phonetic: Du-na-da-nv-dv-s-gi-ni tsu-s-ga-no-li-yu ge-se-i; go-hi-ye-no i-ya-s-di nv-wa-s-di-quo na-s-gi na a-li-gv-du-lo a-hv-dv ni-ge-sv-na i-yu-no da-ni-go-li-ya u-we-ti ka-no-he-dv da-tlo-hi-s-dv go-we-lv-i; Ga-lo-ne-dv-ye-no ni-gv-ni-si-s-go a-hv-dv ni-ge-so-i.

080315.english: But even unto this day, when Moses is read, the vail is upon their heart.
080315.cherokee: ᎩᎳᎯᏳᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎪᎯ ᎢᎦ ᎢᏯᏍᏗ ᎢᏳᏃ ᎼᏏ ᏓᏥᎪᎵᏯ ᎠᎵᎬᏚᎶ ᏧᏂᎾᏫ ᏚᏭᏢᏙᎢ.
080315.phonetic: Gi-la-hi-yu-quo-s-gi-ni go-hi i-ga i-ya-s-di i-yu-no Mo-si da-tsi-go-li-ya a-li-gv-du-lo tsu-ni-na-wi du-wu-tlv-do-i.

080316.english: Nevertheless when it shall turn to the Lord, the vail shall be taken away.
080316.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ, ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯᏱ ᏫᏓᎦᏔᎲᏍᏔᏅᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᎵᎬᏚᎶ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎢᎬᏁᏗ ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏔᏂ.
080316.phonetic: A-se-s-gi-ni-no-nv, U-gv-wi-yu-hi-yi wi-da-ga-ta-hv-s-ta-nv-ha, na-s-gi na a-li-gv-du-lo i-yv-dv i-gv-ne-di nv-da-ga-li-s-ta-ni.

080317.english: Now the Lord is that Spirit: and where the Spirit of the Lord is, there is liberty.
080317.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ; ᎢᎸᎯᏢᏃ ᏄᏛᎿᎭᏕᎬ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ, ᎾᎿᎭᎡᎭ ᎣᏩᏒ ᎣᏓᏤᎵᎦᏯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
080317.phonetic: A-le U-gv-wi-yu-hi na-s-gi na A-da-nv-do; i-lv-hi-tlv-no nu-dv-hna-de-gv U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-tse-li A-da-nv-do, na-hna e-ha o-wa-sv o-da-tse-li-ga-ya ge-sv-i.

080318.english: But we all, with open face beholding as in a glass the glory of the Lord, are changed into the same image from glory to glory, even as by the Spirit of the Lord.
080318.cherokee: ᎠᏴᏍᎩᏂ ᏂᏗᎥ ᏂᏗᎦᎵᎬᏚᎸᎾ ᎠᏓᎨᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏕᏓᎧᏂᏍᎬ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎢᏓᏓᏁᏟᏴᎭ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏂᏓᎵᏍᏗᎭ, ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎩᎲ ᎧᏁᏉᏤᎦ, ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏓᏅᏙ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ.
080318.phonetic: A-yv-s-gi-ni ni-di-v ni-di-ga-li-gv-du-lv-na a-da-ge-di-yi na-s-gi-ya de-da-ka-ni-s-gv ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-tse-li-ga, i-da-da-ne-tli-yv-ha na-s-gi-ya nu-s-dv ni-da-li-s-di-ha, ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv i-gi-hv ka-ne-quo-tse-ga, U-gv-wi-yu-hi U-da-nv-do i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv na-s-gi-ya-i.

080401.english: Therefore seeing we have this ministry, as we have received mercy, we faint not;
080401.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏦᎩᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎣᎩᏙᎵᏨᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᏱᏙᎩᏯᏪᎦ;
080401.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di, na-s-gi hi-a di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di tso-gi-ha, na-s-gi-ya o-gi-do-li-tsv-i, v-tla yi-do-gi-ya-we-ga;

080402.english: But have renounced the hidden things of dishonesty, not walking in craftiness, nor handling the word of God deceitfully; but by manifestation of the truth commending ourselves to every man's conscience in the sight of God.
080402.cherokee: ᏙᎩᏲᏒᏍᎩᏂ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎬᏍᎦᎵ ᎤᏕᎰᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᏲᏤᏙᎭ ᎠᏏᎾᏌᏅᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎣᎦᏠᎾᏍᏛ ᏱᏙᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎭ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎬᏂᎨᏒᏍᎩᏂ ᏃᏨᏁᎲ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎪᎩᎸᏉᏙᏗᏱ ᏃᏨᏁᎭ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏴᏫ ᏚᎾᏓᏅᏛ ᎬᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏔᎲᎢ.
080402.phonetic: Do-gi-yo-sv-s-gi-ni tsu-da-le-nv-dv gv-s-ga-li u-de-ho-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, a-le v-tla yo-tse-do-ha a-si-na-sa-nv-i-s-di ge-sv-i, v-tla a-le o-ga-tlo-na-s-dv yi-do-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ha ka-no-he-dv ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga, gv-ni-ge-sv-s-gi-ni no-tsv-ne-hv ga-ye-go-gi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i, go-gi-lv-quo-do-di-yi no-tsv-ne-ha na-ni-v yv-wi du-na-da-nv-dv gv-di U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ga-ta-hv-i.

080403.english: But if our gospel be hid, it is hid to them that are lost:
080403.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎣᎦᏤᎵ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎬᏍᎦᎵ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎨᏥᏛᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎨᎬᏍᎦᎳᏁᎸ.
080403.phonetic: I-yu-s-gi-ni o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv o-ga-tse-li na-s-quo gv-s-ga-li i-ge-se-s-di, na-s-gi na ge-tsi-dv-do-di ge-sv ge-gv-s-ga-la-ne-lv.

080404.english: In whom the god of this world hath blinded the minds of them which believe not, lest the light of the glorious gospel of Christ, who is the image of God, should shine unto them.
080404.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎾᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎬᎾ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏰᎸᎯ ᏚᎵᏏᎲᏍᏓᏁᎸ ᏚᎾᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏂᎸᏌᏓᏕᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᎦ-ᎦᏛ ᎤᏘᏍᏛ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏥᎩ.
080404.phonetic: Na-s-gi na na-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gv-na na-s-gi hi-a e-lo-hi u-ne-la-nv-hi u-ye-lv-hi du-li-si-hv-s-da-ne-lv du-na-da-nv-dv-i, na-s-gi tsu-ni-lv-sa-da-de-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na i-ga--ga-dv u-ti-s-dv ga-lv-quo-di-yu o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li-ga, na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi na-s-gi-ya tsi-gi.

080405.english: For we preach not ourselves, but Christ Jesus the Lord; and ourselves your servants for Jesus' sake.
080405.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎣᎬᏒ ᏲᏣᏓᏃᎮᎭ ᎣᏣᎵᏥᏙᎲᏍᎬᎢ, ᎦᎶᏁᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᏥᏌ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ; ᎠᏴᏃ ᏂᎯ ᎣᎩᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬᎢ.
080405.phonetic: V-tla-ye-no o-gv-sv yo-tsa-da-no-he-ha o-tsa-li-tsi-do-hv-s-gv-i, Ga-lo-ne-dv-s-gi-ni Tsi-sa U-gv-wi-yu-hi; a-yv-no ni-hi o-gi-nv-si-da-s-di ge-sv na-s-gi Tsi-sa nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv-i.

080406.english: For God, who commanded the light to shine out of darkness, hath shined in our hearts, to give the light of the knowledge of the glory of God in the face of Jesus Christ.
080406.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏧᏁᏤ ᎢᎦᎦᏘ ᎤᎵᏏᎬ ᏧᎸᏌᏓᏗᏍᏗᏱ, ᏚᎸᏌᏓᏗᎸ ᏦᎩᎾᏫᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᎩᏁᏗᏱ ᎢᎦ-ᎦᏘ ᎠᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏙᏗ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᎧᏛ ᏨᏗᏓᎴᎲᏍᎦ.
080406.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no na-s-gi na tsu-ne-tse i-ga-ga-ti u-li-si-gv tsu-lv-sa-da-di-s-di-yi, du-lv-sa-da-di-lv tso-gi-na-wi-yi, na-s-gi o-gi-ne-di-yi i-ga--ga-ti a-ga-do-v-hi-s-do-di ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga, na-s-gi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv u-ka-dv tsv-di-da-le-hv-s-ga.

080407.english: But we have this treasure in earthen vessels, that the excellency of the power may be of God, and not of us.
080407.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᎬᏩᎶᏗ ᎦᏓᏉ ᏗᎪᏢᏔᏅᎯ ᏕᎩᎶᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ, ᎥᏝᏃ ᎠᏴ.
080407.phonetic: A-se-no hi-a na-s-gi tsu-gv-wa-lo-di ga-da-quo di-go-tlv-ta-nv-hi de-gi-lo-di, na-s-gi u-tsa-ti u-li-ni-gi-dv ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi, v-tla-no a-yv.

080408.english: We are troubled on every side, yet not distressed; we are perplexed, but not in despair;
080408.cherokee: ᎣᎦᏕᏯᏙᏗᎭ ᎬᏩᏚᏫᏛᏉ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏲᎩᎩᎸᏍᎦ; ᎤᏪᎵᎯᏍᏗ ᎣᎦᏓᏅᏔᏩᏕᎦ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎣᎦᎵᎲᏲᎵᎸᎯ ᏱᎩ;
080408.phonetic: O-ga-de-ya-do-di-ha gv-wa-du-wi-dv-quo, a-se-no v-tla yo-gi-gi-lv-s-ga; u-we-li-hi-s-di o-ga-da-nv-ta-wa-de-ga, a-se-no v-tla o-ga-li-hv-yo-li-lv-hi yi-gi;

080409.english: Persecuted, but not forsaken; cast down, but not destroyed;
080409.cherokee: ᎤᏲ ᏃᎬᎾᏕᎪᎢ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎣᎬᏕᏨᎯ ᏱᎩ; ᏙᎩᏍᏢᏂᏍᏔᏅ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎣᎩᏛᏔᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ.
080409.phonetic: U-yo no-gv-na-de-go-i, a-se-no v-tla o-gv-de-tsv-hi yi-gi; do-gi-s-tlv-ni-s-ta-nv, a-se-no v-tla o-gi-dv-ta-nv-hi yi-gi.

080410.english: Always bearing about in the body the dying of the Lord Jesus, that the life also of Jesus might be made manifest in our body.
080410.cherokee: ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᏦᏥᏰᎸ ᎣᏥᏱᏙᎰ ᎤᏲᎱᏒ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎬᏅ ᏥᏌ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎠᏴ ᏦᏥᏰᎸᎢ.
080410.phonetic: Ni-go-hi-lv tso-tsi-ye-lv o-tsi-yi-do-ho u-yo-hu-sv U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa, na-s-gi na-s-quo gv-nv Tsi-sa gv-ni-ge-sv i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi a-yv tso-tsi-ye-lv-i.

080411.english: For we which live are alway delivered unto death for Jesus' sake, that the life also of Jesus might be made manifest in our mortal flesh.
080411.cherokee: ᎠᏴᏰᏃ ᏦᏤᎭ ᏂᎪᎯᎸᏉ ᏦᎩᏲᎱᏏᏕᎾ ᏥᏌ ᎣᎩᏍᏛᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏅ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏥᏌ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎠᏴ ᎠᏲᎱᏍᎩ ᎣᎩᏇᏓᎸᎢ.
080411.phonetic: A-yv-ye-no tso-tse-ha ni-go-hi-lv-quo tso-gi-yo-hu-si-de-na Tsi-sa o-gi-s-dv-di-s-gv-i, na-s-gi gv-nv na-s-quo Tsi-sa gv-ni-ge-sv i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi a-yv a-yo-hu-s-gi o-gi-que-da-lv-i.

080412.english: So then death worketh in us, but life in you.
080412.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎣᎩᏱᎵᏙᎭ ᎠᏴ, ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎬᏂᏛ.
080412.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv o-gi-yi-li-do-ha a-yv, ni-hi-s-gi-ni gv-ni-dv.

080413.english: We having the same spirit of faith, according as it is written, I believed, and therefore have I spoken; we also believe, and therefore speak;
080413.cherokee: ᎤᏠᏱᏉ ᏦᎩᎭ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎪᎯᏳᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏥᏂᎬᏅ ᏥᎪᏪᎳ, ᎠᏉᎯᏳᏅ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᎩᏁᏨ; ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎣᏦᎯᏳᎲᏍᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎣᏥᏁᎦ.
080413.phonetic: U-tlo-yi-quo tso-gi-ha a-da-nv-do go-hi-yu-do-di ge-sv-i, hi-a na-s-gi-ya tsi-ni-gv-nv tsi-go-we-la, a-quo-hi-yu-nv, a-le na-s-gi i-yu-s-di a-gi-ne-tsv; a-yv na-s-quo o-tso-hi-yu-hv-s-ga, a-le na-s-gi i-yu-s-di o-tsi-ne-ga.

080414.english: Knowing that he which raised up the Lord Jesus shall raise up us also by Jesus, and shall present us with you.
080414.cherokee: ᎣᏥᎦᏔᎭᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᏧᎴᏔᏅᎯ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏴ ᏥᏌ ᎠᎬᏗᏍᎬ ᏙᏓᏲᎦᎴᏔᏂ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᏂᎯᏃ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᏫᏗᎩᏲᏏᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
080414.phonetic: O-tsi-ga-ta-ha-ye-no na-s-gi na U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa tsu-le-ta-nv-hi, na-s-quo a-yv Tsi-sa a-gv-di-s-gv do-da-yo-ga-le-ta-ni, a-le a-yv ni-hi-no i-tsu-la-ha wi-di-gi-yo-si-hi-s-di ge-se-s-di.

080415.english: For all things are for your sakes, that the abundant grace might through the thanksgiving of many redound to the glory of God.
080415.cherokee: ᏂᎦᏗᏳᏰᏃ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏤᎭ ᏂᎯ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏐᏗᏱ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎦᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᎠᎾᎵᎮᎵᎬᎢ.
080415.phonetic: Ni-ga-di-yu-ye-no tsu-da-le-nv-dv tse-ha ni-hi nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha; na-s-gi u-tsa-ti gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv i-yu-wa-ni-so-di-yi U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tsa-ti ga-lv-quo-do-di i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi u-ni-tsa-ti a-na-li-he-li-gv-i.

080416.english: For which cause we faint not; but though our outward man perish, yet the inward man is renewed day by day.
080416.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏙᎩᏯᏪᎦ; ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎦᏚᎢᏗᏢ ᎡᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎣᎩᏩᎾᎦᎶᏤᎭ, ᎭᏫᏂᏗᏢᏍᎩᏂ ᎡᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎣᎦᎵᏂᎪᎯᏎᎭ ᏂᏓᏙᏓᏈᏒᎢ.
080416.phonetic: Na-s-gi nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha v-tla yi-do-gi-ya-we-ga; u-do-hi-yu-hi-s-gi-ni-no-nv ga-du-i-di-tlv e-hi ge-sv o-gi-wa-na-ga-lo-tse-ha, ha-wi-ni-di-tlv-s-gi-ni e-hi ge-sv o-ga-li-ni-go-hi-se-ha ni-da-do-da-qui-sv-i.

080417.english: For our light affliction, which is but for a moment, worketh for us a far more exceeding and eternal weight of glory;
080417.cherokee: ᎤᏓᏌᎧᏰᏃ ᎣᏥᎩᎵᏲᎬ ᏞᎦᏉ ᏥᎩ ᎣᎩᏩᏛᎡᎭ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᎶᏒᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎢᏳᏓᎨᏛ ᎠᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ;
080417.phonetic: U-da-sa-ka-ye-no o-tsi-gi-li-yo-gv tle-ga-quo tsi-gi o-gi-wa-dv-e-ha u-tsa-ti u-lo-sv-s-ta-nv-hi i-yu-da-ge-dv a-li-s-qua-di-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv-i;

080418.english: While we look not at the things which are seen, but at the things which are not seen: for the things which are seen are temporal; but the things which are not seen are eternal.
080418.cherokee: ᏂᏙᏣᎧᏂᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎬᎪᏩᏛᏗ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ Ꮎ ᏗᎬᎪᏩᏛᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎩ; ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᏗᎬᎪᏩᏛᏗ ᏥᎩ ᏗᎦᎶᏐᎲᏍᎩ; ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ Ꮎ ᏗᎬᎪᏩᏛᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎩ ᏗᎦᎶᏐᎲᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.
080418.phonetic: Ni-do-tsa-ka-ni-s-gv-na ge-sv na-s-gi di-gv-go-wa-dv-di tsi-gi, na-s-gi-s-gi-ni na di-gv-go-wa-dv-di ni-ge-sv-na tsi-gi; na-s-gi-ye-no di-gv-go-wa-dv-di tsi-gi di-ga-lo-so-hv-s-gi; na-s-gi-s-gi-ni na di-gv-go-wa-dv-di ni-ge-sv-na tsi-gi di-ga-lo-so-hv-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na.

080501.english: For we know that if our earthly house of this tabernacle were dissolved, we have a building of God, an house not made with hands, eternal in the heavens.
080501.cherokee: ᎣᏥᎦᏔᎭᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏃ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎡᎯ ᎣᏥᏁᎸ ᎣᎩᎵᏦᏛ ᏳᏲᏨ, ᎣᎩᎭ ᎠᏓᏁᎸ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ, ᎠᏓᏁᎸ ᏧᏬᏱ ᏗᎬᏔᏅᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎠᏁᏍᎨᎲᎯ, ᎠᏲᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎦᎸᎶᎢ ᏗᏓᏁᎸ.
080501.phonetic: O-tsi-ga-ta-ha-ye-no na-s-gi i-yu-no e-lo-hi e-hi o-tsi-ne-lv o-gi-li-tso-dv yu-yo-tsv, o-gi-ha a-da-ne-lv U-ne-la-nv-hi nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi, a-da-ne-lv tsu-wo-yi di-gv-ta-nv-hi ni-ge-sv-na a-ne-s-ge-hv-hi, a-yo-gi ni-ge-sv-na ga-lv-lo-i di-da-ne-lv.

080502.english: For in this we groan, earnestly desiring to be clothed upon with our house which is from heaven:
080502.cherokee: ᎠᏂᏰᏃ ᎣᏥᏯᎥ ᎣᎩᎵᏰᏗᎭ, ᎤᏣᏘ ᎣᎦᏚᎵᎭ ᎣᎦᏄᏬᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎣᏥᏁᎸ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎦᎸᎶ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ;
080502.phonetic: A-ni-ye-no o-tsi-ya-v o-gi-li-ye-di-ha, u-tsa-ti o-ga-du-li-ha o-ga-nu-wo-s-do-di-yi o-tsi-ne-lv na-s-gi na ga-lv-lo nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi;

080503.english: If so be that being clothed we shall not be found naked.
080503.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎰᏩ ᏱᏙᎦᏄᏩᎥ, ᎥᏝ ᏦᎩᏰᎸᎭ ᏱᎦᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
080503.phonetic: I-yu-no ho-wa yi-do-ga-nu-wa-v, v-tla tso-gi-ye-lv-ha yi-ga-ge-se-s-di.

080504.english: For we that are in this tabernacle do groan, being burdened: not for that we would be unclothed, but clothed upon, that mortality might be swallowed up of life.
080504.cherokee: ᎠᏴᏰᏃ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏂ ᎦᎵᏦᏛ ᏦᏥᏯᎠ ᎣᎩᎵᏰᏗᎭ, ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎦᎨᏛ ᏃᎦᏛᎿᎭᏕᎬᎢ; ᎥᏝ ᏦᎩᏄᏪᏍᏗᏱ ᎣᎦᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᏱᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ; ᏦᎩᏄᏬᏍᏗᏱᏍᎩᏂ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏲᎱᏍᎩ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏥᎩᏍᏗᏱ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎤᎩᏐᎲᏍᏗᏱ.
080504.phonetic: A-yv-ye-no hi-a a-ni ga-li-tso-dv tso-tsi-ya-a o-gi-li-ye-di-ha, ni-ga-li-s-do-di-ha ga-ge-dv no-ga-dv-hna-de-gv-i; v-tla tso-gi-nu-we-s-di-yi o-ga-du-li-s-gv yi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha; tso-gi-nu-wo-s-di-yi-s-gi-ni; na-s-gi a-yo-hu-s-gi ge-sv a-tsi-gi-s-di-yi gv-ni-dv u-gi-so-hv-s-di-yi.

080505.english: Now he that hath wrought us for the selfsame thing is God, who also hath given unto us the earnest of the Spirit.
080505.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ Ꮎ ᎢᎪᏢᏅᎯ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏦᎩᏁᎸ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎠᎦᏗᏗᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
080505.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no na i-go-tlv-nv-hi hi-a na-s-gi u-gv-wa-li ge-sv na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi, na-s-gi na-s-quo tso-gi-ne-lv A-da-nv-do a-ga-di-di-s-do-di ge-sv-i.

080506.english: Therefore we are always confident, knowing that, whilst we are at home in the body, we are absent from the Lord:
080506.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎤᎦᎵᏍᏗ ᎣᎦᏓᏅᏔᏩᏕᎪᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎣᏥᏁᎸ ᎠᏂ ᏦᏥᏰᎸᎢ, ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎡᎲ ᎣᎩᎪᏁᎸᎢ;
080506.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di ni-go-hi-lv u-ga-li-s-di o-ga-da-nv-ta-wa-de-go-i, a-le o-tsi-ga-ta-ha na-s-gi ni-go-hi-lv o-tsi-ne-lv a-ni tso-tsi-ye-lv-i, U-gv-wi-yu-hi e-hv o-gi-go-ne-lv-i;

080507.english: (For we walk by faith, not by sight:)
080507.cherokee: ᎪᎯᏳᏗᏰᏃ ᎨᏒ ᎣᏨᏗᎭ ᎣᏤᏙᎲᎢ, ᎥᏝᏃ ᎠᎪᏩᏛᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
080507.phonetic: Go-hi-yu-di-ye-no ge-sv o-tsv-di-ha o-tse-do-hv-i, v-tla-no a-go-wa-dv-di ge-sv-i.

080508.english: We are confident, I say, and willing rather to be absent from the body, and to be present with the Lord.
080508.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᎦᎵᏍᏗ ᎣᎦᏓᏅᏔᏩᏕᎪᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏟ ᎦᏲᎩᏰᎸᏗ ᎠᏰᎸ ᎣᎩᎪᏁᎶᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎡᎲ ᏬᎦᏁᎳᏗᏍᏗᏱ.
080508.phonetic: A-le u-ga-li-s-di o-ga-da-nv-ta-wa-de-go-i, a-le u-tli ga-yo-gi-ye-lv-di a-ye-lv o-gi-go-ne-lo-i-s-di-yi, a-le U-gv-wi-yu-hi e-hv wo-ga-ne-la-di-s-di-yi.

080509.english: Wherefore we labour, that, whether present or absent, we may be accepted of him.
080509.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎣᏣᎵᏂᎬᏁᎭ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᎾᎿᎭᏱᏬᏥᏁᎳ, ᎠᎴ ᏲᎩᎪᏁᎳ, ᏦᎦᏓᏂᎸᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
080509.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di o-tsa-li-ni-gv-ne-ha, na-s-quo na-hna yi-wo-tsi-ne-la, a-le yo-gi-go-ne-la, tso-ga-da-ni-lv-i-s-di-yi i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

080510.english: For we must all appear before the judgment seat of Christ; that every one may receive the things done in his body, according to that he hath done, whether it be good or bad.
080510.cherokee: ᎠᏴᏰᏃ ᏂᏗᎥ ᎢᎬᏱᏗᏢ ᏫᎩᎾᏄᎪᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏧᏭᎪᏙᏗᏱ ᎦᏍᎩᎸᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏗᎥ ᎢᏗᏏᏴᏫᎭ ᎡᎩᏁᏗᏱ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏕᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸ ᏗᏗᏰᎸ ᎬᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎦᏛᏁᎵᏙᎸᎢ, ᎣᏏᏳ ᏱᎾᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏲ ᏱᎾᎩ.
080510.phonetic: A-yv-ye-no ni-di-v i-gv-yi-di-tlv wi-gi-na-nu-go-i-s-di ge-se-s-di Ga-lo-ne-dv tsu-wu-go-do-di-yi ga-s-gi-lv-i; na-s-gi ni-di-v i-di-si-yv-wi-ha e-gi-ne-di-yi nu-s-dv de-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv di-di-ye-lv gv-di, na-s-gi-ya ni-ga-dv-ne-li-do-lv-i, o-si-yu yi-na-gi, a-le u-yo yi-na-gi.

080511.english: Knowing therefore the terror of the Lord, we persuade men; but we are made manifest unto God; and I trust also are made manifest in your consciences.
080511.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏦᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᎦᎾᏰᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᏙᏥᏍᏗᏰᏗ ᏴᏫ; ᎠᎴ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏃᏣᎵᏍᏗᎭ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏔᎲᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎠᏋᎭ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏯᏆᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎯ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛᎢ.
080511.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no tso-tsi-ga-ta-ha ga-na-ye-i-s-di ge-sv U-gv-wi-yu-hi, do-tsi-s-di-ye-di yv-wi; a-le gv-ni-ge-sv no-tsa-li-s-di-ha U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ga-ta-hv-i; a-le u-du-gi a-quv-ha gv-ni-ge-sv i-ya-qua-li-s-do-di-yi na-s-quo ni-hi de-tsa-da-nv-dv-i.

080512.english: For we commend not ourselves again unto you, but give you occasion to glory on our behalf, that ye may have somewhat to answer them which glory in appearance, and not in heart.
080512.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏂᎯ ᏍᎩᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏲᏥᏂᎳᏗᎭ; ᎢᏨᏁᎭᏍᎩᏂ ᏍᎩᎸᏉᏙᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏳᏂᎭ ᏧᎾᏬᎯᎵᏴᏍᏓᏁᏗ, ᎢᏨᏰᎵᏎᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏚᏉ ᎡᎯ ᎠᎾᏢᏉᏙᏗᏍᎩ ᏥᎩ, ᏙᏧᎾᏓᏅᏛᏃ ᎠᎾᏢᏉᏙᏗᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.
080512.phonetic: V-tla-ye-no ni-hi s-gi-lv-quo-di-yu i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi yo-tsi-ni-la-di-ha; i-tsv-ne-ha-s-gi-ni s-gi-lv-quo-do-di-yi, na-s-gi go-hu-s-di yu-ni-ha tsu-na-wo-hi-li-yv-s-da-ne-di, i-tsv-ye-li-se-ha, na-s-gi ga-du-quo e-hi a-na-tlv-quo-do-di-s-gi tsi-gi, do-tsu-na-da-nv-dv-no a-na-tlv-quo-do-di-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na.

080513.english: For whether we be beside ourselves, it is to God: or whether we be sober, it is for your cause.
080513.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᏱᏙᎩᎸᏃᏗᎭ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏉ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ; ᎢᏳ ᎠᎴ ᏙᎯ ᏱᏙᎦᏓᏅᏔ, ᏂᎯᏉ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ.
080513.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no yi-do-gi-lv-no-di-ha, U-ne-la-nv-hi-quo nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha; i-yu a-le do-hi yi-do-ga-da-nv-ta, ni-hi-quo nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha.

080514.english: For the love of Christ constraineth us; because we thus judge, that if one died for all, then were all dead:
080514.cherokee: ᎦᎶᏁᏛᏰᏃ ᎤᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏙᎦᏘᏁᎦ; ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᏄᏍᏗ ᏙᏧᎪᏗᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎠᏏᏴᏫ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏱᏚᏲᎱᎯᏎᎸ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏚᏂᏲᎱᏒᎩ;
080514.phonetic: Ga-lo-ne-dv-ye-no u-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv do-ga-ti-ne-ga; hi-a-ye-no nu-s-di do-tsu-go-di-ha, na-s-gi, i-yu-no a-si-yv-wi na-ni-v yi-du-yo-hu-hi-se-lv, hna-quo na-s-gi na-ni-v du-ni-yo-hu-sv-gi;

080515.english: And that he died for all, that they which live should not henceforth live unto themselves, but unto him which died for them, and rose again.
080515.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏚᏲᎱᎯᏎᎴᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏗᏅᏃᏛ ᏥᎩ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎤᏅᏒᏉ ᎤᎾᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎤᎾᎴᏂᏓᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ Ꮎ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᏧᏲᎱᎯᏎᎸᎯ ᎠᎴ ᏧᎴᎯᏌᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ.
080515.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no na-ni-v du-yo-hu-hi-se-le-i, na-s-gi na di-nv-no-dv tsi-gi go-hi ge-sv i-yu-da-le-nv-dv u-nv-sv-quo u-na-tse-li u-gv-wa-li u-na-le-ni-da-s-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na, na-s-gi-s-gi-ni na u-tse-li u-gv-wa-li tsu-yo-hu-hi-se-lv-hi a-le tsu-le-hi-sa-nv-hi tsi-gi.

080516.english: Wherefore henceforth know we no man after the flesh: yea, though we have known Christ after the flesh, yet now henceforth know we him no more.
080516.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏏᏗ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᏲᏥᎦᏔᎭ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎠᎦᏔᎲᎢ.  ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᏳ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎣᏥᎦᏙᎥᏒᎯ ᏱᎩ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎠᎦᏔᎲ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎥᏝ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏲᏥᎦᏔᎭ.
080516.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-si-di go-hi ge-sv i-yu-da-le-nv-dv v-tla gi-lo yo-tsi-ga-ta-ha na-s-gi-ya u-que-da-li a-ga-ta-hv-i.  A-le na-s-quo i-yu Ga-lo-ne-dv o-tsi-ga-do-v-sv-hi yi-gi u-que-da-li a-ga-ta-hv na-s-gi-ya-i, a-se-no go-hi ge-sv i-yu-da-le-nv-dv v-tla hna-quo yo-tsi-ga-ta-ha.

080517.english: Therefore if any man be in Christ, he is a new creature: old things are passed away; behold, all things are become new.
080517.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏏᏗ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎦᎶᏁᏛᏱ ᎠᏯᎡᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏤ ᎾᎬᏁᎸ; ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎤᏪᏘ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎶᏐᏅ; ᎬᏂᏳᏉ, ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎢᏤ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ.
080517.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-si-di, i-yu-no gi-lo Ga-lo-ne-dv-yi a-ya-e-s-di na-s-gi i-tse na-gv-ne-lv; tsu-da-le-nv-dv u-we-ti ge-sv u-lo-so-nv; gv-ni-yu-quo, ni-ga-di-yu tsu-da-le-nv-dv i-tse nu-li-s-ta-nv.

080518.english: And all things are of God, who hath reconciled us to himself by Jesus Christ, and hath given to us the ministry of reconciliation;
080518.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏙᎯ ᏥᏄᏩᏁᎸ ᎡᏗᏍᎦᎩ ᎨᏒ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᎬᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᎣᎦᏒᎦᎶᏔᏅ ᏙᎯ ᎢᎬᏁᎯ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ;
080518.phonetic: A-le ni-ga-di-yu tsu-da-le-nv-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv, na-s-gi do-hi tsi-nu-wa-ne-lv e-di-s-ga-gi ge-sv Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv a-gv-di-s-gv-i, a-le a-yv o-ga-sv-ga-lo-ta-nv do-hi i-gv-ne-hi di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di;

080519.english: To wit, that God was in Christ, reconciling the world unto himself, not imputing their trespasses unto them; and hath committed unto us the word of reconciliation.
080519.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏙᎯ ᏂᎬᏁᎲᎩ ᎡᎶᎯ ᎬᏩᏍᎦᎩ ᎨᏒ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎬᏗᏍᎬᎩ, ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨᎯ ᏂᏓᏰᎸᎾᏁᎲᎾ; ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᎣᎦᏒᎶᏔᏅ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏙᎯ ᎢᎬᏁᎯ.
080519.phonetic: Hi-a na-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi do-hi ni-gv-ne-hv-gi e-lo-hi gv-wa-s-ga-gi ge-sv Ga-lo-ne-dv gv-di-s-gv-gi, u-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv u-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv-hi ni-da-ye-lv-na-ne-hv-na; a-le a-yv o-ga-sv-lo-ta-nv ka-no-he-dv do-hi i-gv-ne-hi.

080520.english: Now then we are ambassadors for Christ, as though God did beseech you by us: we pray you in Christ's stead, be ye reconciled to God.
080520.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎠᏴ ᎣᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎣᏣᏓᏁᏟᏴᏍᏔᏁᎸᎯ; ᎾᏍᎩᏯᏉ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏥᏥᏍᏗᏰᏗᏍᎪ ᎠᏴ ᏦᎬᏗᏍᎪᎢ, ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎣᏣᏓᏁᏟᏴᏍᏓᏁᎭ, ᎢᏨᏔᏲᏎᎭ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏙᎯ ᎢᏨᏁᏗᏱ.
080520.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no a-yv o-gi-nv-si-dv Ga-lo-ne-dv o-tsa-da-ne-tli-yv-s-ta-ne-lv-hi; na-s-gi-ya-quo U-ne-la-nv-hi tsi-tsi-s-di-ye-di-s-go a-yv tso-gv-di-s-go-i, Ga-lo-ne-dv o-tsa-da-ne-tli-yv-s-da-ne-ha, i-tsv-ta-yo-se-ha U-ne-la-nv-hi do-hi i-tsv-ne-di-yi.

080521.english: For he hath made him to be sin for us, who knew no sin; that we might be made the righteousness of God in him.
080521.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ ᎾᎦᏔᎲᎾ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᎦᎾ ᎤᏰᎸᏅ ᎠᏴ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏧᎵᏍᏙᏔᏅ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏐᏗᏱ ᎠᏴ ᏂᏗᏍᎦᏅᎾ ᎢᎩᏰᎸᏗᏱ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏕᎦᎧᏂᏍᎬᎢ.
080521.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no a-s-ga-ni na-ga-ta-hv-na tsi-ge-se-i, na-s-gi a-s-ga-na u-ye-lv-nv a-yv ge-sv nv-tsu-li-s-do-ta-nv, na-s-gi i-yu-wa-ni-so-di-yi a-yv ni-di-s-ga-nv-na i-gi-ye-lv-di-yi U-ne-la-nv-hi de-ga-ka-ni-s-gv-i.

080601.english: We then, as workers together with him, beseech you also that ye receive not the grace of God in vain.
080601.cherokee: ᎠᏴᏃ ᏦᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᎣᏥᏍᏕᎵᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᏨᏍᏗᏰᏗᎭ ᎠᏎᏉᏉ ᎡᏥᏁᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ.
080601.phonetic: A-yv-no tso-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi o-tsi-s-de-li-s-gi na-s-quo i-tsv-s-di-ye-di-ha a-se-quo-quo e-tsi-ne-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi.

080602.english: (For he saith, I have heard thee in a time accepted, and in the day of salvation have I succoured thee: behold, now is the accepted time; behold, now is the day of salvation.)
080602.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᏂᎦᏪᎭ, ᎬᏩᏛᎦᏁᎸ ᎾᎯᏳ ᏗᏓᏂᎸᏨᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ ᎦᏴᏓᏗᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏍᏕᎸᎲ; (ᎬᏂᏳᏉ, ᎪᎯ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎾᎯᏳ ᏗᏓᏂᎸᏨᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎬᏂᏳᏉ, ᎪᎯ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ ᎦᏴᏓᏗᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ;)
080602.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no ni-ga-we-ha, gv-wa-dv-ga-ne-lv na-hi-yu di-da-ni-lv-tsv-hi ge-sv-i, a-le na-hi-yu i-ga ga-yv-da-di-s-de-lv-di ge-sv gv-s-de-lv-hv; (gv-ni-yu-quo, go-hi hna-quo na-hi-yu di-da-ni-lv-tsv-hi ge-sv-i; gv-ni-yu-quo, go-hi hna-quo na-hi-yu i-ga ga-yv-da-di-s-de-lv-di ge-sv-i;)

080603.english: Giving no offence in any thing, that the ministry be not blamed:
080603.cherokee: ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏃᏣᏛᏁᎲᎾ ᎬᏩᏓᏙᏕᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏐᏅ ᎬᏩᏂᏃᎮᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ;
080603.phonetic: Go-hu-s-di no-tsa-dv-ne-hv-na gv-wa-da-do-de-s-do-di ge-sv-i, hi-a na-s-gi di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv u-so-nv gv-wa-ni-no-he-di ni-ge-sv-na i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi;

080604.english: But in all things approving ourselves as the ministers of God, in much patience, in afflictions, in necessities, in distresses,
080604.cherokee: ᏂᎦᎥᏍᎩᏂ ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᏙᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏃᏨᏁᎰ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎣᏣᏛᏁᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏣᏘ ᏦᏨᏂᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎣᏥᎩᎵᏲᎬᎢ, ᎣᎩᏂᎬᏎᎲᎢ, ᎡᎯᏍᏗ ᎣᎦᏓᏅᏔᏩᏕᎬᎢ,
080604.phonetic: Ni-ga-v-s-gi-ni nu-da-le-sv do-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv gv-ni-ge-sv no-tsv-ne-ho U-ne-la-nv-hi go-hu-s-di o-tsa-dv-ne-hi ge-sv-i, u-tsa-ti tso-tsv-ni-di-yu ge-sv-i, o-tsi-gi-li-yo-gv-i, o-gi-ni-gv-se-hv-i, e-hi-s-di o-ga-da-nv-ta-wa-de-gv-i,

080605.english: In stripes, in imprisonments, in tumults, in labours, in watchings, in fastings;
080605.cherokee: ᏙᎩᎵᏂᎲᎢ, ᎣᎩᏴᎩᏅᎢ, ᎤᏓᏓᏍᎨᏛ ᎤᎾᎵᏖᎸᏅᎢ, ᏙᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ, ᎣᏥᏯᏫᏍᎬᎢ, ᎠᎹᏟ ᎣᏨᏍᎬᎢ,
080605.phonetic: Do-gi-li-ni-hv-i, o-gi-yv-gi-nv-i, u-da-da-s-ge-dv u-na-li-te-lv-nv-i, do-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-i, o-tsi-ya-wi-s-gv-i, a-ma-tli o-tsv-s-gv-i,

080606.english: By pureness, by knowledge, by longsuffering, by kindness, by the Holy Ghost, by love unfeigned,
080606.cherokee: ᏃᎦᏓᏅᎦᎸᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎪᎯᏙᏳ ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᎣᏤᎵᏎᎬᎢ, ᎣᎦᏓᏅᏘᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎣᎨᎲᎢ, ᏄᏠᎾᏍᏛᎾ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎣᎨᎲᎢ.
080606.phonetic: No-ga-da-nv-ga-lv-na ge-sv-i, a-ga-do-v-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, go-hi-do-yu u-ne-la-gi o-tse-li-se-gv-i, o-ga-da-nv-ti-yu ge-sv-i, Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do o-ge-hv-i, nu-tlo-na-s-dv-na a-da-ge-yu-di o-ge-hv-i.

080607.english: By the word of truth, by the power of God, by the armour of righteousness on the right hand and on the left,
080607.cherokee: ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎣᏨᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎣᏨᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎦᏘᏏᏗᏢ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎦᏍᎦᏂᏗᏢ ᎣᎦᏣᏅᏛᎢ,
080607.phonetic: Ga-ye-go-gi ni-ge-sv-na ka-no-he-dv o-tsv-di-s-gv-i, u-li-ni-gi-dv ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li o-tsv-di-s-gv-i, du-yu-go-dv ge-sv a-ga-ti-si-di-tlv a-le a-ga-s-ga-ni-di-tlv o-ga-tsa-nv-dv-i,

080608.english: By honour and dishonour, by evil report and good report: as deceivers, and yet true;
080608.cherokee: ᎣᎩᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏃᎩᎸᏉᏛᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏲ ᎣᎩᏃᎮᏍᎬ ᎠᎴ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎣᎩᏃᎮᏍᎬᎢ; ᎣᎦᏠᎾᏍᏗ ᏥᎨᏐ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᏃᎦᏠᎾᏍᏛᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ,
080608.phonetic: O-gi-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv a-le no-gi-lv-quo-dv-na ge-sv-i, u-yo o-gi-no-he-s-gv a-le o-s-dv o-gi-no-he-s-gv-i; o-ga-tlo-na-s-di tsi-ge-so na-s-gi-ya-i, a-se-no no-ga-tlo-na-s-dv-na ge-sv-i,

080609.english: As unknown, and yet well known; as dying, and, behold, we live; as chastened, and not killed;
080609.cherokee: ᏃᎩᎦᏔᎲᎾ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎣᎩᎦᏔᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᏥᏙᏥᏲᎱᏍᎪ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ, ᎬᏂᏳᏉᏃ ᏦᏨᏃᏛ; ᎣᎩᏍᏛᏗᏍᏔᏅᎯ, ᎣᎩᎸᎯᏃ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ;
080609.phonetic: No-gi-ga-ta-hv-na na-s-gi-ya-i, a-se-no o-si-yu o-gi-ga-ta-hi ge-sv-i; tsi-do-tsi-yo-hu-s-go na-s-gi-ya-i, gv-ni-yu-quo-no tso-tsv-no-dv; o-gi-s-dv-di-s-ta-nv-hi, o-gi-lv-hi-no ni-ge-sv-na;

080610.english: As sorrowful, yet alway rejoicing; as poor, yet making many rich; as having nothing, and yet possessing all things.
080610.cherokee: ᎤᏲ ᏦᎦᏓᏅᏔᏩᏕᎪ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᏯᏃ ᎣᏣᎵᎮᎵᎪᎢ; ᎤᏲ ᏥᏃᎦᏛᎿᎭᏕᎪ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᏙᏤᏅᎢᏍᏗᏍᎪᎢ; ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏃᎩᎲᎾ ᏥᎨᏐ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᏂᎦᏗᏳ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎣᎦᏤᎵᎦ.
080610.phonetic: U-yo tso-ga-da-nv-ta-wa-de-go na-s-gi-ya, a-se-no ya-no o-tsa-li-he-li-go-i; u-yo tsi-no-ga-dv-hna-de-go na-s-gi-ya, a-se-no u-ni-tsa-ti do-tse-nv-i-s-di-s-go-i; go-hu-s-di no-gi-hv-na tsi-ge-so na-s-gi-ya, a-se-no ni-ga-di-yu tsu-da-le-nv-dv o-ga-tse-li-ga.

080611.english: O ye Corinthians, our mouth is open unto you, our heart is enlarged.

080612.english: Ye are not straitened in us, but ye are straitened in your own bowels.
080612.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᏱᏗᏣᏍᏗᎬᏎᎸ ᎠᏴ ᏦᎩᎾᏫ; ᎢᏨᏒᏍᎩᏂ ᏗᏥᎾᏫ ᏚᏍᏗᎬᏒ.
080612.phonetic: V-tla yi-di-tsa-s-di-gv-se-lv a-yv tso-gi-na-wi; i-tsv-sv-s-gi-ni di-tsi-na-wi du-s-di-gv-sv.

080613.english: Now for a recompence in the same, (I speak as unto my children,) be ye also enlarged.
080613.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎤᏠᏱᏉ ᏍᎩᏯᎫᏴᏓᏁᎲ ^ᏗᏇᏥ ᏥᎦᏥᏬᏁᏗᏍᎪ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎢᏨᏬᏁᏗᎭ^ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎯ ᏗᏣᏛᏃᎯ.
080613.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no u-tlo-yi-quo s-gi-ya-gu-yv-da-ne-hv ^di-que-tsi tsi-ga-tsi-wo-ne-di-s-go na-s-gi-ya i-tsv-wo-ne-di-ha^na-s-quo ni-hi di-tsa-dv-no-hi.

080614.english: Be ye not unequally yoked together with unbelievers: for what fellowship hath righteousness with unrighteousness? and what communion hath light with darkness?
080614.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᏂᏗᏣᏙᎵᎬᎾ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᏱᏕᏥᎩᎳᎾᎳᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎾᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎬᎾ; ᎦᏙᏰᏃ ᎤᏍᏗ ᏚᎾᏚᏓᏛ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏂᏚᏳᎪᏛᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ?  ᎠᎴ ᎦᏙ ᎤᏍᏗ ᏌᏉ ᏄᏅᏅ ᎢᎦ-ᎦᏘ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᏏᎩ?
080614.phonetic: Tle-s-di ni-di-tsa-do-li-gv-na i-tsu-la-ha yi-de-tsi-gi-la-na-la-di-s-ge-s-di na-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gv-na; ga-do-ye-no u-s-di du-na-du-da-dv du-yu-go-dv ge-sv a-le ni-du-yu-go-dv-na ge-sv-i?  a-le ga-do u-s-di sa-quo nu-nv-nv i-ga--ga-ti a-le u-li-si-gi?

080615.english: And what concord hath Christ with Belial? or what part hath he that believeth with an infidel?
080615.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎦᏙ ᎤᏍᏗ ᎤᏠᏱ ᏄᏅᏅ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᎴ ᏈᎵᏯᎵ?  ᎠᎴ ᎦᏙ ᎤᏍᏗ ᎢᏧᎳᏉ ᎤᎾᏤᎵᎦ ᎨᏐ ᎪᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎪᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ?
080615.phonetic: A-le ga-do u-s-di u-tlo-yi nu-nv-nv Ga-lo-ne-dv a-le Qui-li-ya-li?  a-le ga-do u-s-di i-tsu-la-quo u-na-tse-li-ga ge-so go-hi-yu-hv-s-gi a-le go-hi-yu-hv-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na?

080616.english: And what agreement hath the temple of God with idols? for ye are the temple of the living God; as God hath said, I will dwell in them, and walk in them; and I will be their God, and they shall be my people.
080616.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎦᏙ ᎤᏍᏗ ᏗᏙᎵᎩ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᎭ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎠᏓᏁᎸ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏗᏟᎶᏍᏔᏅᎯ?  ᏂᎯᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎤᏁᎳᏗᏍᏗᏱ; ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏄᏪᏒ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎦᏥᏯᎡᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏁᎲ ᎨᏙᎮᏍᏗ; ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᎦᏥᏯᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏅᏒ ᏗᏆᏤᎵ ᏴᏫ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
080616.phonetic: A-le ga-do u-s-di di-do-li-gi ni-ga-li-s-di-ha U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li a-da-ne-lv a-le U-ne-la-nv-hi di-tli-lo-s-ta-nv-hi?  ni-hi-ye-no na-s-gi gv-ni-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga u-ne-la-di-s-di-yi; na-s-gi-ya U-ne-la-nv-hi hi-a tsi-nu-we-sv, Na-s-gi na ga-tsi-ya-e-s-di, a-le a-ne-hv ge-do-he-s-di; a-le a-yv ga-tsi-ya-ne-la-nv-hi ge-se-s-di, a-le u-nv-sv di-qua-tse-li yv-wi ge-se-s-di.

080617.english: Wherefore come out from among them, and be ye separate, saith the Lord, and touch not the unclean thing; and I will receive you,
080617.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎡᏥᏄᎪ ᎢᏣᏓᏑᏴ ᎠᏁᎲᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏣᏖᎴᏛ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᏗᎭ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᏒᏂᎸᎩ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎦᏓᎭᎢ; ᎠᏴᏃ ᏙᏓᏨᏯᏓᏂᎸᏥ,
080617.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di e-tsi-nu-go i-tsa-da-su-yv a-ne-hv-i, a-le i-tsa-te-le-dv ge-se-s-di, a-di-ha U-gv-wi-yu-hi, a-le tle-s-di i-tsa-sv-ni-lv-gi go-hu-s-di ga-da-ha-i; a-yv-no do-da-tsv-ya-da-ni-lv-tsi,

080618.english: And will be a Father unto you, and ye shall be my sons and daughters, saith the Lord Almighty.
080618.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᎢᏥᏙᏓ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᏂᎯᏃ ᏗᏇᏥ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᏍᎦᏯ ᎠᎴ ᎢᏥᎨᏴ, ᎠᏗᎭ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏫᎾᏍᏛᎾ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ.
080618.phonetic: A-le a-yv I-tsi-do-da ge-se-s-di, ni-hi-no di-que-tsi ge-se-s-di i-tsi-s-ga-ya a-le i-tsi-ge-yv, a-di-ha U-gv-wi-yu-hi wi-na-s-dv-na u-li-ni-gi-dv.

080701.english: Having therefore these promises, dearly beloved, let us cleanse ourselves from all filthiness of the flesh and spirit, perfecting holiness in the fear of God.
080701.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏄᏍᏗ ᎡᎩᏚᎢᏍᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎢᏨᎨᏳᎢ, ᎢᏓᏓᏅᎦᎸ ᎢᏗᎲᎾ ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᎦᏓᎭ ᎨᏒ ᎢᎩᏇᏓᎸ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᎦᏓᏅᏙᎩᎯ, ᎢᏗᏍᏆᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎡᏗᎾᏰᏍᎬᎢ.
080701.phonetic: Hi-a-no na-s-gi tsi-nu-s-di e-gi-du-i-s-da-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi, i-tsv-ge-yu-i, i-da-da-nv-ga-lv i-di-hv-na nu-da-le-sv ga-da-ha ge-sv i-gi-que-da-lv, a-le i-ga-da-nv-do-gi-hi, i-di-s-qua-di-s-ge-s-di du-yu-go-dv ge-sv-i, U-ne-la-nv-hi e-di-na-ye-s-gv-i.

080702.english: Receive us; we have wronged no man, we have corrupted no man, we have defrauded no man.
080702.cherokee: ᏗᏍᎩᏯᏓᏂᎸᎩ; ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏣᏘᏂ ᏱᏃᏨᏁᎸ, ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᎠᏍᎦᎾ ᏱᏃᏨᏁᎸ, ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᏲᏥᎶᏄᎡᎸ.
080702.phonetic: Di-s-gi-ya-da-ni-lv-gi; v-tla gi-lo u-tsa-ti-ni yi-no-tsv-ne-lv, v-tla gi-lo a-s-ga-na yi-no-tsv-ne-lv, v-tla gi-lo yo-tsi-lo-nu-e-lv.

080703.english: I speak not this to condemn you: for I have said before, that ye are in our hearts to die and live with you.
080703.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏂᏥᏪᎭ ᎥᏝ ᏗᏨᏳᎪᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᏯᎩᏰᎸᎭ; ᎦᏳᎳᏰᏃ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎠᎩᏪᏒ, ᏦᎩᎾᏫᏱ ᎢᏥᏯᎠ, ᎣᎦᏛᏅᎢᏍᏗᏉ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᏗᎩᏂᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎢᎦᏕᏗᏱ.
080703.phonetic: Hi-a na-s-gi tsi-ni-tsi-we-ha v-tla di-tsv-yu-go-da-ne-di-yi ya-gi-ye-lv-ha; ga-yu-la-ye-no hi-a tsi-ni-a-gi-we-sv, tso-gi-na-wi-yi i-tsi-ya-a, o-ga-dv-nv-i-s-di-quo i-tsu-la-ha di-gi-ni-yo-hu-hi-s-di-yi, a-le i-tsu-la-ha i-ga-de-di-yi.

080704.english: Great is my boldness of speech toward you, great is my glorying of you: I am filled with comfort, I am exceeding joyful in all our tribulation.
080704.cherokee: ᎤᏣᏘ ᎢᏨᏲᎢᏳᎭ; ᎤᏣᏘ ᎢᏨᎸᏉᏗᏍᎪᎢ; ᎠᎩᎧᎵᏨᎯ ᎤᎦᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎤᏣᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᎵᎮᎵᏍᏗ ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏔᏩᏕᎪ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎣᏥᎩᎵᏲᏥᏙᎲᎢ.
080704.phonetic: U-tsa-ti i-tsv-yo-i-yu-ha; u-tsa-ti i-tsv-lv-quo-di-s-go-i; a-gi-ka-li-tsv-hi u-ga-li-s-di ge-sv-i; u-tsa-ta-nv-hi u-li-he-li-s-di a-qua-da-nv-ta-wa-de-go ni-ga-v o-tsi-gi-li-yo-tsi-do-hv-i.

080705.english: For, when we were come into Macedonia, our flesh had no rest, but we were troubled on every side; without were fightings, within were fears.
080705.cherokee: ᎹᏏᏙᏂᏰᏃ ᏬᎩᎷᏨ, ᎥᏝ ᎣᎩᏇᏓᎸ ᎬᏩᏣᏪᏐᎸᏍᏙᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᎢ, ᎬᏩᏚᎾᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᎣᎦᏕᏯᏙᏗᎬᎩ; ᏙᏱᏗᏢ ᎠᎵᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎭᏫᏂᏃ ᎢᏗᏢ ᎣᏥᎾᏰᏍᎬᎢ.
080705.phonetic: Ma-si-do-ni-ye-no wo-gi-lu-tsv, v-tla o-gi-que-da-lv gv-wa-tsa-we-so-lv-s-do-di yi-ge-se-i, gv-wa-du-na-dv-s-gi-ni o-ga-de-ya-do-di-gv-gi; do-yi-di-tlv a-li-dv ge-sv-i, ha-wi-ni-no i-di-tlv o-tsi-na-ye-s-gv-i.

080706.english: Nevertheless God, that comforteth those that are cast down, comforted us by the coming of Titus;
080706.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᏗᎦᎵᏍᏓᏗᏍᎩ ᎤᏪᎵᎯᏍᏗ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏔᏩᏕᎩ, ᎣᎩᎦᎵᏍᏓᏗᏍᏔᏅᎩ ᏓᏓᏏ ᎤᎷᏨᎢ;
080706.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni-no-nv di-ga-li-s-da-di-s-gi u-we-li-hi-s-di u-na-da-nv-ta-wa-de-gi, o-gi-ga-li-s-da-di-s-ta-nv-gi Da-da-si u-lu-tsv-i;

080707.english: And not by his coming only, but by the consolation wherewith he was comforted in you, when he told us your earnest desire, your mourning, your fervent mind toward me; so that I rejoiced the more.
080707.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎤᎷᏨᏉ ᎤᏩᏒ, ᎤᎦᎵᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᏓᏅᏓᏛᎢ ᏂᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᎣᎩᏃᏁᎸ ᏂᎯ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎢᏣᏚᎵᏍᎬᎢ, ᎤᏲ ᎢᏥᏰᎸᏒᎯ, ᎤᏣᏘ ᏍᎩᎨᏳᎢᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎠᏆᎵᎮᎵᏨᎩ.
080707.phonetic: V-tla-s-gi-ni-no-nv u-lu-tsv-quo u-wa-sv, u-ga-li-s-di-s-gi-ni na-s-quo u-da-nv-da-dv-i ni-hi ge-sv i-yu-s-di, o-gi-no-ne-lv ni-hi u-tsa-ti i-tsa-du-li-s-gv-i, u-yo i-tsi-ye-lv-sv-hi, u-tsa-ti s-gi-ge-yu-i-yu ge-sv-i; na-s-gi i-yu-s-di u-tli i-ga-i a-qua-li-he-li-tsv-gi.

080708.english: For though I made you sorry with a letter, I do not repent, though I did repent: for I perceive that the same epistle hath made you sorry, though it were but for a season.
080708.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏨᏯᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏔᏅᎩ ᎪᏪᎵ ᏫᏨᏅᏁᎸᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎤᏲ ᏯᎩᏰᎸᎭ, ᎤᏲᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎠᎩᏰᎸᏒᎩ; ᎢᏥᎪᏩᏘᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᏪᎵ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏔᏅᎢ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᏞᎦᏉ.
080708.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-s-gi-ni-no-nv u-yo i-tsv-ya-da-nv-da-di-s-ta-nv-gi go-we-li wi-tsv-nv-ne-lv-i, v-tla u-yo ya-gi-ye-lv-ha, u-yo-s-gi-ni-no-nv a-gi-ye-lv-sv-gi; i-tsi-go-wa-ti-ye-no na-s-gi go-we-li u-yo i-tsa-da-nv-da-di-s-ta-nv-i, a-se-no tle-ga-quo.

080709.english: Now I rejoice, not that ye were made sorry, but that ye sorrowed to repentance: for ye were made sorry after a godly manner, that ye might receive damage by us in nothing.
080709.cherokee: ᎪᎯᏃ ᏥᎩ ᎦᎵᎡᎵᎦ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᏗᎾ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏓᏛ ᏱᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭᏍᎩᏂ ᏗᎨᏥᏁᏟᏴᏍᏗ ᏕᏣᏓ ᏅᏛ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏓᏛᎢ; ᎤᏲᏰᏃ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏓᏛᎩ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏗᎬᏩᏓᏂᎸᎢᏍᏗ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏓᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎡᏍᎦ ᎢᏨᏴᏁᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.
080709.phonetic: Go-hi-no tsi-gi ga-li-e-li-ga, v-tla a-di-na u-yo i-tsa-da-nv-da-dv yi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha-s-gi-ni di-ge-tsi-ne-tli-yv-s-di de-tsa-da nv-dv i-yv-dv u-yo i-tsa-da-nv-da-dv-i; u-yo-ye-no i-tsa-da-nv-da-dv-gi na-s-gi-ya U-ne-la-nv-hi di-gv-wa-da-ni-lv-i-s-di tsi-gi, na-s-gi nv-da-yu-li-s-do-di-yi go-hu-s-di e-s-ga i-tsv-yv-ne-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na.

080710.english: For godly sorrow worketh repentance to salvation not to be repented of: but the sorrow of the world worketh death.
080710.cherokee: ᎤᏲᏰᏃ ᎠᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏗᎬᏩᏓᏂᎸᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎦᏁᏟᏴᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎣᏓᏅᏛ ᏩᎵᏰᎢᎶᎯᎭ ᎥᏓᏗᏍᏕᎸᏗᏱ ᏫᎦᎷᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏲ ᎠᏰᎸᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ; ᎡᎶᎯᏍᏗᏂ ᎡᎯ ᎤᏲ ᎠᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏩᎵᏰᎢᎶᎯᎭ.
080710.phonetic: U-yo-ye-no a-da-nv-da-di-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi di-gv-wa-da-ni-lv-i-s-di ge-sv ga-ne-tli-yv-s-di ge-sv o-da-nv-dv wa-li-ye-i-lo-hi-ha v-da-di-s-de-lv-di-yi wi-ga-lu-gi, na-s-gi u-yo a-ye-lv-di ni-ge-sv-na; e-lo-hi-s-di-ni e-hi u-yo a-da-nv-da-di-s-di ge-sv a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv wa-li-ye-i-lo-hi-ha.

080711.english: For behold this selfsame thing, that ye sorrowed after a godly sort, what carefulness it wrought in you, yea, what clearing of yourselves, yea, what indignation, yea, what fear, yea, what vehement desire, yea, what zeal, yea, what revenge! In all things ye have approved yourselves to be clear in this matter.
080711.cherokee: ᎬᏂᏳᏉᏰᏃ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏲ ᏥᏣᏓᏅᏓᏛᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᎬᏩᏓᏂᎸᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᏂᎦᎥ ᎢᏣᎵᏂᎬᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏭᎵᏰᎢᎶᎸ; ᏂᎦᎥ ᏗᏣᏢᏫᏍᏙᏗ ᎢᏥᏲᎲᎢ, ᎥᎥ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎢᏥᏂᏆᏘᎲᎢ, ᎥᎥ, ᏂᎦᎥ ᎢᏥᎾᏰᏍᎬᎢ, ᎥᎥ, ᏂᎦᎥ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎢᏣᏑᎵᏍᎬᎢ, ᎥᎥᎢ, ᏂᎦᎥ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᎥᎥ, ᏂᎦᎥ ᎠᏓᏍᏛᏗᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ!  ᏂᎦᎥ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏂᏨᏁᎸ ᏂᏥᏍᎦᏅᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎧᏃᎮᏗ ᏥᎩ.
080711.phonetic: Gv-ni-yu-quo-ye-no hi-a na-s-gi u-yo tsi-tsa-da-nv-da-dv-gi na-s-gi di-gv-wa-da-ni-lv-i-s-di ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi, ni-ga-v i-tsa-li-ni-gv-ne-di ge-sv wu-li-ye-i-lo-lv; ni-ga-v di-tsa-tlv-wi-s-do-di i-tsi-yo-hv-i, v-v ni-ga-v i-tsi-ni-qua-ti-hv-i, v-v, ni-ga-v i-tsi-na-ye-s-gv-i, v-v, ni-ga-v u-tsa-ti i-tsa-su-li-s-gv-i, v-vi, ni-ga-v u-li-ni-gi-dv i-tsa-da-nv-dv-i, v-v, ni-ga-v a-da-s-dv-di-s-do-di ge-sv-i!  ni-ga-v tsu-da-le-nv-dv gv-ni-ge-sv ni-tsv-ne-lv ni-tsi-s-ga-nv-na ge-sv hi-a na-s-gi ka-no-he-di tsi-gi.

080712.english: Wherefore, though I wrote unto you, I did it not for his cause that had done the wrong, nor for his cause that suffered wrong, but that our care for you in the sight of God might appear unto you.
080712.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏄᏍᏗ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᏫᏨᏲᏪᎳᏁᎸᎩ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏣᏘᏂ ᎢᏳᏛᏁᎸᎯ ᏳᎬᏩᎴᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ Ꮎ ᎤᏣᏘᏂ ᎢᏯᎦᏛᏁᎸᎯ ᏳᎬᏩᎴᎢ; ᎠᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏨᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏔᎲ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ.
080712.phonetic: Na-s-gi tsi-nu-s-di u-do-hi-yu-hi-s-gi-ni-no-nv wi-tsv-yo-we-la-ne-lv-gi, a-se-no v-tla u-tsa-ti-ni i-yu-dv-ne-lv-hi yu-gv-wa-le-i, v-tla a-le na u-tsa-ti-ni i-ya-ga-dv-ne-lv-hi yu-gv-wa-le-i; a-s-gi-ni i-tsv-s-qua-ni-go-di-yu ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ga-ta-hv gv-ni-ge-sv i-tsa-li-s-da-ne-di-yi.

080713.english: Therefore we were comforted in your comfort: yea, and exceedingly the more joyed we for the joy of Titus, because his spirit was refreshed by you all.
080713.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏂᎯ ᎤᎦᎵᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏛ ᎠᏴ ᎣᎩᎦᎵᏍᏓᏛᎩ; ᎥᎥ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ ᎣᎦᎵᎮᎵᏍᏗ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅᎩ, ᏓᏓᏏ ᎠᎵᎮᎵᎬ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ, ᏅᏓᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏓᏅᏙ ᏂᏥᎥ ᎡᏥᎦᎵᏍᏓᏕᎸᎢ.
080713.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di ni-hi u-ga-li-s-di i-tsa-da-nv-dv a-yv o-gi-ga-li-s-da-dv-gi; v-v, a-le u-tli i-ga-i o-ga-li-he-li-s-di nu-li-s-ta-nv-gi, Da-da-si a-li-he-li-gv i-yu-s-di, nv-da-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv-gi na-s-gi u-da-nv-do ni-tsi-v e-tsi-ga-li-s-da-de-lv-i.

080714.english: For if I have boasted any thing to him of you, I am not ashamed; but as we spake all things to you in truth, even so our boasting, which I made before Titus, is found a truth.
080714.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᏥᏯᏢᏈᏎᎸᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᏂᎯ ᎢᏨᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᏱᎦᏕᎣᏍᎦ; ᏂᎦᏗᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎢᏨᏬᏁᏔᏅᎢ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯᏉ ᎣᎦᏢᏆᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏓᏓᏏ ᎣᏣᏢᏆᏎᎸᎢ, ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅ.
080714.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no tsi-ya-tlv-qui-se-lv-hi ge-se-s-di, ni-hi i-tsv-ne-i-s-di-s-gv-i, v-tla yi-ga-de-o-s-ga; ni-ga-di-yu-s-gi-ni tsu-da-le-nv-dv i-tsv-wo-ne-ta-nv-i u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya tsi-gi, na-s-gi-ya-quo o-ga-tlv-qua-sv-i, na-s-gi Da-da-si o-tsa-tlv-qua-se-lv-i, u-do-hi-yu-hi-ya nu-li-s-ta-nv.

080715.english: And his inward affection is more abundant toward you, whilst he remembereth the obedience of you all, how with fear and trembling ye received him.
080715.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏫᏱ ᎢᏥᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᏁᏉᏨ, ᎤᏅᏓᏛ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᎯᏳ ᎨᏒ ᏂᏥᎥᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏥᎾᏰᏍᎩ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏥᎾᏫᏍᎩ ᏕᏣᏓᏂᎸᏨᎢ.
080715.phonetic: A-le u-na-wi-yi i-tsi-ge-yu-hi-yu ge-sv u-tsa-ti u-ne-quo-tsv, u-nv-da-dv i-tso-hi-yu-hi-yu ge-sv ni-tsi-v-i, na-s-gi i-tsi-na-ye-s-gi a-le di-tsi-na-wi-s-gi de-tsa-da-ni-lv-tsv-i.

080716.english: I rejoice therefore that I have confidence in you in all things.
080716.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎦᎵᎡᎵᎦ, ᎨᏨᏲᎢᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ.
080716.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di ga-li-e-li-ga, ge-tsv-yo-i-yu-di ge-sv nu-da-le-sv go-hu-s-di u-gv-wa-li.

080801.english: Moreover, brethren, we do you to wit of the grace of God bestowed on the churches of Macedonia;
080801.cherokee: ᎠᎴᏬ ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏂᏨᏴᏁᎭ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᏁᎸ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᏚᎾᏓᏡᏩᏗᏒ ᎹᏏᏙᏂ ᎠᏁᎯ;
080801.phonetic: A-le-wo i-da-li-nv-tli, gv-ni-ge-sv ni-tsv-yv-ne-ha, U-ne-la-nv-hi gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-ne-di ge-sv na-s-gi du-ne-lv tsu-na-ne-lo-di du-na-da-tlu-wa-di-sv Ma-si-do-ni a-ne-hi;

080802.english: How that in a great trial of affliction the abundance of their joy and their deep poverty abounded unto the riches of their liberality.
080802.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎠᏓᎪᎵᏰᏍᎩ ᎠᏂᎩᎵᏲᎬ, ᎤᏣᏘ ᎠᎾᎵᎮᎵᎬ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᏲ ᏄᎾᏛᎿᎭᏕᎬ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏄᏩᏁᎸ ᏄᏂᎨᏳᎿᎭᎥᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
080802.phonetic: Na-s-gi u-tsa-ti a-da-go-li-ye-s-gi a-ni-gi-li-yo-gv, u-tsa-ti a-na-li-he-li-gv a-le u-tsa-ti u-yo nu-na-dv-hna-de-gv ga-lv-quo-di-yu nu-wa-ne-lv nu-ni-ge-yu-hna-v-na ge-sv-i.

080803.english: For to their power, I bear record, yea, and beyond their power they were willing of themselves;
080803.cherokee: ᎦᏥᏲᎢᏳᏓᏁᎭᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏚᎾᎵᏂᎬᎬ ᎢᏴᏛ, ᎥᎥ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᎶᏒᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᏂᎦᎾᎵᏂᎬᎬᎢ, ᎤᎾᎵᎦᏟᏴᎯᏉ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏖᏛ;
080803.phonetic: Ga-tsi-yo-i-yu-da-ne-ha-ye-no na-s-gi ni-du-na-li-ni-gv-gv i-yv-dv, v-v, a-le a-ni-lo-sv-s-di-s-gv ni-ga-na-li-ni-gv-gv-i, u-na-li-ga-tli-yv-hi-quo u-nv-sv u-na-da-nv-te-dv;

080804.english: Praying us with much intreaty that we would receive the gift, and take upon us the fellowship of the ministering to the saints.
080804.cherokee: ᎤᏣᏘ ᎪᎩᏍᏗᏰᏗᏍᎬ ᎪᎩᏔᏲᏎᎲᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᏅᎯ ᏦᎦᏓᏂᎸᎢᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᎦᏖᏆᎶᏗᏱ ᏦᏥᏍᏕᎸᏗᏱ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ.
080804.phonetic: U-tsa-ti go-gi-s-di-ye-di-s-gv go-gi-ta-yo-se-hv-gi na-s-gi u-ni-nv-hi tso-ga-da-ni-lv-i-s-di-yi, a-le o-ga-te-qua-lo-di-yi tso-tsi-s-de-lv-di-yi tsu-na-ne-lo-di.

080805.english: And this they did, not as we hoped, but first gave their own selves to the Lord, and unto us by the will of God.
080805.cherokee: ᎠᎴ [ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᎾᏛᏁᎸᎩ] ᎥᏝ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎣᎬᏅᎢ, ᎢᎬᏱᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏚᎾᏓᏲᎯᏎᎸᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᏕᎪᎦᏓᏲᎯᏎᎸᎩ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎠᏰᎸᏍᎬ ᏅᏓᏳᎵᏍᏙᏔᏅᎩ.
080805.phonetic: A-le [na-s-gi nu-na-dv-ne-lv-gi] v-tla na-s-gi-ya nu-s-dv u-du-gi o-gv-nv-i, i-gv-yi-s-gi-ni u-nv-sv U-gv-wi-yu-hi du-na-da-yo-hi-se-lv-gi, a-le a-yv de-go-ga-da-yo-hi-se-lv-gi, U-ne-la-nv-hi o-si-yu a-ye-lv-s-gv nv-da-yu-li-s-do-ta-nv-gi.

080806.english: Insomuch that we desired Titus, that as he had begun, so he would also finish in you the same grace also.
080806.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏓᏓᏏ ᎣᏥᏔᏲᏎᎸᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎤᎴᏅᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎢᏳᏛᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᏍᏆᏗᏍᏗᏱ ᎢᏤᎲ ᎤᏠᏱ ᎢᏣᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᏂᏨᏁᎲᎢ.
080806.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di Da-da-si o-tsi-ta-yo-se-lv-gi, na-s-gi nu-s-dv u-le-nv-hv-i, na-s-gi-ya i-yu-dv-ne-di-yi u-s-qua-di-s-di-yi i-tse-hv u-tlo-yi i-tsa-da-ne-di-yi ni-tsv-ne-hv-i.

080807.english: Therefore, as ye abound in every thing, in faith, and utterance, and knowledge, and in all diligence, and in your love to us, see that ye abound in this grace also.
080807.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏥᏥᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎢᏥᎦᎵᏴᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴ ᏍᎩᎨᏳᎢᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎢᏥᎮᏍᏗ.
080807.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no ni-ga-v tsu-da-le-nv-dv u-tsa-ti tsi-tsi-ha, na-s-gi go-hi-yu-di ge-sv-i, a-le ga-wo-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, a-le a-ga-do-v-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, a-le ni-ga-v tsu-da-le-nv-dv i-tsi-ga-li-yv-i, a-le a-yv s-gi-ge-yu-i-yu ge-sv-i, hi-a na-s-gi a-da-ne-di ge-sv na-s-quo u-tsa-ti i-tsi-he-s-di.

080808.english: I speak not by commandment, but by occasion of the forwardness of others, and to prove the sincerity of your love.
080808.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᏱᏥᏁᎦ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎠᏎ ᎢᏣᏛᏁᏗᏱ, ᎠᏂᏐᎢᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᎾᎵᎦᎵᏴᏅ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎩᎪᎵᏰᏗᏱ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏥᎲ ᏄᏠᎾᏍᏛᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
080808.phonetic: V-tla yi-tsi-ne-ga na-s-gi hi-a a-se i-tsa-dv-ne-di-yi, a-ni-so-i-s-gi-ni u-na-li-ga-li-yv-nv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha, a-le a-gi-go-li-ye-di-yi a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv i-tsi-hv nu-tlo-na-s-dv-na ge-sv-i.

080809.english: For ye know the grace of our Lord Jesus Christ, that, though he was rich, yet for your sakes he became poor, that ye through his poverty might be rich.
080809.cherokee: ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎭᏰᏃ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᎦᏤᎵᎦ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏪᎾᎢᏳ ᏥᎨᏎᎢ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᏂᎯ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏳᏛᎿᎭᏕᎩ ᏄᎵᏍᏔᏅᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎤᏲ ᎢᏳᏛᎿᎭᏕᎩ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏐᏗᏱ ᏂᎯ ᏗᏤᎿᎭᎢ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
080809.phonetic: I-tsi-ga-ta-ha-ye-no gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-ga-tse-li-ga Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv, na-s-gi u-we-na-i-yu tsi-ge-se-i, a-se-no ni-hi ge-sv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv u-yo i-yu-dv-hna-de-gi nu-li-s-ta-nv-i, na-s-gi u-wa-sv u-yo i-yu-dv-hna-de-gi ge-sv i-yu-wa-ni-so-di-yi ni-hi di-tse-hna-i i-tsa-li-s-do-di-yi.

080810.english: And herein I give my advice: for this is expedient for you, who have begun before, not only to do, but also to be forward a year ago.
080810.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎦᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏂᎬᏁᎭ; ᎣᏏᏳᏰᏃ ᎢᎨᏣᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏳᎳ ᎢᏣᎴᏅᏛ ᏥᎩ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᏑᏕᏘᏴᏛ, ᎥᏝ ᎢᏣᏛᏁᏗᏱᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ, ᎾᏍᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏥᏰᎸᏗᏱ.
080810.phonetic: A-le a-ni na-s-gi nu-s-dv ga-da-nv-te-s-gv gv-ni-ge-sv ni-gv-ne-ha; o-si-yu-ye-no i-ge-tsa-li-s-da-ne-di, na-s-gi ga-yu-la i-tsa-le-nv-dv tsi-gi, hna-quo su-de-ti-yv-dv, v-tla i-tsa-dv-ne-di-yi-quo na-s-gi, na-s-quo-s-gi-ni o-si-yu i-tsi-ye-lv-di-yi.

080811.english: Now therefore perform the doing of it; that as there was a readiness to will, so there may be a performance also out of that which ye have.
080811.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎢᏥᏍᏆᏓ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏯᏛᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏥᎦᎵᏱᏳ ᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏣᏚᎸᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏄᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᏍᏆᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᎢᏨᏗᏍᎬ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎢᏥᎲᎢ.
080811.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di hna-quo i-tsi-s-qua-da na-s-gi i-ya-dv-ne-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi i-tsi-ga-li-yi-yu ni-ge-sv i-tsa-du-lv-di-yi, na-s-gi na-s-quo nu-s-de-s-di i-tsi-s-qua-di-s-gv-i, i-tsv-di-s-gv na-s-gi nu-s-dv i-tsi-hv-i.

080812.english: For if there be first a willing mind, it is accepted according to that a man hath, and not according to that he hath not.
080812.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎢᎬᏱ ᎨᏒ ᎩᎶ ᏯᎦᎵᏴ ᏧᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᏣᎦᏓᏂᎸᏤᏗ ᎨᏐ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎤᎲᎢ, ᎥᏝᏃ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᎲᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
080812.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no i-gv-yi ge-sv gi-lo ya-ga-li-yv tsu-da-nv-dv-i, tsa-ga-da-ni-lv-tse-di ge-so na-s-gi-ya nu-s-dv u-hv-i, v-tla-no na-s-gi-ya nu-hv-na ge-sv-i.

080813.english: For I mean not that other men be eased, and ye burdened:
080813.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎠᏗᎾ ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴ ᏗᎨᏥᎪᏗᏱ ᏂᎯᏃ ᎠᏍᏓᏯ ᎢᏰᏨᏁᏗᏱ ᏱᎦᏗᎭ;
080813.phonetic: V-tla a-di-na nv-wa-na-da-le di-ge-tsi-go-di-yi ni-hi-no a-s-da-ya i-ye-tsv-ne-di-yi yi-ga-di-ha;

080814.english: But by an equality, that now at this time your abundance may be a supply for their want, that their abundance also may be a supply for your want: that there may be equality:
080814.cherokee: ᎢᎬᏩᏍᏗᎭᏍᎩᏂ [ᎢᏥᏗᏱ;] ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎢᏥᎲ ᏱᏗᏥᏍᏕᎸᏗᎭ ᎤᏂᏂᎬᏎᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᏂᎲ ᎨᏥᏍᏕᎸᏗᏱ ᎢᏥᏂᎬᏎᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎬᏩᏍᏗᎭ ᎢᏥᏗᏱ.
080814.phonetic: I-gv-wa-s-di-ha-s-gi-ni [i-tsi-di-yi;] na-s-gi go-hi ge-sv u-tsa-ti i-tsi-hv yi-di-tsi-s-de-lv-di-ha u-ni-ni-gv-se-hv-i, na-s-gi-no na-s-quo u-tsa-ti u-ni-hv ge-tsi-s-de-lv-di-yi i-tsi-ni-gv-se-hv-i, na-s-gi i-gv-wa-s-di-ha i-tsi-di-yi.

080815.english: As it is written, He that had gathered much had nothing over; and he that had gathered little had no lack.
080815.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎬᏅ ᏥᎪᏪᎳ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎪᏗ ᎤᏭᏖᏛ ᎥᏝ ᏳᏘᏰᎮᎢ; ᎾᏃ ᎦᏲᎵ ᎤᏭᏖᏛ ᎥᏝ ᏳᎷᎶᏤᎮᎢ.
080815.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya hi-a tsi-ni-gv-nv tsi-go-we-la, Na-s-gi u-go-di u-wu-te-dv v-tla yu-ti-ye-he-i; na-no ga-yo-li u-wu-te-dv v-tla yu-lu-lo-tse-he-i.

080816.english: But thanks be to God, which put the same earnest care into the heart of Titus for you.
080816.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎵᎮᎵᏤᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏓᏓᏏ ᎤᎾᏫᏱ ᏧᎳᏁᎸ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎦᎢ ᏗᏤᎷᎢᏍᏗᏱ.
080816.phonetic: A-se-no U-ne-la-nv-hi a-li-he-li-tse-di ge-se-s-di, na-s-gi Da-da-si u-na-wi-yi tsu-la-ne-lv na-s-gi i-ga-i di-tse-lu-i-s-di-yi.

080817.english: For indeed he accepted the exhortation; but being more forward, of his own accord he went unto you.
080817.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏰᏃ ᏚᏓᏂᎸᏨᎩ ᏥᏬᏁᏔᏅᎢ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏟᎯᏳ ᏄᎵᎦᎵᏴᏒ ᏅᏓᏳᎵᏍᏙᏔᏅᎩ, ᎤᏩᏒᏉ ᎤᏓᏅᏖᏛ ᎢᏥᏩᏛᎲᏒᎩ.
080817.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-ye-no du-da-ni-lv-tsv-gi tsi-wo-ne-ta-nv-i; a-se-no u-tli-hi-yu nu-li-ga-li-yv-sv nv-da-yu-li-s-do-ta-nv-gi, u-wa-sv-quo u-da-nv-te-dv i-tsi-wa-dv-hv-sv-gi.

080818.english: And we have sent with him the brother, whose praise is in the gospel throughout all the churches;
080818.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏱᏥᏅᎵ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏁᎩ Ꮎ ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᏂᎬᎾᏛ ᏚᎾᏓᏡᏩᏗᏒ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᎬᏩᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᏥᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏥᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ;
080818.phonetic: A-le yi-tsi-nv-li na-s-gi a-ne-gi na i-da-li-nv-tli, ni-gv-na-dv du-na-da-tlu-wa-di-sv tsu-na-ne-lo-di gv-wa-lv-quo-di-yu tsi-gi o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv tsi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha;

080819.english: And not that only, but who was also chosen of the churches to travel with us with this grace, which is administered by us to the glory of the same Lord, and declaration of your ready mind:
080819.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᎾᏍᎩᏉ ᏱᏂᎦᎥ, ᎾᏍᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᏚᎾᏓᏡᏩᏗᏒ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᎬᏩᏑᏰᏒᎩ ᎠᏴ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎣᎨᏅᏍᏗᏱ ᎣᎩᏴᏍᏗᏱ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏓᏁᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏙᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎭ, ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏩᏒ, ᎠᎴ [ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᎬᏩᏁᏗᏱ] ᎢᏣᎵᎦᎵᏴᏒ ᏙᏗᏣᏓᏅᏛᎢ;
080819.phonetic: A-le v-tla na-s-gi-quo yi-ni-ga-v, na-s-quo-s-gi-ni du-na-da-tlu-wa-di-sv tsu-na-ne-lo-di gv-wa-su-ye-sv-gi a-yv i-tsu-la-ha o-ge-nv-s-di-yi o-gi-yv-s-di-yi hi-a na-s-gi a-da-ne-di, na-s-gi tsi-do-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ha, ga-lv-quo-di-yu i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-wa-sv, a-le [gv-ni-ge-sv i-gv-wa-ne-di-yi] i-tsa-li-ga-li-yv-sv do-di-tsa-da-nv-dv-i;

080820.english: Avoiding this, that no man should blame us in this abundance which is administered by us:
080820.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏥᏲᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬᎢ, ᎩᎶ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎪᎨᎵᏎᏗᏱ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎣᎬᏁᏗ ᏥᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᎭ;
080820.phonetic: Hi-a na-s-gi o-tsi-yo-s-do-di-s-gv-i, gi-lo go-hu-s-di go-ge-li-se-di-yi hi-a na-s-gi u-tsa-ti u-gv-wa-li go-hu-s-di o-gv-ne-di tsi-ni-ga-li-s-di-ha;

080821.english: Providing for honest things, not only in the sight of the Lord, but also in the sight of men.
080821.cherokee: ᎢᎬᏱ ᎦᏰᎯ ᎣᏣᎦᏌᏯᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎠᏰᎸᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯᏉ ᎠᎦᏔᎲᎢ, ᏴᏫᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎲᎢ.
080821.phonetic: I-gv-yi ga-ye-hi o-tsa-ga-sa-ya-s-di-s-gv o-si-yu a-ye-lv-di ge-sv-i, v-tla U-gv-wi-yu-hi-quo a-ga-ta-hv-i, yv-wi-s-gi-ni na-s-quo a-ni-ga-ta-hv-i.

080822.english: And we have sent with them our brother, whom we have oftentimes proved diligent in many things, but now much more diligent, upon the great confidence which I have in you.
080822.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎣᏥᏅᎵ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎠᏁᎩ ᎣᏣᎵᏅᏟ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏩᎫᏘᎶᏛ ᎣᏥᎪᎵᏰᏛ ᎣᎦᏙᎴᎰᏒᎯ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎠᎦᎵᏱᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏟ ᎾᎦᎵᏴ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏒᎢ.
080822.phonetic: A-le o-tsi-nv-li i-tsu-la-ha a-ne-gi o-tsa-li-nv-tli, na-s-gi u-wa-gu-ti-lo-dv o-tsi-go-li-ye-dv o-ga-do-le-ho-sv-hi u-tsa-ti a-ga-li-yi-yu ge-sv-i, a-se-no go-hi ge-sv u-tli na-ga-li-yv, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha u-tsa-ti i-tso-hi-yu-sv-i.

080823.english: Whether any do inquire of Titus, he is my partner and fellowhelper concerning you: or our brethren be inquired of, they are the messengers of the churches, and the glory of Christ.
080823.cherokee: ᏓᏓᏏᏃ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎣᎩᎾᎵᎪᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᏦᎩᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᏂᎯ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎢᏨᏯᏛᏁᎲᎢ; ᎣᏣᎵᏅᏟᏃ ᎨᏒ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᏚᎾᏓᏡᏩᏗᏒ ᎬᏩᏂᏅᏏᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎢᏯᏅᏁᎯ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ.
080823.phonetic: Da-da-si-no ge-sv-i, o-gi-na-li-go-hi na-s-gi, a-le i-tsu-la-ha tso-gi-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi ni-hi go-hu-s-di i-tsv-ya-dv-ne-hv-i; o-tsa-li-nv-tli-no ge-sv tsu-na-ne-lo-di du-na-da-tlu-wa-di-sv gv-wa-ni-nv-si-dv na-s-gi, a-le ga-lv-quo-di-yu i-ya-nv-ne-hi Ga-lo-ne-dv.

080824.english: Wherefore shew ye to them, and before the churches, the proof of your love, and of our boasting on your behalf.
080824.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎲ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᏚᎾᏓᏡᏩᏗᏒᎢ, ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏂᏕᏨᏁᎸᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎯᏳᏗᏍᎩ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏤᎲᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᎦᏢᏆᏒ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏨᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎬᎢ ᎠᏎᏉ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
080824.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di a-ni-ga-ta-hv tsu-na-ne-lo-di du-na-da-tlu-wa-di-sv-i, gv-ni-ge-sv ni-de-tsv-ne-lv-ha na-s-gi go-hi-yu-di-s-gi a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv i-tse-hv-i, a-le o-ga-tlv-qua-sv ni-hi i-tsv-ne-i-s-di-s-gv-i a-se-quo ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i.

080901.english: For as touching the ministering to the saints, it is superfluous for me to write to you:
080901.cherokee: ᎾᏃ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ ᏗᏍᏕᎸᏗᏱ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ, ᎠᏎᏉᏉ ᏱᏨᏲᏪᎳᏁᎭ.
080901.phonetic: Na-no u-na-da-nv-ti di-s-de-lv-di-yi u-gv-wa-li, a-se-quo-quo yi-tsv-yo-we-la-ne-ha.

080902.english: For I know the forwardness of your mind, for which I boast of you to them of Macedonia, that Achaia was ready a year ago; and your zeal hath provoked very many.
080902.cherokee: ᏥᎦᏔᎭᏰᏃ ᏗᎦᎵᏱᏳ ᎨᏒ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏨᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎹᏏᏙᏂ ᎠᏁᎯ ᎦᏥᏯᏢᏈᏎᎭ, [ᎦᏥᏃᏁᎭ] ᎾᏍᎩ ᎡᎧᏯ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏑᏕᏘᏴᏛ ᎬᏩᏛᏅᎢᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᏂᎯ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏛ ᎤᏂᏣᏔ ᎤᏂᏖᎸᏅ.
080902.phonetic: Tsi-ga-ta-ha-ye-no di-ga-li-yi-yu ge-sv de-tsa-da-nv-dv-i, na-s-gi i-tsv-ne-i-s-di-s-gv Ma-si-do-ni a-ne-hi ga-tsi-ya-tlv-qui-se-ha, [ga-tsi-no-ne-ha] na-s-gi E-ka-ya hna-quo su-de-ti-yv-dv gv-wa-dv-nv-i-s-ta-nv-hi ge-sv-i; a-le ni-hi u-li-ni-gi-dv i-tsa-da-nv-dv u-ni-tsa-ta u-ni-te-lv-nv.

080903.english: Yet have I sent the brethren, lest our boasting of you should be in vain in this behalf; that, as I said, ye may be ready:
080903.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎦᏥᏅᎵ ᎣᏣᎵᏅᏟ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏎᏉᏉ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎣᏣᏢᏈᏍᎬ ᎢᏨᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎬᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏣᏛᏅᎢᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᎩᏪᏒᎢ.
080903.phonetic: A-se-no ga-tsi-nv-li o-tsa-li-nv-tli, na-s-gi a-se-quo-quo i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na o-tsa-tlv-qui-s-gv i-tsv-ne-i-s-di-s-gv-i; na-s-gi i-tsa-dv-nv-i-s-ta-nv-hi yi-gi, na-s-gi-ya na-gi-we-sv-i.

080904.english: Lest haply if they of Macedonia come with me, and find you unprepared, we (that we say not, ye) should be ashamed in this same confident boasting.
080904.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᏱᏅᏩᏎᎦᏨ ᎹᏏᏙᏂ ᎠᏁᎯ ᏱᎬᎩᏍᏓᏩᏕᏅ, ᏱᏨᏩᏛᏔᏅᏃ ᏂᏣᏛᏅᎢᏍᏔᏅᎾ, ᎠᏴ, (ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏂᎯ ᏱᎦᏗᎭ,) ᏲᏣᏕᎰᎯ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎣᎪᎯᏳᎯ ᎣᎦᏢᏈᏒᎢ.
080904.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no yi-nv-wa-se-ga-tsv Ma-si-do-ni a-ne-hi yi-gv-gi-s-da-wa-de-nv, yi-tsv-wa-dv-ta-nv-no ni-tsa-dv-nv-i-s-ta-nv-na, a-yv, (v-tla-ye-no ni-hi yi-ga-di-ha,) yo-tsa-de-ho-hi hi-a na-s-gi u-tsa-ti o-go-hi-yu-hi o-ga-tlv-qui-sv-i.

080905.english: Therefore I thought it necessary to exhort the brethren, that they would go before unto you, and make up beforehand your bounty, whereof ye had notice before, that the same might be ready, as a matter of bounty, and not as of covetousness.
080905.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᏎ ᏱᎦᏥᏁᏤᎸ ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏟ ᎠᏇᎵᏒᎩ ᎢᎬᏱ ᏫᎨᏥᎷᏤᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᎬᏱ ᏭᎾᏛᏅᎢᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎢᏥᏗ ᎨᏒ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏳᎳ ᎧᏁᎢᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏛᏅᎢᏍᏔᏃᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏥᏰᎸᎯ ᎢᏥᏅᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎥᏝᏃ ᎢᏥᎨᏳᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ.
080905.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di a-se yi-ga-tsi-ne-tse-lv a-na-li-nv-tli a-que-li-sv-gi i-gv-yi wi-ge-tsi-lu-tse-di-yi, a-le i-gv-yi wu-na-dv-nv-i-s-do-di-yi i-tsi-di ge-sv, na-s-gi ga-yu-la ka-ne-i-s-ta-nv-hi tsi-gi, na-s-gi a-dv-nv-i-s-ta-no-nv-hi yi-gi, na-s-gi-ya o-si-yu i-tsi-ye-lv-hi i-tsi-nv-hi ge-sv-i, v-tla-no i-tsi-ge-yu-nv-hi na-s-gi-ya-i.

080906.english: But this I say, He which soweth sparingly shall reap also sparingly; and he which soweth bountifully shall reap also bountifully.
080906.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏍᎩᏂ [ᏄᏍᏗ;] ᎩᎶ ᎦᏲᎵ ᎠᏫᏍᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎦᏲᎵ ᎤᏍᎫᏕᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎤᎪᏗ ᎠᏫᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᎪᏗ ᎤᏍᎫᏕᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
080906.phonetic: Hi-a-s-gi-ni [nu-s-di;] Gi-lo ga-yo-li a-wi-s-gi, na-s-gi na na-s-quo ga-yo-li u-s-gu-de-s-di ge-se-s-di; a-le gi-lo u-go-di a-wi-s-gi na-s-gi na na-s-quo u-go-di u-s-gu-de-s-di ge-se-s-di.

080907.english: Every man according as he purposeth in his heart, so let him give; not grudgingly, or of necessity: for God loveth a cheerful giver.
080907.cherokee: ᎾᏂᎥ ᎩᎶ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎠᎾᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᏧᏂᎾᏫᏱ [ᎠᏂᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ;] ᎥᏝᏍᏗ ᏝᏉ ᎤᏂᏰᎸᎯ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏎ ᎤᏂᏗᏱ ᏥᏂᎨᎬᏁᎰ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᎤᎨᏳᎭ ᎤᎦᎵᏍᏗ ᎤᏓᏁᏘ ᎠᎲᏍᎩ.
080907.phonetic: Na-ni-v gi-lo na-s-gi-ya nu-s-dv a-na-da-nv-te-s-gv tsu-ni-na-wi-yi [a-ni-hv-s-ge-s-di;] v-tla-s-di tla-quo u-ni-ye-lv-hi, v-tla a-le a-se u-ni-di-yi tsi-ni-ge-gv-ne-ho i-yu-s-di; U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no u-ge-yu-ha u-ga-li-s-di u-da-ne-ti a-hv-s-gi.

080908.english: And God is able to make all grace abound toward you; that ye, always having all sufficiency in all things, may abound to every good work:
080908.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᏰᎵᏉ ᎨᏥᏁᏗ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎯ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᏂᏥᏂᎬᏎᎲᎾ ᎨᏒ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ, ᎣᏍᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏣᏘ ᏗᎨᏥᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
080908.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no ye-li-quo ge-tsi-ne-di u-tsa-ti nu-da-le-sv go-hu-s-di, na-s-gi ni-hi ni-go-hi-lv ni-tsi-ni-gv-se-hv-na ge-sv ni-ga-v tsu-da-le-nv-dv, o-s-dv ge-sv u-tsa-ti di-ge-tsi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

080909.english: (As it is written, He hath dispersed abroad; he hath given to the poor: his righteousness remaineth for ever.
080909.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᎬᏅ ᏥᎪᏪᎳ, ᏚᏗᎦᎴᏯᏍᏔᏅ; ᎤᏲ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᎿᎭᏕᎩ ᏚᏁᎸ; ᎤᏓᏅᏘᏳ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏩᏍᏗᏉ ᏂᎪᎯᎸᎢ.
080909.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya hi-a tsi-ni-gv-nv tsi-go-we-la, Du-di-ga-le-ya-s-ta-nv; u-yo i-yu-na-dv-hna-de-gi du-ne-lv; u-da-nv-ti-yu ge-sv nv-wa-s-di-quo ni-go-hi-lv-i.

080910.english: Now he that ministereth seed to the sower both minister bread for your food, and multiply your seed sown, and increase the fruits of your righteousness;)
080910.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ Ꮎ ᎤᎦᏔ ᎠᏫᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᏚ ᎠᎵᏍᏓᏴᏙᏗ ᎠᏓᏁᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎢᏥᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎪᏓᏗᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᏫᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏁᏉᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎢᏣᏓᏅᏘᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎦᏔᏔᏅᎯ;
080910.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no na u-ga-ta a-wi-s-gi u-ne-hi tsi-gi, a-le ga-du a-li-s-da-yv-do-di a-da-ne-hi tsi-gi, i-tsi-ne-di ge-se-s-di a-le u-go-da-di-s-di ge-se-s-di i-tsi-wi-s-di ge-sv-i, a-le u-ne-quo-s-di ge-se-s-di i-tsa-da-nv-ti-yu ge-sv u-ga-ta-ta-nv-hi;

080911.english: Being enriched in every thing to all bountifulness, which causeth through us thanksgiving to God.
080911.cherokee: ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎢᏤᏅᎢᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎨᏒ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎨᏣᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᎬᏂᏐᏗᏱ ᎠᎦᎵᎮᎵᏤᏗᏱ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ.
080911.phonetic: Nu-da-le-sv go-hu-s-di i-tse-nv-i-s-ta-nv-hi ge-sv, na-s-gi u-tsa-ti ge-tsa-da-ne-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi i-yu-gv-ni-so-di-yi a-ga-li-he-li-tse-di-yi U-ne-la-nv-hi.

080912.english: For the administration of this service not only supplieth the want of the saints, but is abundant also by many thanksgivings unto God;
080912.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᎠᏯᏔᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏥᏅᎯ, ᎥᏝ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘ ᎤᏂᏂᎬᏎᎲ ᎠᎧᎵᎢᎯ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏱᎩ, ᎾᏍᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᎾᎵᎮᎵᏤᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏂᎬᏁᎭ;
080912.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no a-ya-ta-s-di ge-sv i-tsi-nv-hi, v-tla u-na-da-nv-ti u-ni-ni-gv-se-hv a-ka-li-i-hi u-wa-sv yi-gi, na-s-quo-s-gi-ni u-tsa-ti u-na-li-he-li-tse-di U-ne-la-nv-hi ni-gv-ne-ha;

080913.english: Whiles by the experiment of this ministration they glorify God for your professed subjection unto the gospel of Christ, and for your liberal distribution unto them, and unto all men;
080913.cherokee: ᎠᏂᎪᏩᏗᏍᎬᏰᏃ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎤᎾᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏛᏂᎸᏉᏔᏂ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏂᏨᏁᎲ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏒ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏂᏥᎨᏳᎿᎭᎥᎾ ᎨᏒ ᏕᏥᏁᎲ ᎾᏍᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏂᎥᏉ;
