080913.phonetic: A-ni-go-wa-di-s-gv-ye-no i-yu-s-di na-s-gi hi-a u-na-li-s-de-lv-do-di ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi dv-ni-lv-quo-ta-ni ni-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di gv-ni-ge-sv ni-tsv-ne-hv i-tso-hi-yu-sv o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li-ga, a-le ni-ga-li-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di ni-tsi-ge-yu-hna-v-na ge-sv de-tsi-ne-hv na-s-gi, a-le na-ni-v-quo;

080914.english: And by their prayer for you, which long after you for the exceeding grace of God in you.
080914.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎠᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎨᏥᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎤᏣᏘ ᎨᏥᎨᏳᏒ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᏥᏁᎸᎢ.
080914.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi i-yu-s-di a-na-da-do-li-s-di-s-gv ge-tsi-ne-i-s-di-s-ge-s-di, u-tsa-ti ge-tsi-ge-yu-sv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv u-tsa-ti gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi i-tsi-ne-lv-i.

080915.english: Thanks be unto God for his unspeakable gift.
080915.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎵᎮᎵᏤᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎦᏃᎮᎰᎲᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎩ.
080915.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi a-li-he-li-tse-di ge-se-s-di ni-ga-li-s-do-di-ha na-s-gi u-da-ne-di ge-sv ga-no-he-ho-hv-s-di ni-ge-sv-na tsi-gi.

081001.english: Now I Paul myself beseech you by the meekness and gentleness of Christ, who in presence am base among you, but being absent am bold toward you:
081001.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎠᏴ ᏉᎳ ᎠᏋᏒ ᎢᏨᏍᏗᏰᏗᎭ ᏥᏁᎢᏍᏗᎭ ᎤᏙᎵᏍᏙᏏᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᏅᏘᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏨᏰᎳᏗᏙᎰ ᎠᏆᏓᎾᏰᏍᏗ ᏥᎨᎰᎢ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᎩᎪᏁᎸ ᏂᏨᎾᏰᏍᎬᎾ ᏥᎩ ᏂᎯ^
081001.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no a-yv Quo-la a-quv-sv i-tsv-s-di-ye-di-ha tsi-ne-i-s-di-ha u-do-li-s-do-si-yu ge-sv a-le u-da-nv-ti-yu ge-sv Ga-lo-ne-dv, a-yv na-s-gi tsi-tsv-ye-la-di-do-ho a-qua-da-na-ye-s-di tsi-ge-ho-i, a-se-no a-gi-go-ne-lv ni-tsv-na-ye-s-gv-na tsi-gi ni-hi^

081002.english: But I beseech you, that I may not be bold when I am present with that confidence, wherewith I think to be bold against some, which think of us as if we walked according to the flesh.
081002.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎢᏨᏔᏲᏎᎭ ᎢᏨᏰᎳᏗᏙᎲ ᎾᏆᏓᎾᏰᏍᏛᎾ ᎢᏯᏆᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏆᏓᎾᏰᏍᏛᎾ ᎦᏥᏴᏓᏁᏗ ᏣᎩᏰᎸᎭ ᎢᎦᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᏓᏂᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗ ᏥᎪᎨᎵᏎᎭ.
081002.phonetic: A-se-no i-tsv-ta-yo-se-ha i-tsv-ye-la-di-do-hv na-qua-da-na-ye-s-dv-na i-ya-qua-li-s-do-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na, na-s-gi-ya na-qua-da-na-ye-s-dv-na ga-tsi-yv-da-ne-di tsa-gi-ye-lv-ha i-ga-dv, na-s-gi u-que-da-li a-da-nv-te-s-gv da-ni-ka-hna-wa-di tsi-go-ge-li-se-ha.

081003.english: For though we walk in the flesh, we do not war after the flesh:
081003.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎤᏇᏓᎸ ᎤᏤᏙᎭ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᏧᏟᏴᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏱᏙᏣᏟᏴᏗᎭ;
081003.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-s-gi-ni-no-nv u-que-da-lv u-tse-do-ha, a-se-no v-tla u-que-da-li tsu-tli-yv-do-di ge-sv yi-do-tsa-tli-yv-di-ha;

081004.english: (For the weapons of our warfare are not carnal, but mighty through God to the pulling down of strong holds;)
081004.cherokee: (ᎣᎦᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗᏰᏃ ᎨᏒ ᏓᏅᏩ ᎣᏣᎢᏒ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᏧᏩᏙᏗ ᏱᎩ, ᏧᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏌᏛ, ᏓᏐᏲᎥᏗᏍᎬ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᏓᏐᏴᎢ.)
081004.phonetic: (O-ga-li-s-de-lv-do-di-ye-no ge-sv da-nv-wa o-tsa-i-sv v-tla u-que-da-li tsu-wa-do-di yi-gi, tsu-li-ni-gi-di-yu-s-gi-ni U-ne-la-nv-hi i-yu-wa-ni-sa-dv, da-so-yo-v-di-s-gv u-li-ni-gi-dv da-so-yv-i.)

081005.english: Casting down imaginations, and every high thing that exalteth itself against the knowledge of God, and bringing into captivity every thought to the obedience of Christ;
081005.cherokee: ᎡᎳᏗ ᏂᏙᏨᏁᎰ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏗ ᎨᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᎢᏅ ᎢᎦᏘ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏓᎵᏌᎳᏗᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎠᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏗᎦᏘᎴᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏙᏥᏎᎪᎩᏍᎪ ᏙᏣᏘᏁᎪ ᏄᏓᎴᏒ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎬᏬᎯᏳᏗᏱ ᏃᏨᏁᎰᎢ;
081005.phonetic: E-la-di ni-do-tsv-ne-ho a-da-nv-te-di ge-sv, a-le nu-da-le-sv i-nv i-ga-ti na-s-gi a-da-li-sa-la-di-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li a-ga-do-v-hi-s-di ge-sv di-ga-ti-le-gi, a-le do-tsi-se-go-gi-s-go do-tsa-ti-ne-go nu-da-le-sv a-da-nv-te-di ge-sv Ga-lo-ne-dv gv-wo-hi-yu-di-yi no-tsv-ne-ho-i;

081006.english: And having in a readiness to revenge all disobedience, when your obedience is fulfilled.
081006.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎣᎦᏛᏅᎢᏍᏗ ᏦᏥᏍᏛᏗᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏄᏃᎯᏳᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏒ ᎤᎧᎵᏨᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
081006.phonetic: A-le o-ga-dv-nv-i-s-di tso-tsi-s-dv-di-s-do-di-yi na-ni-v nu-no-hi-yu-sv-na ge-sv-i, na-hi-yu i-tso-hi-yu-sv u-ka-li-tsv-hi ge-se-s-di.

081007.english: Do ye look on things after the outward appearance? If any man trust to himself that he is Christ's, let him of himself think this again, that, as he is Christ's, even so are we Christ's.
081007.cherokee: ᏥᎪ ᎦᏚ-ᎢᏗᏢ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏗᎧᏃᏗᏱ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏕᏣᎧᏂᏍᎪᎢ?  ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏩᏒᏉ ᎠᏓᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏯᏤᎵ ᎠᏴ ᎢᎡᎵᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎤᏩᏒ ᎨᏒ ᏔᎵᏁ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᎠᏓᏅᏛᎵ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏴ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎣᏣᏤᎵᎦ.
081007.phonetic: Tsi-go ga-du--i-di-tlv nu-s-dv di-ka-no-di-yi go-hu-s-di de-tsa-ka-ni-s-go-i?  i-yu-no gi-lo u-wa-sv-quo a-da-li-s-ga-s-do-di-s-ge-s-di Ga-lo-ne-dv tsi-ya-tse-li a-yv i-e-li-s-ge-s-di, u-wa-sv ge-sv ta-li-ne hi-a na-s-gi tsi-a-da-nv-dv-li, na-s-gi na-s-gi-ya Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li ge-sv na-s-gi, na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo a-yv Ga-lo-ne-dv o-tsa-tse-li-ga.

081008.english: For though I should boast somewhat more of our authority, which the Lord hath given us for edification, and not for your destruction, I should not be ashamed:
081008.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ ᏯᏆᏢᏈᏍᏔᏅ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎣᎦᏒᎦᎸᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏦᎩᏁᎸ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎥᏝᏃ ᎡᎳᏗ ᎢᏰᏨᏁᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᏱᎦᎦᏕᎣᏍᎦ.
081008.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no na-s-quo u-tli i-ga-i ya-qua-tlv-qui-s-ta-nv nu-s-dv o-ga-sv-ga-lv-i, na-s-gi U-gv-wi-yu-hi tso-gi-ne-lv i-tsa-li-s-de-lv-do-di ge-sv-i, v-tla-no e-la-di i-ye-tsv-ne-do-di ge-sv-i, v-tla yi-ga-ga-de-o-s-ga.

081009.english: That I may not seem as if I would terrify you by letters.
081009.cherokee: ᏞᏍᏗ ᎠᏗᎾ ᎢᏨᏲᏪᎳᏁᎲ ᎢᏨᏍᎦᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱᏉ ᏣᎩᏰᎸᏐ ᏱᏅᏩᏍᏕᏍᏗ.
081009.phonetic: Tle-s-di a-di-na i-tsv-yo-we-la-ne-hv i-tsv-s-ga-s-da-ne-di-yi-quo tsa-gi-ye-lv-so yi-nv-wa-s-de-s-di.

081010.english: For his letters, say they, are weighty and powerful; but his bodily presence is weak, and his speech contemptible.
081010.cherokee: ᏕᎪᏪᎵᏍᎬᏰᏃ ᏗᎦᎨᏗᏳ ᎠᎴ ᏧᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ, ᎤᏙᎯᏳ, ᎠᎾᏗᎭ; ᎠᏰᎸᏍᎩᏂ ᏲᏪᎳᏗᏙᎭ ᎠᏩᎾᎦᎳᎯᏳ, ᎦᏬᏂᏍᎬᏃ ᎬᏕᎰᏙᏗᏉ.
081010.phonetic: De-go-we-li-s-gv-ye-no di-ga-ge-di-yu a-le tsu-li-ni-gi-di-yu, u-do-hi-yu, a-na-di-ha; a-ye-lv-s-gi-ni yo-we-la-di-do-ha a-wa-na-ga-la-hi-yu, ga-wo-ni-s-gv-no gv-de-ho-do-di-quo.

081011.english: Let such an one think this, that, such as we are in word by letters when we are absent, such will we be also in deed when we are present.
081011.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏰᎵᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏃᎦᏍᏛ ᎣᏥᏬᏂᏍᎬ ᏙᏦᏪᎵᏍᎬᎢ, ᎾᎿ ᎭᏫᏃᏤᏙᎲᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏃᎦᏍᏕᏍᏗ ᏙᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎾᎿ ᎭᏬᏤᏙᎮᏍᏗ.
081011.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-ye-li-s-gi hi-a na-s-gi nu-s-de-s-di a-da-nv-te-s-ge-s-di, na-s-gi a-yv na-s-gi-ya no-ga-s-dv o-tsi-wo-ni-s-gv do-tso-we-li-s-gv-i, na-hna wi-no-tse-do-hv-na ge-sv-i, na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo no-ga-s-de-s-di do-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv hna-quo na-hna wo-tse-do-he-s-di.

081012.english: For we dare not make ourselves of the number, or compare ourselves with some that commend themselves: but they measuring themselves by themselves, and comparing themselves among themselves, are not wise.
081012.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏰᎵ ᎦᏲᎦᎵᏠᏯᏍᏙᏗ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏗᎦᏲᎦᏓᏟᎶᏍᏙᏗ ᏱᎩ ᏄᎾᏍᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎠᎾᏓᎸᏉᏗᏍᎩ; ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏅᏒᏉ ᏄᎾᏍᏛ ᏓᎾᏓᏟᎶᏍᏗᏍᎬ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏅᏒᏉ ᏓᎾᏓᏤᎳᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎥᏝ ᏳᎾᏓᏅᏔ.
081012.phonetic: V-tla-ye-no ye-li ga-yo-ga-li-tlo-ya-s-do-di yi-gi, a-le di-ga-yo-ga-da-tli-lo-s-do-di yi-gi nu-na-s-dv na-s-gi u-nv-sv a-na-da-lv-quo-di-s-gi; na-s-gi-ye-no u-nv-sv ge-sv u-nv-sv-quo nu-na-s-dv da-na-da-tli-lo-s-di-s-gv, a-le u-nv-sv-quo da-na-da-tse-la-s-di-s-gv v-tla yu-na-da-nv-ta.

081013.english: But we will not boast of things without our measure, but according to the measure of the rule which God hath distributed to us, a measure to reach even unto you.
081013.cherokee: ᎠᏴᏍᎩᏂ ᎥᏝ ᏴᎦᏲᏣᏢᏈ ᎠᎦᏲᏥᎶᏒᏍᏓ ᎠᏟᎶᎥᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏯᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᏩᏍᏛ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎠᏟᎶᎥ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏙᎩᏲᎯᏎᎸᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏟᎶᏍᏗ ᏂᎯ ᏗᏤᎲ ᏫᎦᎷᎩ.
081013.phonetic: A-yv-s-gi-ni v-tla yv-ga-yo-tsa-tlv-qui a-ga-yo-tsi-lo-sv-s-da a-tli-lo-v-i; na-s-gi-ya-quo-s-gi-ni wa-s-dv i-yv-dv a-tli-lo-v U-ne-la-nv-hi do-gi-yo-hi-se-lv-i, na-s-gi a-tli-lo-s-di ni-hi di-tse-hv wi-ga-lu-gi.

081014.english: For we stretch not ourselves beyond our measure, as though we reached not unto you: for we are come as far as to you also in preaching the gospel of Christ:
081014.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏲᏥᎶᏒᏍᏗᎭ ᎣᎦᏟᎶᏒᎸᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎯ ᏗᏤᎲ ᏫᎦᏲᎩᎷᎯᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎨᏐ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ; ᏂᎯᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏗᏤᎲ ᎢᏴᏛ ᏬᎩᎷᏨ ᎣᏣᎵᏥᏙᎲᏍᎬ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ;
081014.phonetic: V-tla-ye-no yo-tsi-lo-sv-s-di-ha o-ga-tli-lo-sv-lv-i, na-s-gi-ya ni-hi di-tse-hv wi-ga-yo-gi-lu-hi-s-di ni-ge-sv-na tsi-ge-so i-yu-s-di; ni-hi-ye-no na-s-quo di-tse-hv i-yv-dv wo-gi-lu-tsv o-tsa-li-tsi-do-hv-s-gv o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li-ga;

081015.english: Not boasting of things without our measure, that is, of other men's labours; but having hope, when your faith is increased, that we shall be enlarged by you according to our rule abundantly,
081015.cherokee: ᏃᏣᏢᏈᏍᏗᏍᎬᎾ ᎠᏟᎶᎥ ᏙᏱᏗᏢ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏂᏐᎢ ᏴᏫ ᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᎢ; ᎤᏚᎩᏍᎩᏂ ᎣᎬᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᏒ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎤᏁᏉᏨᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᏂᎯ ᏍᎩᏁᏉᎡᏗᏱ ᏍᎩᏍᏕᎸᏗᏱ ᏩᏍᏛ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎣᎦᏟᎶᎡᎸ ᏬᎩᎶᏒᏍᏙᏗᏱ,
081015.phonetic: No-tsa-tlv-qui-s-di-s-gv-na a-tli-lo-v do-yi-di-tlv ge-sv-i, na-s-gi a-ni-so-i yv-wi du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-i; u-du-gi-s-gi-ni o-gv-sv-i, na-s-gi i-tso-hi-yu-sv hna-quo u-ne-quo-tsv-hi ge-se-s-di, ni-hi s-gi-ne-quo-e-di-yi s-gi-s-de-lv-di-yi wa-s-dv i-yv-dv o-ga-tli-lo-e-lv wo-gi-lo-sv-s-do-di-yi,

081016.english: To preach the gospel in the regions beyond you, and not to boast in another man's line of things made ready to our hand.
081016.cherokee: ᎣᎦᎵᏥᏙᏗᏱ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᏗᏤᎲ ᎤᏗᏗᏢ, ᎥᏝᏃ ᎣᎦᏢᏈᏍᏗᏱ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬ ᏅᏩᏓᏕ ᎩᎶ ᏩᏍᏛ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎠᎦᏟᎶᎡᎸᎢ, ᎦᏳᎳ ᎣᎦᏛᏅᎢᏍᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
081016.phonetic: O-ga-li-tsi-do-di-yi o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv di-tse-hv u-di-di-tlv, v-tla-no o-ga-tlv-qui-s-di-yi nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv nv-wa-da-de gi-lo wa-s-dv i-yv-dv a-ga-tli-lo-e-lv-i, ga-yu-la o-ga-dv-nv-i-s-da-ne-lv-hi ge-sv-i.

081017.english: But he that glorieth, let him glory in the Lord.

081018.english: For not he that commendeth himself is approved, but whom the Lord commendeth.
081018.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎠᏓᎸᏉᏗᏍᎩ ᏣᎦᏓᏂᎸᎢᏍᏗ ᏱᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩᏍᎩᏂ Ꮎ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᎸᏉᏔᏅᎯ.
081018.phonetic: V-tla-ye-no na-s-gi na u-wa-sv a-da-lv-quo-di-s-gi tsa-ga-da-ni-lv-i-s-di yi-gi, na-s-gi-s-gi-ni na U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-lv-quo-ta-nv-hi.

081101.english: Would to God ye could bear with me a little in my folly: and indeed bear with me.
081101.cherokee: ᏲᎯᏉ ᎤᏍᏗᎩᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᎨᏍᎩᏰᎵᏎᏗ ᏱᎩ ᎠᎩᏁᎫ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᏍᎩᏰᎵᏏ.
081101.phonetic: Yo-hi-quo u-s-di-gi-dv u-ne-la-gi ge-s-gi-ye-li-se-di yi-gi a-gi-ne-gu ge-sv-i; a-le u-do-hi-yu-hi u-ne-la-gi s-gi-ye-li-si.

081102.english: For I am jealous over you with godly jealousy: for I have espoused you to one husband, that I may present you as a chaste virgin to Christ.
081102.cherokee: ᏕᏨᏰᎷᎦᏰᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏗᎬᏩᏓ ᏂᎸᎢᏍᏗ ᎠᏛᏳᎨᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏗᎭ; ᏌᏉᏰᏃ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᏗᏣᏨᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᏨᏴᏁᎸ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎵᏏᎾᎯᏍᏗ ᎠᏛ ᎢᎦᎦᏛ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏫᏗᏨᏲᎯᏎᏗᏱ.
081102.phonetic: De-tsv-ye-lu-ga-ye-no U-ne-la-nv-hi di-gv-wa-da ni-lv-i-s-di a-dv-yu-ge-di ge-sv gv-di-ha; sa-quo-ye-no a-s-ga-ya di-tsa-tsv-s-di-yi ni-tsv-yv-ne-lv, na-s-gi u-li-si-na-hi-s-di a-dv i-ga-ga-dv Ga-lo-ne-dv wi-di-tsv-yo-hi-se-di-yi.

081103.english: But I fear, lest by any means, as the serpent beguiled Eve through his subtilty, so your minds should be corrupted from the simplicity that is in Christ.
081103.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏥᎾᏰᏍᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ Ꮎ ᎢᎾᏛ ᏧᎶᏄᎮᎴ ᎢᏫ ᎠᏏᎾᏌᏅ ᏥᎬᏗᏍᎨᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛ ᏱᏓᎪᎸᎾ ᏗᏥᏲᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏱᏂᎬᎦ ᏄᏠᎾᏍᏛᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ.
081103.phonetic: A-se-no tsi-na-ye-s-ga, na-s-gi-ya na i-na-dv tsu-lo-nu-he-le I-wi a-si-na-sa-nv tsi-gv-di-s-ge-i, na-s-gi-ya de-tsa-da-nv-dv yi-da-go-lv-na di-tsi-yo-hi-s-di-yi yi-ni-gv-ga nu-tlo-na-s-dv-na ge-sv Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li-ga.

081104.english: For if he that cometh preacheth another Jesus, whom we have not preached, or if ye receive another spirit, which ye have not received, or another gospel, which ye have not accepted, ye might well bear with him.
081104.cherokee: ᎩᎶᏰᏃ ᎢᏥᎷᏤᎯ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᏥᏌ ᎠᎵᏥᏙᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᏴ ᎣᏣᎵᏥᏙᏅᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎢᏳ ᎠᎴ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᏙᏣᏓᏂᎸᏨᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏗᏣᏓᏂᎸᏨᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᏅᏩᏓᎴ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏗᏣᏓᏂᎸᏨᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎣᏏᏳᏉ ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᏱᏤᎵᏒ.
081104.phonetic: Gi-lo-ye-no i-tsi-lu-tse-hi nv-wa-da-le Tsi-sa a-li-tsi-do-hv-s-ge-s-di, na-s-gi na a-yv o-tsa-li-tsi-do-nv-hi ni-ge-sv-na, i-yu a-le nv-wa-da-le a-da-nv-do do-tsa-da-ni-lv-tsv-ha, na-s-gi na di-tsa-da-ni-lv-tsv-hi ni-ge-sv-na, a-le nv-wa-da-le o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv, na-s-gi na di-tsa-da-ni-lv-tsv-hi ni-ge-sv-na, o-si-yu-quo u-ne-la-gi yi-tse-li-sv.

081105.english: For I suppose I was not a whit behind the very chiefest apostles.
081105.cherokee: ᎦᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬᏰᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏍᏗ ᎤᏅ ᎡᏍᎦ ᏱᎦᏥᏲᎠᏍᎦ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ.
081105.phonetic: Ga-da-nv-te-s-gv-ye-no v-tla u-s-di u-nv e-s-ga yi-ga-tsi-yo-a-s-ga nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv ge-tsi-nv-si-dv ge-sv-i.

081106.english: But though I be rude in speech, yet not in knowledge; but we have been throughly made manifest among you in all things.
081106.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᏅᏇᏲᏅᎾ ᏱᎩ ᎠᎩᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗᏱ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏱᏄᏍᏗ ᏥᎦᏔᎾᎥᎢ; ᏂᎦᎥᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᏃᎦᏍᏛ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏃᎦᎵᏍᏔᏅ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎲ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏤᎲᎢ.
081106.phonetic: U-ne-la-gi nv-que-yo-nv-na yi-gi a-gi-wo-ni-hi-s-di-yi, a-se-no v-tla na-s-gi yi-nu-s-di tsi-ga-ta-na-v-i; ni-ga-v-quo-s-gi-ni no-ga-s-dv gv-ni-ge-sv no-ga-li-s-ta-nv na-ni-v a-ni-ga-ta-hv ni-hi i-tse-hv-i.

081107.english: Have I committed an offence in abasing myself that ye might be exalted, because I have preached to you the gospel of God freely?
081107.cherokee: ᏥᎪ ᏥᏍᎦᏅᎩ ᎡᎳᏗ ᏥᎾᏆᏓᏛᏁᎸ, ᏂᎯ ᎡᏥᏌᎳᏙᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏗᏨᎬᏩᎶᏓᏁᎸᎾ ᏥᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎢᏨᏯᎵᏥᏙᏁᎸᎢ?
081107.phonetic: Tsi-go tsi-s-ga-nv-gi e-la-di tsi-na-qua-da-dv-ne-lv, ni-hi e-tsi-sa-la-do-di-yi, na-s-gi ni-di-tsv-gv-wa-lo-da-ne-lv-na tsi-gi o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga i-tsv-ya-li-tsi-do-ne-lv-i?

081108.english: I robbed other churches, taking wages of them, to do you service.
081108.cherokee: ᏕᎦᏥᎾᏌᏅ ᏅᏩᎾᏓᎴ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᏚᎾᏓᏡᏩᏗᏒᎢ, ᏥᎩᏍᎬᎩ ᎬᏆᎫᏴᎡᎲᎢ, ᏂᎯ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎢᏨᏯᏛᏁᏗᏱ.
081108.phonetic: De-ga-tsi-na-sa-nv nv-wa-na-da-le tsu-na-ne-lo-di du-na-da-tlu-wa-di-sv-i, tsi-gi-s-gv-gi gv-qua-gu-yv-e-hv-i, ni-hi go-hu-s-di i-tsv-ya-dv-ne-di-yi.

081109.english: And when I was present with you, and wanted, I was chargeable to no man: for that which was lacking to me the brethren which came from Macedonia supplied: and in all things I have kept myself from being burdensome unto you, and so will I keep myself.
081109.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᎯᏳ ᏥᏨᏰᎳᏗᏙᎲᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏆᏚᎸᎲᎥᎦ, ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᏯᏆᎫᏱᏍᎨᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎠᎩᏂᎬᏎᎲᎢ, ᎣᏣᎵᏅᏟ ᎹᏏᏙᏂ ᏅᏓᏳᏂᎶᏒᎯ ᎬᎩᏁᎲᎩ; ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥᏉ ᎠᏆᏟᏂᎬᏁᎸ ᎢᏨᏐᏈᎸᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏏᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ.
081109.phonetic: A-le na-hi-yu tsi-tsv-ye-la-di-do-hv-gi a-le a-qua-du-lv-hv-v-ga, v-tla gi-lo ya-qua-gu-yi-s-ge-i; na-s-gi-ye-no a-gi-ni-gv-se-hv-i, o-tsa-li-nv-tli Ma-si-do-ni nv-da-yu-ni-lo-sv-hi gv-gi-ne-hv-gi; a-le ni-ga-v-quo a-qua-tli-ni-gv-ne-lv i-tsv-so-qui-lv-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na, a-le a-si-quo na-s-gi ni-ga-dv-ne-he-s-di.

081110.english: As the truth of Christ is in me, no man shall stop me of this boasting in the regions of Achaia.
081110.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ ᏣᎩᏯᎠ, ᎥᏝ ᎥᎩᏲᎯᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᏱᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏢᏈᏍᎬ ᎡᎧᏯ ᏂᎬᎾᏛᎢ.
081110.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ya Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li ga-ye-go-gi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv tsa-gi-ya-a, v-tla v-gi-yo-hi-s-da-ne-di yi-ge-se-s-di hi-a na-s-gi ga-tlv-qui-s-gv E-ka-ya ni-gv-na-dv-i.

081111.english: Wherefore? because I love you not? God knoweth.
081111.cherokee: ᎦᏙᏃ?  ᏥᎪ ᏂᏨᎨᏳᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ?  ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏔᎭ.
081111.phonetic: Ga-do-no?  tsi-go ni-tsv-ge-yu-sv-na ge-sv i-yu-s-di?  U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ga-ta-ha.

081112.english: But what I do, that I will do, that I may cut off occasion from them which desire occasion; that wherein they glory, they may be found even as we.
081112.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᏂᎦᏛᏁᎲ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᎦᏛᏁᎮᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᏥᏲᏍᏙᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᎤᎾᏜᏓᏅᏓᏕᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏧᎾᏚᎵᎭ ᎤᎾᏜᏓᏅᏓᏕᏗᏱ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎿ ᎭᎠᎾᏢᏈᏍᎬ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᏃᎦᏍᏛ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏄᎾᏍᏛ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏱᏂᎦᎵᏍᏓ.
081112.phonetic: A-se-no ni-ga-dv-ne-hv na-s-gi ni-ga-ga-dv-ne-he-s-di, na-s-gi ga-tsi-yo-s-do-da-ne-di-yi u-na-dla-nv-da-de-di-yi na-s-gi na tsu-na-du-li-ha u-na-dla-nv-da-de-di-yi; na-s-gi na-hna a-na-tlv-qui-s-gv na-s-gi a-yv no-ga-s-dv na-s-gi-ya nu-na-s-dv gv-ni-ge-sv yi-ni-ga-li-s-da.

081113.english: For such are false apostles, deceitful workers, transforming themselves into the apostles of Christ.
081113.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᎾᏠᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ, ᎤᎾᏓᎵᏓᏍᏗ ᏧᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ, ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏧᏤᎵ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ ᎠᎾᏤᎸᏍᎩ.
081113.phonetic: Hi-a-ye-no na-s-gi na u-na-tlo-na-s-gi ge-tsi-nv-si-dv, u-na-da-li-da-s-di tsu-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi, Ga-lo-ne-dv tsu-tse-li ge-tsi-nv-si-dv a-na-tse-lv-s-gi.

081114.english: And no marvel; for Satan himself is transformed into an angel of light.
081114.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᏳᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ; ᏎᏓᏂᏰᏃ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎯ ᎢᎦ-ᎦᏛ ᎡᎯ ᎠᏤᎸᏍᎪᎢ.
081114.phonetic: V-tla a-le yu-s-qua-ni-go-di; Se-da-ni-ye-no u-wa-sv di-ka-hna-wa-di-do-hi i-ga--ga-dv e-hi a-tse-lv-s-go-i.

081115.english: Therefore it is no great thing if his ministers also be transformed as the ministers of righteousness; whose end shall be according to their works.
081115.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗᏳ ᏱᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᏯᎾᏤᎸᏍᎦ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎵᏍᏆᎸᏗ ᎢᏳᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏚᏂᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
081115.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di v-tla u-tsa-ti u-s-qua-ni-go-di-yu yi-gi na-s-quo na-s-gi tsu-nv-si-da-s-di du-yu-go-dv ge-sv ge-tsi-nv-si-da-s-di ya-na-tse-lv-s-ga; na-s-gi u-li-s-qua-lv-di i-yu-na-li-s-da-ne-di ge-sv na-s-gi-ya du-ni-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv ge-se-s-di.

081116.english: I say again, Let no man think me a fool; if otherwise, yet as a fool receive me, that I may boast myself a little.
081116.cherokee: ᏔᎵᏁ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏥᏪᎭ, ᏞᏍᏗ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏁᎫ ᏯᏇᎵᏎᎮᏍᏗ; ᎢᏳ ᎠᏗᎾ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏕᏍᏗ, ᎠᏎ ᎠᎩᏁᎫ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏗᏍᎩᏯᏓᏂᎸᎩ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᎤᏍᏗ ᎠᏆᏢᏈᏍᏗᏱ.
081116.phonetic: Ta-li-ne hi-a ni-tsi-we-ha, Tle-s-di gi-lo u-ne-gu ya-que-li-se-he-s-di; i-yu a-di-na na-s-gi nu-s-de-s-di, a-se a-gi-ne-gu na-s-gi-ya di-s-gi-ya-da-ni-lv-gi, na-s-gi a-yv u-s-di a-qua-tlv-qui-s-di-yi.

081117.english: That which I speak, I speak it not after the Lord, but as it were foolishly, in this confidence of boasting.
081117.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏥᏪᏍᎬ ᏥᏁᎬ ᎥᏝ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᏳᏪᏍᏗ ᏱᏥᏁᎦ, ᎠᎩᏁᎫᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏥᏁᎦ, ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏥᎾᏰᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒ ᏥᎬᏗᎭ ᏥᎦᏢᏆᏍᎦ.
081117.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a ni-tsi-we-s-gv tsi-ne-gv v-tla U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-yu-we-s-di yi-tsi-ne-ga, a-gi-ne-gu-s-gi-ni na-s-gi-ya tsi-ne-ga, hi-a na-s-gi ni-tsi-na-ye-s-gv-na ge-sv tsi-gv-di-ha tsi-ga-tlv-qua-s-ga.

081118.english: Seeing that many glory after the flesh, I will glory also.
081118.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᏧᏂᏣᏔ ᏣᎾᏢᏈᏍᎦ ᎤᏇᏓᎵ ᎬᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏓᎦᏢᏆᏏ.
081118.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no tsu-ni-tsa-ta tsa-na-tlv-qui-s-ga u-que-da-li gv-do-di ge-sv-i, a-yv na-s-quo da-ga-tlv-qua-si.

081119.english: For ye suffer fools gladly, seeing ye yourselves are wise.
081119.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏁᎫᏰᏃ ᎤᎾᏁᎳᎩ ᏙᏤᎵᏎᎭ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎢᏥᏰᎸᎭ, ᏂᎯ ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎾᎢ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ.
081119.phonetic: U-ni-ne-gu-ye-no u-na-ne-la-gi do-tse-li-se-ha o-si-yu i-tsi-ye-lv-ha, ni-hi i-tsi-ga-ta-na-i ge-sv i-yu-s-di.

081120.english: For ye suffer, if a man bring you into bondage, if a man devour you, if a man take of you, if a man exalt himself, if a man smite you on the face.
081120.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᎩᏰᏃ ᎢᏤᎵᏍᎪ ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᏱᏗᏥᎾᏢᏅ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎠᏒᎭ ᏱᏂᏨᏁᎸ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ [ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᎲ] ᏱᏥᎩᎡᎸ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏳᏓᎵᏌᎳᏓᏅ, ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᏕᏣᎧᏛ ᏱᏨᏂᎸ.
081120.phonetic: U-ne-la-gi-ye-no i-tse-li-s-go i-yu-no gi-lo yi-di-tsi-na-tlv-nv, i-yu-no gi-lo a-sv-ha yi-ni-tsv-ne-lv, i-yu-no gi-lo [go-hu-s-di i-tsi-hv] yi-tsi-gi-e-lv, i-yu-no gi-lo u-wa-sv yu-da-li-sa-la-da-nv, i-yu-no gi-lo de-tsa-ka-dv yi-tsv-ni-lv.

081121.english: I speak as concerning reproach, as though we had been weak. Howbeit whereinsoever any is bold, (I speak foolishly,) I am bold also.
081121.cherokee: ᎤᏕᎰᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᏥᏁᎦ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏦᏥᏩᎾᎦᎳ ᎪᎪᏎᎲᎢ.  ᎾᎿᎭᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎩᎶ ᎬᏩᎾᏰᎯᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ (ᎤᏁᎫ ᎤᏁᎢᏍᏗ ᏥᏁᎦ,) ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᏥᎾᏰᏍᎬᎾ.
081121.phonetic: U-de-ho-hi-s-di ge-sv u-gv-wa-li tsi-ne-ga, na-s-gi tso-tsi-wa-na-ga-la go-go-se-hv-i.  Na-hna-s-gi-ni-no-nv gi-lo gv-wa-na-ye-hi-s-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv (u-ne-gu u-ne-i-s-di tsi-ne-ga,) a-yv na-s-quo ni-tsi-na-ye-s-gv-na.

081122.english: Are they Hebrews? so am I. Are they Israelites? so am I. Are they the seed of Abraham? so am I.
081122.cherokee: ᏥᎪ ᎢᎾᏈᎷ ᎾᏍᎩ?  ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᏉ. ᏥᎪ ᎠᏂᎢᏏᎵ?  ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᏉ.  ᎡᏆᎭᎻᏍᎪ ᏧᏁᏢᏔᏅᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ?  ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᏉ.
081122.phonetic: Tsi-go I-na-qui-lu na-s-gi?  a-yv na-s-quo. Tsi-go A-ni-i-si-li?  a-yv na-s-quo.  E-qua-ha-mi-s-go tsu-ne-tlv-ta-nv-dv na-s-gi?  a-yv na-s-quo.

081123.english: Are they ministers of Christ? (I speak as a fool) I am more; in labours more abundant, in stripes above measure, in prisons more frequent, in deaths oft.
081123.cherokee: ᏥᎪ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏧᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ?  (ᎤᏁᎫ ᎤᏁᎢᏍᏗ ᏥᏁᎦ,) ᎠᏴ ᎤᏟᎢ; ᏓᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ; ᎥᎩᎵᎥᏂᎸ ᎤᏟᎯᏳ ᎢᎦᎢ; ᏗᎦᏍᏚᏗᏱ ᎥᎩᏴᏔᏅᎢ ᎤᏟ ᎢᎦᎢ; ᎠᎩᏲᎱᏏᏕᎾ ᎨᏒ ᏯᏃᏉ;
081123.phonetic: Tsi-go Ga-lo-ne-dv tsu-nv-si-da-s-di na-s-gi?  (u-ne-gu u-ne-i-s-di tsi-ne-ga,) a-yv u-tli-i; da-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv u-tli i-ga-i; v-gi-li-v-ni-lv u-tli-hi-yu i-ga-i; di-ga-s-du-di-yi v-gi-yv-ta-nv-i u-tli i-ga-i; a-gi-yo-hu-si-de-na ge-sv ya-no-quo;

081124.english: Of the Jews five times received I forty stripes save one.
081124.cherokee: ᎠᏂᏧᏏ ᎯᏍᎩ ᏂᎬᎩᎵᎥᏂᎸᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗᎭ ᏌᏉ ᎦᎷᎶᎩ ᏅᎦᏍᎪᎯ ᎢᎬᏋᏂᏍᏗᏱ;
081124.phonetic: A-ni-tsu-si hi-s-gi ni-gv-gi-li-v-ni-lv-gi i-yu-s-di-ha sa-quo ga-lu-lo-gi nv-ga-s-go-hi i-gv-quv-ni-s-di-yi;

081125.english: Thrice was I beaten with rods, once was I stoned, thrice I suffered shipwreck, a night and a day I have been in the deep;
081125.cherokee: ᏦᎢ ᎢᏳᏩᎫᏗ ᎦᎾᏍᏓ ᏕᎬᎩᎵᎥᏂᏍᏔᏅᎩ; ᏌᏉ ᏅᏯ ᏂᏕᎬᏋᏂᏍᏔᏅᎩ; ᏦᎢ ᎢᏳᏩᎫᏗ ᏥᏳ ᎠᏆᏦᏛ ᎤᏲᏨᎩ; ᎤᎵᏨᏓᏆᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏙᏓᏆᏛ ᎠᏍᏛᎬ ᎾᏆᏛᏅᎩ;
081125.phonetic: Tso-i i-yu-wa-gu-di ga-na-s-da de-gv-gi-li-v-ni-s-ta-nv-gi; sa-quo nv-ya ni-de-gv-quv-ni-s-ta-nv-gi; tso-i i-yu-wa-gu-di tsi-yu a-qua-tso-dv u-yo-tsv-gi; u-li-tsv-da-qua-dv a-le u-do-da-qua-dv a-s-dv-gv na-qua-dv-nv-gi;

081126.english: In journeyings often, in perils of waters, in perils of robbers, in perils by mine own countrymen, in perils by the heathen, in perils in the city, in perils in the wilderness, in perils in the sea, in perils among false brethren;
081126.cherokee: ᎨᏙᎲ ᏯᏃᏉ; ᎡᏉᏂ ᏕᎨᏴ ᎤᎾᏰᎯᏍᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᏗᎾᏓᎾᏌᎲᏍᎩ ᎤᏂᎾᏰᎯᏍᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᏗᏆᏤᎵ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏂᎾᏰᎯᏍᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎤᏂᎾᏰᎯᏍᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎦᏚᎲ ᎤᎾᏰᎯᏍᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎢᎾᎨ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎾᏰᎯᏍᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᎺᏉᎯ ᎤᎾᏰᎯᏍᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎤᎾᏠᎾᏍᏗ ᎣᏣᎵᏅᏟ ᎤᏂᎾᏰᎯᏍᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ;
081126.phonetic: Ge-do-hv ya-no-quo; e-quo-ni de-ge-yv u-na-ye-hi-s-di-yu ge-sv-i; di-na-da-na-sa-hv-s-gi u-ni-na-ye-hi-s-di-yu ge-sv-i; di-qua-tse-li yv-wi u-ni-na-ye-hi-s-di-yu ge-sv-i; tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi u-ni-na-ye-hi-s-di-yu ge-sv-i; ga-du-hv u-na-ye-hi-s-di-yu ge-sv-i; i-na-ge ge-sv u-na-ye-hi-s-di-yu ge-sv-i; a-me-quo-hi u-na-ye-hi-s-di-yu ge-sv-i; u-na-tlo-na-s-di o-tsa-li-nv-tli u-ni-na-ye-hi-s-di-yu ge-sv-i;

081127.english: In weariness and painfulness, in watchings often, in hunger and thirst, in fastings often, in cold and nakedness.
081127.cherokee: ᏓᎩᏯᏪᏥᏙᎸ ᎠᎴ ᎡᎯᏍᏗ ᎾᏆᎵᏍᏓᏁᎸᎢ; ᏯᏃᎩᏳ ᏂᏥᎸᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᎪᏄ ᎠᎩᏲᏏᏍᎬᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎩᏔᏕᎩᏍᎬᎢ; ᏯᏃᎩᏳ ᎠᎹᏟ ᎬᏍᎬᎢ; ᎤᏴᏢ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎩᏰᎸᎭ ᎨᏒᎢ.
081127.phonetic: Da-gi-ya-we-tsi-do-lv a-le e-hi-s-di na-qua-li-s-da-ne-lv-i; ya-no-gi-yu ni-tsi-lv-s-gv-na ge-sv-i; a-go-nu a-gi-yo-si-s-gv-i a-le a-gi-ta-de-gi-s-gv-i; ya-no-gi-yu a-ma-tli gv-s-gv-i; u-yv-tlv a-le a-gi-ye-lv-ha ge-sv-i.

081128.english: Beside those things that are without, that which cometh upon me daily, the care of all the churches.
081128.cherokee: ᏂᏓᏠᏯᏍᏛᎾ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏚᎩᏨᏂᏒ ᏣᎩᎷᏤᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏗᏆᎦᏌᏯᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᏚᎾᏓᏡᏩᏗᏒᎢ.
081128.phonetic: Ni-da-tlo-ya-s-dv-na tsu-da-le-nv-dv, na-s-gi ni-du-gi-tsv-ni-sv tsa-gi-lu-tse-ha, na-s-gi na di-qua-ga-sa-ya-s-do-di-yi ni-ga-dv tsu-na-ne-lo-di du-na-da-tlu-wa-di-sv-i.

081129.english: Who is weak, and I am not weak? who is offended, and I burn not?
081129.cherokee: ᎦᎪ ᎠᏩᎾᎦᎶᎢ, ᎠᏴᏃ ᏂᏥᏩᏂᎦᎸᎾ ᎨᏐᎢ?  ᎦᎪ ᏚᏬᏕᎯᎰᎢ, ᎠᏴᏃ ᏂᏥᎴᏴᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏐᎢ?
081129.phonetic: Ga-go a-wa-na-ga-lo-i, a-yv-no ni-tsi-wa-ni-ga-lv-na ge-so-i?  ga-go du-wo-de-hi-ho-i, a-yv-no ni-tsi-le-yv-s-gv-na ge-so-i?

081130.english: If I must needs glory, I will glory of the things which concern mine infirmities.
081130.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎠᏎ ᎠᏆᏢᏈᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᏥᏩᎾᎦᎵᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᏓᎦᏢᏆᏏ.
081130.phonetic: I-yu-no a-se a-qua-tlv-qui-s-di ge-se-s-di, tsi-wa-na-ga-li-yu ge-sv u-gv-wa-li da-ga-tlv-qua-si.

081131.english: The God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, which is blessed for evermore, knoweth that I lie not.
081131.cherokee: ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏙᏓ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎦᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᎦᏔᎭ  ᏂᎦᏥᎪᎥᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
081131.phonetic: U-gv-wi-yu-hi i-ga-tse-li Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li U-ne-la-nv-hi a-le u-do-da, na-s-gi ni-go-hi-lv ga-lv-quo-do-di tsi-gi, a-ga-ta-ha  ni-ga-tsi-go-v-s-gv-na ge-sv-i.

081132.english: In Damascus the governor under Aretas the king kept the city of the Damascenes with a garrison, desirous to apprehend me:
081132.cherokee: ᏕᎹᏍᎦ ᏫᎨᏙᎲ ᏄᎬᏫᏳᏎᏕᎩ ᎡᎵᏓ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏪᎧᏅᎯ, ᎠᏯᏫᏍᎬᎩ ᎠᏂᏕᎹᏍᎦ ᎤᏂᏚᎲᎢ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᎠᎩᏂᏴᏗᏱ;
081132.phonetic: De-ma-s-ga wi-ge-do-hv nu-gv-wi-yu-se-de-gi E-li-da u-gv-wi-yu-hi u-we-ka-nv-hi, a-ya-wi-s-gv-gi A-ni-de-ma-s-ga u-ni-du-hv-i na-s-gi u-du-li-s-gv a-gi-ni-yv-di-yi;

081133.english: And through a window in a basket was I let down by the wall, and escaped his hands.
081133.cherokee: ᎠᏦᎳᏅᏃ ᏓᎬᎩᏄᎪᏫᏒᎩ ᏔᎷᏣᎩᎯ ᎬᏆᏦᏗ ᎬᏆᏠᎥᏔᏅᎩ ᎠᏐᏳᎶᏗ, ᎠᎴ ᏥᏯᏗᏫᏎᎸᎩ.
081133.phonetic: A-tso-la-nv-no da-gv-gi-nu-go-wi-sv-gi ta-lu-tsa-gi-hi gv-qua-tso-di gv-qua-tlo-v-ta-nv-gi a-so-yu-lo-di, a-le tsi-ya-di-wi-se-lv-gi.

081201.english: It is not expedient for me doubtless to glory. I will come to visions and revelations of the Lord.
081201.cherokee: ᎥᏝ ᎬᏩᏓᏍᏕᎸᏗ ᏱᎩ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎠᏆᏢᏈᏍᏗᏱ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏓᏥᏁᎢᏍᏔᏂ [ᎩᎶ] ᎤᏁᎳᏫᏎᎸ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏄᏩᏁᎸᎢ.
081201.phonetic: V-tla gv-wa-da-s-de-lv-di yi-gi u-do-hi-yu-hi a-qua-tlv-qui-s-di-yi; na-s-gi i-yu-s-di da-tsi-ne-i-s-ta-ni [gi-lo] u-ne-la-wi-se-lv a-le U-gv-wi-yu-hi gv-ni-ge-sv nu-wa-ne-lv-i.

081202.english: I knew a man in Christ above fourteen years ago, (whether in the body, I cannot tell; or whether out of the body, I cannot tell: God knoweth;) such an one caught up to the third heaven.
081202.cherokee: ᏥᎦᏔᎲᎩ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎪᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ, ᎿᎭᏉ ᏂᎦᏚ ᎾᏕᏘᏴ, (ᎠᏯᎥ ᎠᏰᎸ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏥᎦᏔᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏰᎸ ᎾᏯᎥᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏥᎦᏔᎭ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏔᎭ;) ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎠᎦᏘᎾᏫᏛᎲᎩ ᏦᎢᏁ ᎦᎸᎶ ᏗᎨᏒ ᏩᎦᏘᏃᎸᎩ.
081202.phonetic: Tsi-ga-ta-hv-gi a-s-ga-ya Ga-lo-ne-dv go-hi-yu-hv-s-gi, hna-quo ni-ga-du na-de-ti-yv, (a-ya-v a-ye-lv v-tla yi-tsi-ga-ta-ha, a-le a-ye-lv na-ya-v-na ge-sv v-tla yi-tsi-ga-ta-ha; U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ga-ta-ha;) na-s-gi hi-a a-ga-ti-na-wi-dv-hv-gi tso-i-ne ga-lv-lo di-ge-sv wa-ga-ti-no-lv-gi.

081203.english: And I knew such a man, (whether in the body, or out of the body, I cannot tell: God knoweth;)
081203.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏥᎦᏔᎯ ᎨᏒᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ, (ᎠᏰᎸ ᎠᏯᎥ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏰᎸ ᎾᏯᎥᎾ ᎨᏒ ᎥᏝ ᏱᏥᎦᏔᎭ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏔᎭ;)
081203.phonetic: A-le tsi-ga-ta-hi ge-sv-gi na-s-gi, (a-ye-lv a-ya-v, a-le a-ye-lv na-ya-v-na ge-sv v-tla yi-tsi-ga-ta-ha; U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ga-ta-ha;)

081204.english: How that he was caught up into paradise, and heard unspeakable words, which it is not lawful for a man to utter.
081204.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᎦᏘᎾᏫᏛᎲᎩ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᏗᎨᏒ ᏩᎦᏘᏃᎸᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏛᎦᏅᎩ ᎠᏂᏬᏂᏍᎬ ᎢᎦᏪᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᏂᏚᏳᎪᏛᎾ ᎨᏒ ᏴᏫ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏪᏍᏗᏱ.
081204.phonetic: Na-s-gi na a-ga-ti-na-wi-dv-hv-gi nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv di-ge-sv wa-ga-ti-no-lv-gi, a-le u-dv-ga-nv-gi a-ni-wo-ni-s-gv i-ga-we-s-di ni-ge-sv-na, ni-du-yu-go-dv-na ge-sv yv-wi na-s-gi i-yu-we-s-di-yi.

081205.english: Of such an one will I glory: yet of myself I will not glory, but in mine infirmities.
081205.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏥᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᏱᎦᏢᏈ; ᎠᏋᏒᏍᎩᏂ ᎦᏓᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎬ ᎥᏝ ᏴᎦᎦᏢᏈ, ᏥᏩᎾᎦᎵᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏩᏒ.
081205.phonetic: Na-s-gi na tsi-ne-i-s-di-s-gv yi-ga-tlv-qui; a-quv-sv-s-gi-ni ga-da-ne-i-s-di-s-gv v-tla yv-ga-ga-tlv-qui, tsi-wa-na-ga-li-yu ge-sv u-wa-sv.

081206.english: For though I would desire to glory, I shall not be a fool; for I will say the truth: but now I forbear, lest any man should think of me above that which he seeth me to be, or that he heareth of me.
081206.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᏯᏆᏚᎵ ᎠᏆᏢᏈᏍᏗᏱ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎩᏁᎫ ᏱᎦᎨᏎᏍᏗ; ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏰᏃ ᎨᏒ ᏱᏥᏃᎲᎵ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᎥᎨᎳ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎩᎶ ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᎤᏟ ᏱᏂᎠᎩᎸᏉᏗ ᎠᏃ ᎾᏆᏍᏛ ᎠᎩᎪᏩᏘᏍᎬᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎠᏆᏛᎩᏍᎬᎢ.
081206.phonetic: I-yu-ye-no ya-qua-du-li a-qua-tlv-qui-s-di-yi, v-tla a-gi-ne-gu yi-ga-ge-se-s-di; u-do-hi-yu-hi-ye-no ge-sv yi-tsi-no-hv-li; a-se-no u-ne-la-gi v-ge-la, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha gi-lo a-qua-da-nv-te-s-gv u-tli yi-ni-a-gi-lv-quo-di a-no na-qua-s-dv a-gi-go-wa-ti-s-gv-i, a-le nu-s-dv a-qua-dv-gi-s-gv-i.

081207.english: And lest I should be exalted above measure through the abundance of the revelations, there was given to me a thorn in the flesh, the messenger of Satan to buffet me, lest I should be exalted above measure.
081207.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎤᎶᏒᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎠᏆᎵᏌᎳᏙᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎥᎩᎾᏄᎪᏫᏎᎸᎩ, ᎠᎩᏣᏲᎯᎯ ᎥᎩᏁᎸᎩ ᎠᎩᏇᏓᎸᎢ, ᏎᏓᏂ ᎤᏅᏏᏛ ᎠᏋᏂᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎶᏒᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎠᏆᎵᏌᎳᏙᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
081207.phonetic: Na-s-gi-no u-lo-sv-s-ta-nv-hi a-qua-li-sa-la-do-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv u-tsa-ti v-gi-na-nu-go-wi-se-lv-gi, a-gi-tsa-yo-hi-hi v-gi-ne-lv-gi a-gi-que-da-lv-i, Se-da-ni u-nv-si-dv a-quv-ni-hi, na-s-gi u-lo-sv-s-ta-nv-hi a-qua-li-sa-la-do-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi.

081208.english: For this thing I besought the Lord thrice, that it might depart from me.
081208.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ ᏦᎢ ᏂᏥᏔᏲᏎᎸᎩ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏆᏓᏅᎡᏗᏱ.
081208.phonetic: Na-s-gi hi-a u-gv-wa-li tso-i ni-tsi-ta-yo-se-lv-gi U-gv-wi-yu-hi na-s-gi a-qua-da-nv-e-di-yi.

081209.english: And he said unto me, My grace is sufficient for thee: for my strength is made perfect in weakness. Most gladly therefore will I rather glory in my infirmities, that the power of Christ may rest upon me.
081209.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᎾᎩᏪᏎᎸᎩ, ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎠᏆᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏰᎵᏉ ᎨᏣᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ; ᎠᏆᎵᏂᎬᎬᏰᏃ ᎤᎧᎵᏨᎯ ᎢᎬᏁᎸᎯ ᎾᎿᎭᏩᎾᎦᎳ ᎨᏒᎢ.  ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎠᏆᎵᎮᎵᏨᎯ ᎤᏟ ᎠᎩᏰᎸᎭ ᎠᏆᏢᏈᏍᏗᏱ ᏥᏩᎾᎦᎵᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᏊᏢᏙᏗᏱ.
081209.phonetic: Hi-a-no na-gi-we-se-lv-gi, Gv-wa-ga-ti-ya a-qua-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv ye-li-quo ge-tsa-li-s-de-lv-do-di; a-qua-li-ni-gv-gv-ye-no u-ka-li-tsv-hi i-gv-ne-lv-hi na-hna wa-na-ga-la ge-sv-i.  Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di u-tsa-ti a-qua-li-he-li-tsv-hi u-tli a-gi-ye-lv-ha a-qua-tlv-qui-s-di-yi tsi-wa-na-ga-li-yu ge-sv-i, na-s-gi u-li-ni-gi-di-yu ge-sv Ga-lo-ne-dv a-quu-tlv-do-di-yi.

081210.english: Therefore I take pleasure in infirmities, in reproaches, in necessities, in persecutions, in distresses for Christ's sake: for when I am weak, then am I strong.
081210.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎦᎵᎡᎵᎦ ᏥᏩᎾᎦᎵᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎦᏴᎩᏐᏢᏛᎢ, ᎠᎩᏂᎩᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏲ ᏅᏋᎿᎭᏕᎬᎢ, ᎡᎯᏍᏗ ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏔᏩᏕᎬ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᏍᎬᎢ; ᏥᏩᏂᎦᎵᏳᏰᏃ ᏥᎨᏐ, ᎾᎯᏳ ᎠᏆᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᎨᏐᎢ.
081210.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di ga-li-e-li-ga tsi-wa-na-ga-li-yu ge-sv-i, ga-yv-gi-so-tlv-dv-i, a-gi-ni-gi-dv ge-sv-i, u-yo nv-quv-hna-de-gv-i, e-hi-s-di a-qua-da-nv-ta-wa-de-gv Ga-lo-ne-dv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-s-gv-i; tsi-wa-ni-ga-li-yu-ye-no tsi-ge-so, na-hi-yu a-qua-li-ni-gi-di-yu ge-so-i.

081211.english: I am become a fool in glorying; ye have compelled me: for I ought to have been commended of you: for in nothing am I behind the very chiefest apostles, though I be nothing.
081211.cherokee: ᎠᎩᏁᎫ ᎾᏆᎵᏍᏔᏅ ᎦᏢᏆᏍᎬᎢ; ᏂᎯ ᏂᏍᎩᏴᏂᏌᏏ; ᏂᎯᏰᏃ ᏍᎩᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎩ; ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏑᏓᎴᎩ ᎤᏅ ᎡᏍᎦ ᏱᎦᏥᏲᎠᏍᎦ ᏄᏂᎬᏫᏳᏒ ᎨᏥᏅᏏᏛ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏴ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏱᎩ.
081211.phonetic: A-gi-ne-gu na-qua-li-s-ta-nv ga-tlv-qua-s-gv-i; ni-hi ni-s-gi-yv-ni-sa-si; ni-hi-ye-no s-gi-lv-quo-do-di ge-sv-gi; v-tla-ye-no su-da-le-gi u-nv e-s-ga yi-ga-tsi-yo-a-s-ga nu-ni-gv-wi-yu-sv ge-tsi-nv-si-dv, na-s-quo a-yv go-hu-s-di ni-ge-sv-na yi-gi.

081212.english: Truly the signs of an apostle were wrought among you in all patience, in signs, and wonders, and mighty deeds.
081212.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎠᏙᎴᎰᎯᏍᏙᏗ ᎥᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᎨᏒ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᎯ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏗᎭ ᎢᏤᎲᎢ, ᎬᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎬᏂᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏰᎸᏛᎢ, ᎤᏍᏆᏂᎪᏗ ᏕᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᏕᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᎢ.
081212.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya a-do-le-ho-hi-s-do-di v-gi-nv-si-dv ge-sv di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-hi ni-ga-li-s-di-ha i-tse-hv-i, gv-ta-nv-hi u-tsa-ti gv-ni-di-yu ge-sv-i, u-ye-lv-dv-i, u-s-qua-ni-go-di de-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-i, a-le u-li-ni-gi-dv de-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-i.

081213.english: For what is it wherein ye were inferior to other churches, except it be that I myself was not burdensome to you? forgive me this wrong.
081213.cherokee: ᎦᏙᏃ ᎤᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎿᎭᎡᏍᎦ ᏕᏦᎭᏍᎦ ᏗᏐᎢ ᏧᎾᏁᎶᏗ ᏚᎾᏓᏡᏩᏗᏒᎢ, ᎯᎠ ᎤᏩᏒ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᎠᏋᏒ ᎦᎨᏛ ᏂᏨᏴᏁᎸᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ?  ᎨᏍᎩᎥᏏᏉ ᎠᏗᎾ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏣᏘᏂ ᏂᏨᏯᏛᏁᎸᎢ.
081213.phonetic: Ga-do-no u-s-di na-s-gi na-hna e-s-ga de-tso-ha-s-ga di-so-i tsu-na-ne-lo-di du-na-da-tlu-wa-di-sv-i, hi-a u-wa-sv, na-s-gi a-yv a-quv-sv ga-ge-dv ni-tsv-yv-ne-lv-na ge-sv-i?  ge-s-gi-v-si-quo a-di-na hi-a na-s-gi u-tsa-ti-ni ni-tsv-ya-dv-ne-lv-i.

081214.english: Behold, the third time I am ready to come to you; and I will not be burdensome to you: for I seek not yours, but you: for the children ought not to lay up for the parents, but the parents for the children.
081214.cherokee: ᎬᏂᏳᏉ, ᏦᎢᏁ ᎠᏆᏛᏅᎢᏍᏗ ᏫᏨᎷᏤᏗᏱ; ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎦᎨᏛ ᏱᏅᎨᏨᏴᎦ; ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎢᏥᎲ ᏱᎩᏲᎭ, ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᏨᏲᎭ; ᏗᏂᏲᎵᏰᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏧᏂᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᏧᎾᏓᏁᎳᏁᏗ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᏂᎦᏴᎵᎨᏍᎩᏂ ᏧᏁᏥ ᏧᎾᏓᏁᎳᏁᏗ ᎨᏐᎢ.
081214.phonetic: Gv-ni-yu-quo, tso-i-ne a-qua-dv-nv-i-s-di wi-tsv-lu-tse-di-yi; v-tla a-le ga-ge-dv yi-nv-ge-tsv-yv-ga; v-tla-ye-no go-hu-s-di i-tsi-hv yi-gi-yo-ha, ni-hi-s-gi-ni i-tsv-yo-ha; di-ni-yo-li-ye-no v-tla tsu-ni-ga-yv-li-ge tsu-na-da-ne-la-ne-di yi-gi, a-ni-ga-yv-li-ge-s-gi-ni tsu-ne-tsi tsu-na-da-ne-la-ne-di ge-so-i.

081215.english: And I will very gladly spend and be spent for you; though the more abundantly I love you, the less I be loved.
081215.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎠᎩᏰᎸᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᏆᎫᏴᎯᏓᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏋᏒ ᎠᏆᏗᏒᎲᏍᏗᏱ ᏗᏣᏓᏅᏙ ᏕᏥᏍᏕᎵᏍᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᏉ ᎧᏁᏉᎬ ᎢᏨᎨᏳᏒᎢ ᎤᎦᏲᎶᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏱᏂᎬᏁᎭ ᏍᎩᎨᏳᏒᎢ.
081215.phonetic: A-le u-tsa-ti o-si-yu a-gi-ye-lv-se-s-di a-qua-gu-yv-hi-da-s-di-yi a-le a-quv-sv a-qua-di-sv-hv-s-di-yi di-tsa-da-nv-do de-tsi-s-de-li-s-gv-i, na-s-quo ka-ne-quo-gv i-tsv-ge-yu-sv-i u-ga-yo-lo-hi-s-di-yi yi-ni-gv-ne-ha s-gi-ge-yu-sv-i.

081216.english: But be it so, I did not burden you: nevertheless, being crafty, I caught you with guile.
081216.cherokee: ᎠᏗᎾ ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᏍᏕᏍᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎨᏛ ᏂᏨᏴᏁᎸᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᏥᏏᎾᏌᏂᏳ ᎨᏒ, ᎦᎶᏄᎮᏛ ᎠᏋᏔᏅᎩ ᏕᏨᏂᏴᎲᎩ.
081216.phonetic: A-di-na u-ne-la-gi na-s-gi nu-s-de-s-di, na-s-gi ga-ge-dv ni-tsv-yv-ne-lv-na ge-sv-i; a-se-no tsi-si-na-sa-ni-yu ge-sv, ga-lo-nu-he-dv a-quv-ta-nv-gi de-tsv-ni-yv-hv-gi.

081217.english: Did I make a gain of you by any of them whom I sent unto you?
081217.cherokee: ᏥᎪ ᎢᏨᎶᏄᎡᏍᎨ ᎦᏥᏴᏗᏍᎨ ᎩᎶ ᎦᏥᏅᏏᏛ ᏫᎨᏥᎷᏤᎸᎯ?
081217.phonetic: Tsi-go i-tsv-lo-nu-e-s-ge ga-tsi-yv-di-s-ge gi-lo ga-tsi-nv-si-dv wi-ge-tsi-lu-tse-lv-hi?

081218.english: I desired Titus, and with him I sent a brother. Did Titus make a gain of you? walked we not in the same spirit? walked we not in the same steps?
081218.cherokee: ᏓᏓᏏ ᏥᏔᏲᏎᎸᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏁᎩ ᎥᏥᏅᏒᎩ ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ.  ᏥᎪ ᏓᏓᏏ ᎢᏥᎶᏄᎮᎴᎢ?  ᏝᏍᎪ ᎤᏠᏱᏉ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᏲᏍᏛᏗᏍᎨ ᎣᏍᏕᏙᎲᎢ?  ᏝᏍᎪ ᏌᏉ ᏱᎨᏎ ᏙᏍᏓᎳᏏᏂᏙᎲᎢ?
081218.phonetic: Da-da-si tsi-ta-yo-se-lv-gi, a-le a-ne-gi v-tsi-nv-sv-gi i-da-li-nv-tli.  Tsi-go Da-da-si i-tsi-lo-nu-he-le-i?  tla-s-go u-tlo-yi-quo a-da-nv-do yo-s-dv-di-s-ge o-s-de-do-hv-i?  tla-s-go sa-quo yi-ge-se do-s-da-la-si-ni-do-hv-i?

081219.english: Again, think ye that we excuse ourselves unto you? we speak before God in Christ: but we do all things, dearly beloved, for your edifying.
081219.cherokee: ᎠᎴᏬ, ᏥᎪ ᎣᏣᎵᏍᏕᎵ ᎢᏤᎵᎭ ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎲᎢ?  ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏔᎲ ᎣᏥᏁᎦ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏧᏪᏲᏅᎯ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎢᏨᎨᏳᎢ, ᏂᎦᎥ ᏂᎯ ᎢᏣᎵᏂᎪᎯᏍᏙᏗ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ [ᎣᏥᏁᎦ.]
081219.phonetic: A-le-wo, tsi-go o-tsa-li-s-de-li i-tse-li-ha i-tsi-ga-ta-hv-i?  U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ga-ta-hv o-tsi-ne-ga Ga-lo-ne-dv tsu-we-yo-nv-hi na-s-gi-ya-i; a-se-no i-tsv-ge-yu-i, ni-ga-v ni-hi i-tsa-li-ni-go-hi-s-do-di u-gv-wa-li [o-tsi-ne-ga.]

081220.english: For I fear, lest, when I come, I shall not find you such as I would, and that I shall be found unto you such as ye would not: lest there be debates, envyings, wraths, strifes, backbitings, whisperings, swellings, tumults:
081220.cherokee: ᏥᎾᏰᏍᎦᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏫᏥᎷᏨᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏣᏍᏛᎾᏉ ᎨᏒ ᏄᏍᏛ ᎠᏆᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᎢᏨᏩᏛᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏋᏒ ᎨᏒ ᏍᎩᎪᏩᏛᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᏣᏚᎵᏍᎬᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᎠᎩᏩᏛᏗᏱ ᏗᏘᏲᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᏛᏳᎨᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᏔᎳᏬᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᏗᏒᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏲ ᏗᏓᏃᎮᎵᏓᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᏙᏅᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏟ ᎠᏤᎸᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎢᎬᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ;
081220.phonetic: Tsi-na-ye-s-ga-ye-no na-s-gi wi-tsi-lu-tsv-ha na-s-gi ni-tsa-s-dv-na-quo ge-sv nu-s-dv a-qua-du-li-s-gv i-tsv-wa-dv-di-yi, a-le a-quv-sv ge-sv s-gi-go-wa-dv-di-yi na-s-gi-ya ni-tsa-du-li-s-gv-na ge-sv-i; a-le a-gi-wa-dv-di-yi di-ti-yo-s-di ge-sv-i, a-dv-yu-ge-di ge-sv-i, a-ta-la-wo-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, a-di-sv-s-di ge-sv-i, u-yo di-da-no-he-li-da-s-di ge-sv-i, a-do-nv-di ge-sv-i, u-tli a-tse-lv-di ge-sv-i, tsu-da-le-nv-dv i-gv-ne-di ge-sv-i;

081221.english: And lest, when I come again, my God will humble me among you, and that I shall bewail many which have sinned already, and have not repented of the uncleanness and fornication and lasciviousness which they have committed.
081221.cherokee: ᎠᎴ [ᏥᎾᏰᏍᎦ,] ᏔᎵᏁ ᏫᏥᎷᏨᎭ, ᎠᏆᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᏆᏕᎰᎯᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎲᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᏥᏍᎪᏂᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᎦᏳᎳ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏲ ᏄᏂᏰᎸᏅᎾ ᏥᎩ ᎦᏓᎭ ᏄᎾᏛᏁᎸᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏕᎵᏛ ᏚᎾᏂᏏᏅᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᎵᏐᏢᎢᏍᏔᏅᎢ.
081221.phonetic: A-le [tsi-na-ye-s-ga,] ta-li-ne wi-tsi-lu-tsv-ha, A-qua-ne-la-nv-hi a-qua-de-ho-hi-s-do-di-yi i-tsi-ga-ta-hv-i, a-le ga-tsi-s-go-ni-s-di-yi u-ni-tsa-ti ga-yu-la u-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv-hi tsi-gi, a-le u-yo nu-ni-ye-lv-nv-na tsi-gi ga-da-ha nu-na-dv-ne-lv-i, a-le u-de-li-dv du-na-ni-si-nv-i, a-le u-na-li-so-tlv-i-s-ta-nv-i.

081301.english: This is the third time I am coming to you. In the mouth of two or three witnesses shall every word be established.
081301.cherokee: ᎪᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏦᎢᏁ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏥᏮᏓᏨᎷᏤᎵ.  ᎠᏂᏔᎵ ᎠᎴ ᏦᎢ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎯ ᏗᎬᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᏍᏓᏱᏗᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎧᏃᎮᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
081301.phonetic: Go-hi na-s-gi tso-i-ne hna-quo tsi-wv-da-tsv-lu-tse-li.  A-ni-ta-li a-le tso-i a-ni-ga-ta-hi di-gv-do-di ge-se-s-di a-s-da-yi-di-s-di ni-ga-v ka-no-he-di ge-sv-i.

081302.english: I told you before, and foretell you, as if I were present, the second time; and being absent now I write to them which heretofore have sinned, and to all other, that, if I come again, I will not spare:
081302.cherokee: ᎦᏳᎳ ᎯᎠ ᎾᎩᏪᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᎬᏱ ᎦᏰᎯ ᎯᎠ ᏂᏥᏪᎭ, ᏔᎵᏁ ᏥᏫᏥᎦᏔᎰ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎩᎪᏁᎸ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒ ᎦᏥᏲᏪᎳᏁᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎦᏳᎳ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᏛᏉ ᎠᏂᏐᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳ ᏔᎵᏁ ᏱᏫᎠᎩᎷᏨ, ᎥᏝ ᏴᎦᎦᎵᏏᏅᏓ;
081302.phonetic: Ga-yu-la hi-a na-gi-we-sv, a-le i-gv-yi ga-ye-hi hi-a ni-tsi-we-ha, ta-li-ne tsi-wi-tsi-ga-ta-ho na-s-gi-ya-i, a-le a-gi-go-ne-lv go-hi ge-sv ga-tsi-yo-we-la-ne-ha na-s-gi na ga-yu-la u-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv-hi tsi-gi, a-le ni-ga-dv-quo a-ni-so-i, na-s-gi i-yu ta-li-ne yi-wi-a-gi-lu-tsv, v-tla yv-ga-ga-li-si-nv-da;

081303.english: Since ye seek a proof of Christ speaking in me, which to you-ward is not weak, but is mighty in you.
081303.cherokee: ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᏥᏥᏲᎭ ᎪᎯᏳᏗᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎠᏴ ᎠᏋᏗᏍᎬ ᎧᏁᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏥᎦᏔᎲ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏩᎾᎦᎳ ᏱᎩ, ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳᏍᎩᏂ ᎢᎬᏁᎸᎯ ᎢᏤᎲᎢ,
081303.phonetic: Ni-ga-li-s-do-di-ha tsi-tsi-yo-ha go-hi-yu-di-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv a-yv a-quv-di-s-gv ka-ne-gv-i, na-s-gi i-tsi-ga-ta-hv v-tla a-wa-na-ga-la yi-gi, u-li-ni-gi-di-yu-s-gi-ni i-gv-ne-lv-hi i-tse-hv-i,

081304.english: For though he was crucified through weakness, yet he liveth by the power of God. For we also are weak in him, but we shall live with him by the power of God toward you.
081304.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎠᏩᎾᎦᎳᎯᏳ ᎨᏒ ᏓᏓᎾᏩᏍᏛ ᎠᎦᏛᏅᎩ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎬᏃᏛ ᎢᏯᎬᏁᎸᎯ ᎬᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ.  ᎠᏴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎣᏥᏯᎥ ᏦᏥᏩᎾᎦᎳᎯᏳ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᏙᏨᏁᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏨᏴᏓᏁᎲ ᏂᎯ.
081304.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-s-gi-ni-no-nv a-wa-na-ga-la-hi-yu ge-sv da-da-na-wa-s-dv a-ga-dv-nv-gi, a-se-no gv-no-dv i-ya-gv-ne-lv-hi gv-ta-nv-hi u-li-ni-gi-di-yu ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi.  A-yv na-s-quo na-s-gi o-tsi-ya-v tso-tsi-wa-na-ga-la-hi-yu, a-se-no i-tsu-la-ha do-tsv-ne-s-di na-s-gi, U-ne-la-nv-hi u-li-ni-gi-di-yu ge-sv i-tsv-yv-da-ne-hv ni-hi.

081305.english: Examine yourselves, whether ye be in the faith; prove your own selves. Know ye not your own selves, how that Jesus Christ is in you, except ye be reprobates?
081305.cherokee: ᎢᏣᏓᎪᎵᏯ ᎢᏨᏒ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᎯ ᏱᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᏦᎯᏳᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏱᎩ; ᎢᏣᏙᎴᎰᎯ ᏂᏣᏍᏛᎢ.  ᏝᏍᎪ ᎢᏨᏒ ᏱᏣᏓᎦᏔᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎢᏥᏯᎥᎢ, ᎢᏳᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎡᏥᏐᏅᎢᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᏱᎩ.
081305.phonetic: I-tsa-da-go-li-ya i-tsv-sv, na-s-gi i-tso-hi-yu-hi yi-gi, a-le i-tso-hi-yu-hi ni-ge-sv-na yi-gi; i-tsa-do-le-ho-hi ni-tsa-s-dv-i.  Tla-s-go i-tsv-sv yi-tsa-da-ga-ta-ha na-s-gi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv i-tsi-ya-v-i, i-yu-s-gi-ni-no-nv e-tsi-so-nv-i-s-ta-nv-hi yi-gi.

081306.english: But I trust that ye shall know that we are not reprobates.
081306.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎤᏚᎩ ᎬᏍᎦ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏥᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᎣᎩᏐᏅᎢᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ.
081306.phonetic: A-se-no u-du-gi gv-s-ga na-s-gi i-tsi-ga-do-v-hi-s-di-yi na-s-gi a-yv o-gi-so-nv-i-s-ta-nv-hi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i.

081307.english: Now I pray to God that ye do no evil; not that we should appear approved, but that ye should do that which is honest, though we be as reprobates.
081307.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏥᏔᏲᏎᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎯ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᏐᏅ ᏗᏥᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ; ᎥᏝ ᎠᏴ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎣᎩᏰᎸᏒ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎠᏆᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᏱᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ, ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏣᏛᏁᏗᏱ, ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᎣᎩᏐᏅᎢᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᏱᏅᏩᏍᏗ.
081307.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni tsi-ta-yo-se-ha na-s-gi ni-hi go-hu-s-di u-so-nv di-tsi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na; v-tla a-yv o-si-yu o-gi-ye-lv-sv gv-ni-ge-sv i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi a-qua-du-li-s-gv yi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha, ni-hi-s-gi-ni na-s-gi na du-yu-go-dv ge-sv i-tsa-dv-ne-di-yi, u-ne-la-gi o-gi-so-nv-i-s-ta-nv-hi yi-nv-wa-s-di.

081308.english: For we can do nothing against the truth, but for the truth.
081308.cherokee: ᎥᏝᏰᏃ ᏰᎵ ᏴᎦᏲᏣᏡᏓ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏲᏥᏍᏕᎸᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ.
081308.phonetic: V-tla-ye-no ye-li yv-ga-yo-tsa-tlu-da u-do-hi-yu-hi ge-sv-i, yo-tsi-s-de-lv-s-gi-ni u-do-hi-yu-hi ge-sv-i.

081309.english: For we are glad, when we are weak, and ye are strong: and this also we wish, even your perfection.
081309.cherokee: ᎣᏏᏳᏰᏃ ᎣᎩᏰᎸᎭ ᏦᏥᏩᎾᎦᎳ ᏥᎨᏐᎢ, ᏂᎯᏃ ᏥᏕᏣᎵᏂᎬᎪᎢ; ᎯᎠᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎣᎦᏚᎵᎭ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᏥᎪᎸᎾ ᎢᏣᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ.
081309.phonetic: O-si-yu-ye-no o-gi-ye-lv-ha tso-tsi-wa-na-ga-la tsi-ge-so-i, ni-hi-no tsi-de-tsa-li-ni-gv-go-i; hi-a-no na-s-quo o-ga-du-li-ha, na-s-gi ni-tsi-go-lv-na i-tsa-li-s-do-di-yi.

081310.english: Therefore I write these things being absent, lest being present I should use sharpness, according to the power which the Lord hath given me to edification, and not to destruction.
081310.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏄᏍᏗ ᏥᏨᏲᏪᎳᏁᎭ ᎠᎩᎪᏁᎸᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎯᏳ ᏥᎦᏔᎮᏍᏗ ᎬᏍᎦᎢᏍᏓᎩ ᎠᏋᏔᏂᏓᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎢᎬᏆᏛᏁᏗ ᎠᏆᎵᏍᎪᎸᏓᏁᎸ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᎾᎵᏂᎪᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎥᏝᏃ ᎤᏂᏛᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
081310.phonetic: Na-s-gi nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha hi-a na-s-gi tsi-nu-s-di tsi-tsv-yo-we-la-ne-ha a-gi-go-ne-lv-i, na-s-gi na-hi-yu tsi-ga-ta-he-s-di gv-s-ga-i-s-da-gi a-quv-ta-ni-da-s-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na, na-s-gi-ya i-gv-qua-dv-ne-di a-qua-li-s-go-lv-da-ne-lv U-gv-wi-yu-hi, na-s-gi tsu-na-li-ni-go-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, v-tla-no u-ni-dv-do-di ge-sv-i.

081311.english: Finally, brethren, farewell. Be perfect, be of good comfort, be of one mind, live in peace; and the God of love and peace shall be with you.
081311.cherokee: ᎤᎵᏍᏆᎸᏗᏃ, ᎢᏓᎵᏅᏟ, ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛᏉ ᏂᏣᏛᎿᎭᏕᎨᏍᏗ.  ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏂᏥᎪᎸᎾ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎤᎦᎵᏍᏗᏉ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏖᏍᏗ, ᎤᏠᏱᏉ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏕᏣᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛᏉ ᎢᏤᎮᏍᏗ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏃ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎠᏓᏁᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎢᏤᎳᏗᏙᎮᏍᏗ.
081311.phonetic: U-li-s-qua-lv-di-no, i-da-li-nv-tli, nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv-quo ni-tsa-dv-hna-de-ge-s-di.  Go-hu-s-di ni-tsi-go-lv-na ge-se-s-di, u-ga-li-s-di-quo de-tsa-da-nv-te-s-di, u-tlo-yi-quo ge-se-s-di de-tsa-da-nv-dv-i, nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv-quo i-tse-he-s-di; U-ne-la-nv-hi-no a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv a-le nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv a-da-ne-hi tsi-gi, i-tse-la-di-do-he-s-di.

081312.english: Greet one another with an holy kiss.

081314.english: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ, and the love of God, and the communion of the Holy Ghost, be with you all. Amen.
081314.cherokee: ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᏚᏓᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᏕᏥᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎮᏍᏗ ᏂᏥᎥᎢ.  ᎡᎺᏅ.
081314.phonetic: Gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv, a-le u-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi, a-le u-da-du-da-do-di ge-sv Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do de-tsi-ka-hna-wa-di-do-he-s-di ni-tsi-v-i.  E-me-nv.
